OBJECT Table 36 Sales Header
{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=08/06/26;
    Time=10:57:56 AM;
    Modified=Yes;
    Version List=N.7.2.1,AP001651,AP2263,AP2308,CU26Q1;
  }
  PROPERTIES
  {
    Permissions=TableData 5025405=m;
    DataCaptionFields=No.,Sell-to Customer Name;
    OnInsert=BEGIN
               // Start PA032225
               IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnInsert,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,'') THEN
                 EXIT;
               // Stop PA032225

               // Start PA039250
               ApplyStatusFunction(FALSE);
               // Stop PA039250
               SalesSetup.GET;
               ServSetupG.GET;
               IF "No." = '' THEN BEGIN
                 TestNoSeries;
                 NoSeriesMgt.InitSeries(GetNoSeriesCode,xRec."No. Series","Posting Date","No.","No. Series");
               END;
               SalesHeaderBuildPossible(Rec);
               InitRecord;
               // Start INC
               IF IsImporter THEN
                 IF IMMDealerMgmtG.GetDealer <> '' THEN
                   IMMDealerMgmtG.SetSalesHeaderDefaults(Rec);
               // Stop INC
               IF GETFILTER("Sell-to Customer No.") <> '' THEN
                 IF GETRANGEMIN("Sell-to Customer No.") = GETRANGEMAX("Sell-to Customer No.") THEN
                   VALIDATE("Sell-to Customer No.",GETRANGEMIN("Sell-to Customer No."));

               IF GETFILTER("Sell-to Contact No.") <> '' THEN
                 IF GETRANGEMIN("Sell-to Contact No.") = GETRANGEMAX("Sell-to Contact No.") THEN
                   VALIDATE("Sell-to Contact No.",GETRANGEMIN("Sell-to Contact No."));
               // Start PA041895
               // Stop PA041895
               // Start PA034291
               "Prepayment Assignment":= TRUE;
               IF "Document Type" = "Document Type"::Order THEN
                 "Prepayment Order No." := "No.";
               // Stop PA034291

               // Start PA042167
               IF NOT SkipDocChainG THEN BEGIN
                 IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases" THEN BEGIN
                   CASE "Document Type" OF
                     "Document Type"::Quote:
                       DocChainMgtG.InsertChainEntry("Document Chain No.",DocChainEntryG."Document Type"::"Vehicle Quote","No.",FALSE);
                     "Document Type"::Order:
                       DocChainMgtG.InsertChainEntry("Document Chain No.",DocChainEntryG."Document Type"::"Vehicle Order","No.",FALSE);
                     "Document Type"::Invoice:
                       DocChainMgtG.InsertChainEntry("Document Chain No.",DocChainEntryG."Document Type"::"Vehicle Invoice","No.",FALSE);
                   END;
                 END;
               END;
               // Stop PA042167
               // Start PA041687
               IF "Document Type" = "Document Type"::Quote THEN BEGIN
                 CASE "Order Type" OF
                   "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases":
                     IF FORMAT(SalesSetup."Parts Quote Validity") <> '' THEN
                       "Valid-To Date" := CALCDATE(FORMAT(SalesSetup."Parts Quote Validity"),WORKDATE);
                   "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases":
                     IF FORMAT(SalesSetup."Vehicle Quote Validity") <> '' THEN
                       "Valid-To Date" := CALCDATE(FORMAT(SalesSetup."Vehicle Quote Validity"),WORKDATE);
                   "Order Type"::Service:
                     IF FORMAT(SalesSetup."Service Quote Validity") <> '' THEN
                       "Valid-To Date" := CALCDATE(FORMAT(SalesSetup."Service Quote Validity"),WORKDATE);
                 END;
               END;
               // Stop PA041687

               // Start PA032225
               ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnInsert,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,'');
               // Stop PA032225
             END;

    OnModify=BEGIN
               // Start PA036842
               // Start PA037938.50730
               // Stop PA037938.50730
               // Stop PA036842

               // Start PA032225
               IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnModify,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,'') THEN
                 EXIT;
               // Stop PA032225

               // Start PA039250
               // Start PA036842
               // Start PA039250.51663
               IF NOT SkipDocumentStatusCodeCheckG THEN
                 IF (xRec."Status Code" = "Status Code") THEN
                   ApplyStatusFunction(FALSE);
               SkipDocumentStatusCodeCheckG := FALSE;
               // Stop PA039250.51663
               // Stop PA036842
               // Stop PA039250
               // Start PA042167
               IF NOT SkipDocChainG THEN BEGIN
                 IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases" THEN BEGIN
                   CASE "Document Type" OF
                     "Document Type"::Quote:
                       DocChainMgtG.InsertChainEntry("Document Chain No.",DocChainEntryG."Document Type"::"Vehicle Quote","No.",FALSE);
                     "Document Type"::Order:
                       DocChainMgtG.InsertChainEntry("Document Chain No.",DocChainEntryG."Document Type"::"Vehicle Order","No.",FALSE);
                     "Document Type"::Invoice:
                       DocChainMgtG.InsertChainEntry("Document Chain No.",DocChainEntryG."Document Type"::"Vehicle Invoice","No.",FALSE);
                   END;
                 END;
               END;
               // Stop PA042167

               // Start PA032225
               ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnModify,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,'');
               // Stop PA032225
             END;

    OnDelete=VAR
               _INCADEA_@1109400002 : Integer;
               VehOptionInv@1109400001 : Record 5025464;
               OppL@1109500002 : Record 5092;
               NotOwnedVehiclesL@1109400003 : Record 5205936;
               SelectedMultipleChannelL@1000000000 : Record 5207890;
             BEGIN
               // Start PA032225
               IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnDelete, ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre, '') THEN
                 EXIT;
               // Stop PA032225
               // Start INC
               ApplyStatusFunction(FALSE);
               // Stop INC
               // Start PA032071
               // Stop PA032071

               // Start PA041864
               // Stop PA041864
               // Start EU.0009764.9908
               IF UserSessionUnitG.GetPageOpened() THEN
                 IF "Opportunity No." <> '' THEN
                   OppL.UpdateEstimatedValueFromSalesHdr(Rec);
               // Stop EU.0009764.9908
               SalesPost.DeleteHeader(Rec,SalesShptHeader,SalesInvHeader,SalesCrMemoHeader,ReturnRcptHeader);
               VALIDATE("Applies-to ID",'');
               // Start PA042951
               ArchSalesHdrG.Archive(Rec, 1, FALSE);  //1 - Manual Deletion
               // Stop PA042951
               // Start PA034291.I002194
               // Start PA034291.I002224
               PrepmtMgtG.CheckUnpostedServOrderExist("No.",FALSE);
               // Stop PA034291.I002224
               // Stop PA034291.I002194
               SalesLine.LOCKTABLE;
               // Start INC
               SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
               SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
               SalesLine.SETRANGE(Type,SalesLine.Type::"Charge (Item)");
               IF SalesLine.FINDSET THEN
                 REPEAT
                   SalesLine.DeleteRelatedLines(FALSE);
               // Start EU.0138596
                   SalesLine.SkipUpdateVATAmountRounding();
               // Stop EU.0138596
                   SalesLine.DELETE(TRUE);
                 UNTIL SalesLine.NEXT = 0;
               SalesLine.RESET;
               // Stop INC

               SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
               SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
               // Start INC
               SalesLine.SETRANGE("Item Type",SalesLine."Item Type"::Vehicle);
               IF SalesLine.FINDSET THEN
                 REPEAT
                   ClearVehicleSetReference(SalesLine);
               // Start EU.0101759.101909
                   SalesLine.SkipFindStatus();
               // Stop EU.0101759.101909
               // Start EU.0138596
                   SalesLine.SkipUpdateVATAmountRounding();
               // Stop EU.0138596
                   SalesLine.DELETE(TRUE);
                 UNTIL SalesLine.NEXT = 0;
               SalesLine.SETRANGE("Item Type");
               IF SalesLine.FINDSET THEN
                 REPEAT
               // Start EU.0090167
               // Start EU.0161230.162041
                   IF SalesLine."Order Type" IN [SalesLine."Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases",SalesLine."Order Type"::Service] THEN
               // Stop EU.0161230.162041
                     SalesLine.SkipFindStatus();
               // Stop EU.0090167
                   SalesLine.DeleteRelatedLines(FALSE);
               // Start EU.0138596
                   SalesLine.SkipUpdateVATAmountRounding();
               // Stop EU.0138596
                   SalesLine.DELETE(TRUE);
                 UNTIL SalesLine.NEXT = 0;
               IF IsImporter THEN BEGIN
                 IF ("Document Type" = "Document Type"::Order) AND ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases") THEN BEGIN
                   VehicleStocklistG.RESET;
                   VehicleStocklistG.SETCURRENTKEY("Dealer Sales Order No.",VIN);
                   VehicleStocklistG.SETRANGE("Dealer Sales Order No.","No.");
                   VehicleStocklistG.MODIFYALL("Dealer Sales Order No.",'');
                 END;
               END;
               // Stop INC

               SalesCommentLine.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
               SalesCommentLine.SETRANGE("No.","No.");
               // Start PA045176
               IF NOT SalesCommentLine.ISEMPTY THEN
                 SalesCommentLine.DELETEALL;
               // Stop PA045176

               DeleteInstallment();
               PurchDocTextG.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
               PurchDocTextG.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
               // Start PA045176
               IF NOT PurchDocTextG.ISEMPTY THEN
                 PurchDocTextG.DELETEALL;
               // Stop PA045176

               DiffTaxTextG.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
               DiffTaxTextG.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
               // Start PA045176
               IF NOT DiffTaxTextG.ISEMPTY THEN
                 DiffTaxTextG.DELETEALL;
               // Stop PA045176

               SalesDocTextG.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
               SalesDocTextG.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
               // Start PA032651
               // Start PA045176
               IF NOT SalesDocTextG.ISEMPTY THEN
                 SalesDocTextG.DELETEALL;
               // Stop PA045176
               // Stop PA032651
               IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases" THEN BEGIN
                 VehOptionInv.RESET;
                 VehOptionInv.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
                 VehOptionInv.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
                 IF VehOptionInv.FINDFIRST THEN
                   VehOptionInv.DELETEALL;
               END;
               SalesAssistanceLineG.DeleteDocSalesAssistLine(
                 SalesAssistanceLineG.Area::Sale,"Document Type","No.",0);
               // Start INC
               IF ((SalesShptHeader."No." <> '') OR
                  (SalesInvHeader."No." <> '') OR
                  (SalesCrMemoHeader."No." <> '') OR
                  (ReturnRcptHeader."No." <> '')) AND
               // Stop INC
                  ("Order Type" <> "Order Type"::Service)
               THEN BEGIN
                 DELETE;
                 COMMIT;

                 IF SalesShptHeader."No." <> '' THEN
                   IF CONFIRM(
                        Text000,TRUE,
                        SalesShptHeader."No.")
                   THEN BEGIN
                     SalesShptHeader.SETRECFILTER;
                     SalesShptHeader.PrintRecords(TRUE);
                   END;

                 IF SalesInvHeader."No." <> '' THEN
                   IF CONFIRM(
                        Text001,TRUE,
                        SalesInvHeader."No.")
                   THEN BEGIN
                     SalesInvHeader.SETRECFILTER;
                     SalesInvHeader.PrintRecords(TRUE);
                   END;

                 IF SalesCrMemoHeader."No." <> '' THEN
                   IF CONFIRM(
                        Text002,TRUE,
                        SalesCrMemoHeader."No.")
                   THEN BEGIN
                     SalesCrMemoHeader.SETRECFILTER;
                     SalesCrMemoHeader.PrintRecords(TRUE);
                   END;

               // Start INC
                 IF ReturnRcptHeader."No." <> '' THEN
                   IF CONFIRM(
                        Text023,TRUE,
                        ReturnRcptHeader."No.")
                   THEN BEGIN
                     ReturnRcptHeader.SETRECFILTER;
                     ReturnRcptHeader.PrintRecords(TRUE);
                   END;
               END;
               // Start PA036209.28630
               // Stop PA036209.28630
               // Start PA040025
               // Start EU.0009764.9908
               // Stop EU.0009764.9908
               // Stop PA040025
               // Start PA042167
               IF NOT SkipDocChainG THEN BEGIN
                 IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases" THEN BEGIN
                   CASE "Document Type" OF
                     "Document Type"::Quote:
                       DocChainMgtG.DeleteChainEntry(DocChainEntryG."Document Type"::"Vehicle Quote","No.",FALSE);
                     "Document Type"::Order:
                       DocChainMgtG.DeleteChainEntry(DocChainEntryG."Document Type"::"Vehicle Order","No.",FALSE);
                     "Document Type"::Invoice:
                       DocChainMgtG.DeleteChainEntry(DocChainEntryG."Document Type"::"Vehicle Invoice","No.",FALSE);
                   END;
                 END;
               END;
               // Stop PA042167
               // Start PA041687
               NotOwnedVehiclesL.RESET;
               NotOwnedVehiclesL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
               NotOwnedVehiclesL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
               NotOwnedVehiclesL.DELETEALL;
               // Stop PA041687
               // Stop INC
               // Start EU.0032067
               SelectedMultipleChannelL.DeleteMessageChannels("No.", "Document Type", FindArea());
               // Stop EU.0032067
               // Start PA032225
               ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnDelete, ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post, '');
               // Stop PA032225
             END;

    OnRename=BEGIN
               // Start PA033019
               ERROR(Text003,TABLECAPTION);
               // Stop PA033019
             END;

    CaptionML=ENU=Sales Header;
    LookupPageID=Page45;
    DrillDownPageID=Page45;
  }
  FIELDS
  {
    { 1   ;   ;Document Type       ;Option        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA039250
                                                                // Stop PA039250
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Document Type;
                                                   OptionCaptionML=ENU=Quote,Order,Invoice,Credit Memo,Blanket Order,Return Order;
                                                   OptionString=Quote,Order,Invoice,Credit Memo,Blanket Order,Return Order }
    { 2   ;   ;Sell-to Customer No.;Code20        ;TableRelation=Customer;
                                                   OnValidate=VAR
                                                                Prospect@1109400000 : Record 5050;
                                                                SelectedMultipleChannelL@1000 : Record 5207890;
                                                              BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA032225
                                                                IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,FIELDNAME("Sell-to Customer No.")) THEN
                                                                  EXIT;
                                                                // Stop PA032225
                                                                // Start EU.0122714.123625
                                                                // Start EU.0121768.124881
                                                                // Stop EU.0121768.124881
                                                                // Stop EU.0122714.123625
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                CustomerSelection("Sell-to Customer No.");
                                                                IF IsImporter THEN BEGIN
                                                                  IF IMMDealerMgmtG.GetDealer <> '' THEN
                                                                    IF NOT IMMDealerMgmtG.CheckDealerCustomer("Sell-to Customer No.") THEN
                                                                      ERROR(C_IMS000,FIELDCAPTION("Sell-to Customer No."),"Sell-to Customer No.");
                                                                END;
                                                                // Start PA036869.34485
                                                                IF CurrFieldNo = FIELDNO("Sell-to Customer No.") THEN
                                                                  IF "Sell-to Customer No." > '' THEN
                                                                    IF "Sell-to Customer No." <> xRec."Sell-to Customer No." THEN BEGIN
                                                                      UpdateOpportunity();
                                                                    END;
                                                                // Stop PA036869.34485

                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                IF ("Sell-to Customer No." <> xRec."Sell-to Customer No.") AND
                                                                   (xRec."Sell-to Customer No." <> '')
                                                                THEN BEGIN
                                                                  IF "Document Type" = "Document Type"::Order THEN BEGIN
                                                                    CALCFIELDS("No. of Trade-Ins");
                                                                    IF "No. of Trade-Ins" > 0 THEN
                                                                      ERROR(C_INC014);
                                                                  END;
                                                                // Start PA043640.94597
                                                                  IF HideValidationDialog OR NOT GUIALLOWED OR (CurrFieldNo <> FIELDNO("Sell-to Customer No.")) THEN
                                                                // Stop PA043640.94597
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                    Confirmed := TRUE
                                                                // Start PA041187.91179
                                                                  ELSE BEGIN
                                                                    IF SalesLinesExist THEN
                                                                      Confirmed := CONFIRM(Text015 + Text004,FALSE,FIELDCAPTION("Sell-to Customer No."))
                                                                    ELSE
                                                                      Confirmed := CONFIRM(Text004,FALSE,FIELDCAPTION("Sell-to Customer No."));
                                                                  END;
                                                                // Stop PA041187.91179
                                                                  IF Confirmed THEN BEGIN
                                                                    SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
                                                                    SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
                                                                    IF "Sell-to Customer No." = '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                      IF SalesLine.FINDFIRST THEN
                                                                        ERROR(
                                                                          Text005,
                                                                          FIELDCAPTION("Sell-to Customer No."));
                                                                      INIT;
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                      "Order Type" := xRec."Order Type";
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                      SalesSetup.GET;
                                                                      InitRecord;
                                                                      "No. Series" := xRec."No. Series";
                                                                      IF xRec."Shipping No." <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                        "Shipping No. Series" := xRec."Shipping No. Series";
                                                                        "Shipping No." := xRec."Shipping No.";
                                                                      END;
                                                                      IF xRec."Posting No." <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                        "Posting No. Series" := xRec."Posting No. Series";
                                                                        "Posting No." := xRec."Posting No.";
                                                                      END;
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                      IF xRec."Return Receipt No." <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                        "Return Receipt No. Series" := xRec."Return Receipt No. Series";
                                                                        "Return Receipt No." := xRec."Return Receipt No.";
                                                                      END;
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                      EXIT;
                                                                    END;
                                                                    IF "Document Type" = "Document Type"::Order THEN
                                                                      SalesLine.SETFILTER("Quantity Shipped",'<>0')
                                                                    ELSE BEGIN
                                                                      SalesLine.SETRANGE("Sell-to Customer No.",xRec."Sell-to Customer No.");
                                                                      SalesLine.SETFILTER("Shipment No.",'<>%1','');
                                                                    END;
                                                                    IF SalesLine.FINDFIRST THEN
                                                                      IF "Document Type" = "Document Type"::Order THEN
                                                                        SalesLine.TESTFIELD("Quantity Shipped",0)
                                                                      ELSE
                                                                        SalesLine.TESTFIELD("Shipment No.",'');
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                    SalesLine.SETRANGE("Shipment No.");
                                                                    SalesLine.SETRANGE("Quantity Shipped");

                                                                    IF "Document Type" = "Document Type"::"Return Order" THEN
                                                                      SalesLine.SETFILTER("Return Qty. Received",'<>0')
                                                                    ELSE
                                                                      IF "Document Type" = "Document Type"::"Credit Memo" THEN BEGIN
                                                                        SalesLine.SETRANGE("Sell-to Customer No.",xRec."Sell-to Customer No.");
                                                                        SalesLine.SETFILTER("Return Receipt No.",'<>%1','');
                                                                      END;

                                                                    IF SalesLine.FINDFIRST THEN
                                                                      IF "Document Type" = "Document Type"::"Return Order" THEN
                                                                        SalesLine.TESTFIELD("Return Qty. Received",0)
                                                                      ELSE
                                                                        SalesLine.TESTFIELD("Return Receipt No.",'');
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                    SalesLine.RESET;
                                                                  END ELSE BEGIN
                                                                    Rec := xRec;
                                                                    EXIT;
                                                                  END;
                                                                END;

                                                                // Start INC
                                                                IF Cust2G.GET("Sell-to Customer No.") THEN
                                                                  "Customer Group Code" := Cust2G."Customer Group Code";
                                                                // Stop INC

                                                                IF ("Document Type" = "Document Type"::Order) AND
                                                                   (xRec."Sell-to Customer No." <> "Sell-to Customer No.")
                                                                THEN BEGIN
                                                                  SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type",SalesLine."Document Type"::Order);
                                                                  SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
                                                                  SalesLine.SETFILTER("Purch. Order Line No.",'<>0');
                                                                  IF NOT SalesLine.ISEMPTY THEN
                                                                    ERROR(
                                                                      Text006,
                                                                      FIELDCAPTION("Sell-to Customer No."));
                                                                  SalesLine.RESET;
                                                                END;

                                                                GetCust("Sell-to Customer No.");
                                                                // Start PA032441
                                                                // Start PA032651
                                                                Cust.CheckBlockedCustOnDocs(Cust,"Document Type",FALSE,FALSE);
                                                                // Stop PA032651
                                                                // Stop PA032441
                                                                Cust.TESTFIELD("Gen. Bus. Posting Group");
                                                                // Start EU.0001175.8146
                                                                // Stop EU.0001175.8146
                                                                // Start EU.0039396
                                                                // Start EU.0139128.140026
                                                                IF (CurrFieldNo = FIELDNO("Sell-to Customer No.")) OR ChangeSellToFromReferenceVinG THEN
                                                                // Stop EU.0139128.140026
                                                                  IF "Sell-to Customer No." > '' THEN
                                                                    IF "Sell-to Customer No." <> xRec."Sell-to Customer No." THEN
                                                                      DataPrivManagementG.ShowAvailableDataPrivList(
                                                                        DataPrivSetupG."Check Modus"::CheckQuery,
                                                                        TRUE,
                                                                        DATABASE::Customer,
                                                                        "Sell-to Customer No.",
                                                                        TRUE);
                                                                // Stop EU.0039396
                                                                // All tests for a valid "Sell-to Customer No." must be done until here.
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                "Sell-to Salutation Code" := Cust."Address Salutation Code";
                                                                "Sell-to Customer Name" := Cust.Name;
                                                                IF (Cust."Title Code" <> '') AND (TitleG.GET(Cust."Title Code")) THEN BEGIN
                                                                  TitleNameG := TitleG.Description + ' ' + Cust.Name;
                                                                  IF STRLEN(TitleNameG) <= MAXSTRLEN("Sell-to Customer Name") THEN
                                                                    "Sell-to Customer Name" := TitleNameG;
                                                                END;
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                "Sell-to Customer Name 2" := Cust."Name 2";
                                                                "Sell-to Address" := Cust.Address;
                                                                "Sell-to Address 2" := Cust."Address 2";
                                                                "Sell-to City" := Cust.City;
                                                                "Sell-to Post Code" := Cust."Post Code";
                                                                "Sell-to County" := Cust.County;
                                                                "Sell-to Country Code" := Cust."Country/Region Code";
                                                                // Start PA038224
                                                                "Message Notification" := Cust."Message Notification";
                                                                // Start EU.0121768.124881
                                                                CASE "Order Type" OF
                                                                  "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases":
                                                                    SelectedMultipleChannelL.DeleteMessageChannels("No.", "Document Type", SelectedMultipleChannelL.Area::"Vehicle Sales");
                                                                  "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases":
                                                                    SelectedMultipleChannelL.DeleteMessageChannels("No.", "Document Type", SelectedMultipleChannelL.Area::"Parts Sales");
                                                                // Start EU.0200720.202594
                                                                  "Order Type"::Service:
                                                                    SelectedMultipleChannelL.DeleteMessageChannels("No.", "Document Type", SelectedMultipleChannelL.Area::Service);
                                                                // Start EU.0200720.202594
                                                                END;
                                                                // Start EU.0121768.124881
                                                                // Start EU.0122714.123625
                                                                GetSelectedMsgNotif();
                                                                // Stop EU.0122714.123625
                                                                // Start PA038224.47832
                                                                "Messaging App Type" := Cust."Message Notification App Type";
                                                                // Stop PA038224.47832
                                                                "Message Type" := Cust."Message Type";
                                                                // Stop PA038224

                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(Cust);
                                                                SalesHeaderExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::"Inside 1",FIELDNAME("Sell-to Customer No."));
                                                                // Stop PA036544

                                                                // Start INC
                                                                "Sell-to Contact" := '';
                                                                IF (Cust."Letter Salutation Code" <> '') AND (LetterSalutationG.GET(Cust."Letter Salutation Code")) THEN
                                                                  IF LetterSalutationG."Document Salutation Link" THEN
                                                                    "Sell-to Contact" := Cust.Contact;
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                // Start PA045214
                                                                // Stop PA045214
                                                                "Tax Area Code" := Cust."Tax Area Code";
                                                                "Tax Liable" := Cust."Tax Liable";
                                                                // Start EU.0169755.170127
                                                                // Stop EU.0169755.170127

                                                                // Start PA033019.8452848
                                                                // Stop PA033019.8452848

                                                                // Start PA043093
                                                                "Sell-to IC Partner Code" := Cust."IC Partner Code";
                                                                "Send IC Document" := ("Sell-to IC Partner Code" <> '') AND ("IC Direction" = "IC Direction"::Outgoing);
                                                                // Stop PA043093


                                                                // Start EU.0101759.101608
                                                                VALIDATE("Tour Code",Cust."Tour Code");
                                                                VALIDATE("Ship-to Code",'');
                                                                // Stop EU.0101759.101608
                                                                IF Cust."Bill-to Customer No." <> '' THEN
                                                                  VALIDATE("Bill-to Customer No.",Cust."Bill-to Customer No.")
                                                                ELSE
                                                                  VALIDATE("Bill-to Customer No.","Sell-to Customer No.");
                                                                // Start EU.0101759.101608
                                                                // Stop EU.0101759.101608

                                                                // Start INC
                                                                IF IsImporter THEN BEGIN
                                                                  ShipToAddr.RESET;
                                                                  ShipToAddr.SETRANGE("Customer No.","Sell-to Customer No.");
                                                                  ShipToAddr.SETRANGE(Default,TRUE);
                                                                  IF ShipToAddr.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
                                                                    VALIDATE("Ship-to Code",ShipToAddr.Code);
                                                                    VALIDATE("Shipment Method Code",ShipToAddr."Shipment Method Code");
                                                                  END;
                                                                END;
                                                                "Show Discount" := Cust."Show Discount";
                                                                IF NOT ("Order Type" IN ["Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases","Order Type"::Service]) THEN
                                                                  "Inv. Discount %" := Cust."Inv. Discount %";
                                                                "Transfer Method" := Cust."Transfer Method";
                                                                // Start PA032441.4575857
                                                                // Stop PA032441.4575857
                                                                "Disable for Requisition" := Cust."Disable for Requisition";
                                                                LicPermissionG.GET(LicPermissionG."Object Type"::Table,DATABASE::Contact);
                                                                IF LicPermissionG."Modify Permission" = LicPermissionG."Modify Permission"::Yes THEN
                                                                  IF Cust."Address No." <> 0 THEN BEGIN
                                                                    Prospect.RESET;
                                                                    Prospect.SETCURRENTKEY("Address No.");
                                                                    Prospect.SETRANGE("Address No.",Cust."Address No.");
                                                                    Prospect.SETRANGE("Customer No.",Cust."No.");
                                                                    Prospect.SETRANGE(Type, Prospect.Type::Company);
                                                                // Start PA032519
                                                                // Stop PA032519
                                                                  END;
                                                                IF (xRec."Sell-to Customer No." <> "Sell-to Customer No.") OR
                                                                   (xRec."Currency Code" <> "Currency Code") OR
                                                                   (xRec."Gen. Bus. Posting Group" <> "Gen. Bus. Posting Group") OR
                                                                   (xRec."VAT Bus. Posting Group" <> "VAT Bus. Posting Group")
                                                                THEN
                                                                  RecreateSalesLines(FIELDCAPTION("Sell-to Customer No."));
                                                                IF "Sell-to Customer No." <> xRec."Sell-to Customer No." THEN
                                                                  AutomSalesTextG.SalesHeaderAutomText(Rec,0);  //0 = Header and Footer
                                                                IF NOT SkipSellToContactG THEN
                                                                  UpdateSellToCont("Sell-to Customer No.");
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                // Start EU.0039396
                                                                // Stop EU.0039396

                                                                // Start PA032225
                                                                ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,FIELDNAME("Sell-to Customer No."));
                                                                // Stop PA032225
                                                              END;

                                                   ValidateTableRelation=No;
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Sell-to Customer No.;
                                                   Description=INC }
    { 3   ;   ;No.                 ;Code20        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA032225
                                                                IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,FIELDNAME("No.")) THEN
                                                                  EXIT;
                                                                // Stop PA032225

                                                                // Start PA039250
                                                                // Stop PA039250
                                                                IF "No." <> xRec."No." THEN BEGIN
                                                                  SalesSetup.GET;
                                                                  ServSetupG.GET;
                                                                  NoSeriesMgt.TestManual(GetNoSeriesCode);
                                                                  "No. Series" := '';
                                                                END;

                                                                // Start PA032225
                                                                ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,FIELDNAME("No."));
                                                                // Stop PA032225
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=No. }
    { 4   ;   ;Bill-to Customer No.;Code20        ;TableRelation=Customer;
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,FIELDNAME("Bill-to Customer No.")) THEN
                                                                  EXIT;
                                                                // Stop PA036544

                                                                // Start INC
                                                                CustomerSelection("Bill-to Customer No.");
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                IF (xRec."Bill-to Customer No." <> "Bill-to Customer No.") AND
                                                                   (xRec."Bill-to Customer No." <> '')
                                                                THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                // Start PA033343
                                                                  IF HideValidationDialog OR NOT GUIALLOWED THEN
                                                                // Stop PA033343
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                    Confirmed := TRUE
                                                                // Start PA041187.91179
                                                                  ELSE BEGIN
                                                                    IF SalesLinesExist THEN
                                                                      Confirmed := CONFIRM(Text015 + Text004,FALSE,FIELDCAPTION("Bill-to Customer No."))
                                                                    ELSE
                                                                      Confirmed := CONFIRM(Text004,FALSE,FIELDCAPTION("Bill-to Customer No."));
                                                                  END;
                                                                // Stop PA041187.91179
                                                                  IF Confirmed THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                    ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                    SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
                                                                    SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
                                                                    IF "Document Type" = "Document Type"::Order THEN
                                                                      SalesLine.SETFILTER("Quantity Shipped",'<>0')
                                                                    ELSE
                                                                      SalesLine.SETFILTER("Shipment No.",'<>%1','');

                                                                    IF SalesLine.FINDFIRST THEN
                                                                      IF "Document Type" = "Document Type"::Order THEN
                                                                        SalesLine.TESTFIELD("Quantity Shipped",0)
                                                                      ELSE
                                                                        SalesLine.TESTFIELD("Shipment No.",'');
                                                                    SalesLine.RESET;
                                                                  END ELSE BEGIN
                                                                    "Bill-to Customer No." := xRec."Bill-to Customer No.";
                                                                    EXIT;
                                                                  END;
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                  CheckWarrantyMake();
                                                                END;

                                                                GetCust("Bill-to Customer No.");
                                                                // Start PA032441
                                                                // Start PA032651
                                                                Cust.CheckBlockedCustOnDocs(Cust,"Document Type",FALSE,FALSE);
                                                                // Stop PA032651
                                                                // Stop PA032441
                                                                Cust.TESTFIELD("Customer Posting Group");
                                                                // Start EU.0039396
                                                                IF CurrFieldNo = FIELDNO("Bill-to Customer No.") THEN
                                                                  IF "Bill-to Customer No." <> '' THEN
                                                                    IF "Bill-to Customer No." <> xRec."Bill-to Customer No." THEN
                                                                      DataPrivManagementG.ShowAvailableDataPrivList(
                                                                        DataPrivSetupG."Check Modus"::CheckQuery,
                                                                        TRUE,
                                                                        DATABASE::Customer,
                                                                        "Bill-to Customer No.",
                                                                        TRUE);
                                                                // Stop EU.0039396
                                                                // All tests for a valid "Bill-to Customer No." must be done until here.
                                                                IF NOT ("Order Type" IN ["Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases","Order Type"::Service]) THEN
                                                                  "Inv. Discount %" := Cust."Inv. Discount %";
                                                                "Proposal for Alternative Part" := Cust."Proposal for Alternative Part";
                                                                SetServPostNoSeries;
                                                                // Stop INC

                                                                IF (CurrFieldNo <> 0) AND ("Document Type" <= "Document Type"::Invoice) THEN BEGIN
                                                                  "Amount Including VAT" := 0;
                                                                  CASE "Document Type" OF
                                                                    "Document Type"::Quote,"Document Type"::Invoice:
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                      // Do not perform a default credit limit check - will be processed using comment texts
                                                                      ;
                                                                    "Document Type"::Order:
                                                                      BEGIN
                                                                        IF "Bill-to Customer No." <> xRec."Bill-to Customer No." THEN BEGIN
                                                                          SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type",SalesLine."Document Type"::Order);
                                                                          SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
                                                                          SalesLine.CALCSUMS("Outstanding Amount","Shipped Not Invoiced");
                                                                          "Amount Including VAT" := SalesLine."Outstanding Amount" + SalesLine."Shipped Not Invoiced";
                                                                        END;
                                                                      END;
                                                                  END;
                                                                  CALCFIELDS("Amount Including VAT");
                                                                END;

                                                                "Bill-to Salutation Code" := Cust."Address Salutation Code";
                                                                "Bill-to Name" := Cust.Name;
                                                                IF (Cust."Title Code" <> '') AND (TitleG.GET(Cust."Title Code")) THEN BEGIN
                                                                  TitleNameG := TitleG.Description + ' ' + Cust.Name;
                                                                  IF STRLEN(TitleNameG) <= MAXSTRLEN("Bill-to Name") THEN
                                                                    "Bill-to Name" := TitleNameG;
                                                                END;
                                                                "Bill-to Name 2" := Cust."Name 2";
                                                                "Bill-to Address" := Cust.Address;
                                                                "Bill-to Address 2" := Cust."Address 2";
                                                                "Bill-to City" := Cust.City;
                                                                "Bill-to Post Code" := Cust."Post Code";
                                                                "Bill-to County" := Cust.County;
                                                                "Bill-to Country Code" := Cust."Country/Region Code";

                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(Cust);
                                                                SalesHeaderExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::"Inside 1",FIELDNAME("Bill-to Customer No."));
                                                                // Stop PA036544

                                                                "Bill-to Contact" := '';
                                                                IF (Cust."Letter Salutation Code" <> '') AND (LetterSalutationG.GET(Cust."Letter Salutation Code")) THEN
                                                                  IF LetterSalutationG."Document Salutation Link" THEN
                                                                    "Bill-to Contact" := Cust.Contact;
                                                                "Payment Terms Code" := Cust."Payment Terms Code";
                                                                // Start EU.0104306
                                                                "VAT Calculation Logic" := Cust."VAT Calculation Logic";
                                                                // Stop EU.0104306
                                                                // Start PA033695
                                                                IF "Document Type" = "Document Type"::"Credit Memo" THEN BEGIN
                                                                  "Payment Method Code" := '';
                                                                  IF PaymentTerms.GET("Payment Terms Code") THEN
                                                                    IF PaymentTerms."Calc. Pmt. Disc. on Cr. Memos" THEN
                                                                      "Payment Method Code" := Cust."Payment Method Code"
                                                                END ELSE
                                                                  "Payment Method Code" := Cust."Payment Method Code";
                                                                // Stop PA033695
                                                                "Shortcut Dimension 1 Code" := Cust."Global Dimension 1 Code";
                                                                "Customer Posting Group" := Cust."Customer Posting Group";
                                                                // Start EU.0142312
                                                                VALIDATE("Currency Code", Cust."Currency Code");
                                                                // Stop EU.0142312
                                                                "Price Group Code" := Cust."Customer Price Group";
                                                                "Prices Including VAT" := Cust."Prices Including VAT";
                                                                // Start PA032441
                                                                // Stop PA032441
                                                                "Invoice Disc. Code" := Cust."Invoice Disc. Code";
                                                                "Cust./Item Disc. Gr." := Cust."Customer Disc. Group";
                                                                "Language Code" := Cust."Language Code";

                                                                IF IsImporter THEN BEGIN
                                                                  IF IMMDealerMgmtG.GetDealer = '' THEN
                                                                // Start PA042783.88142
                                                                    "Salesperson Code" := CollectionUnitG.GetSalesPurchaserCode(Cust."Salesperson Code");
                                                                END ELSE BEGIN
                                                                  "Salesperson Code" := CollectionUnitG.GetSalesPurchaserCode(Cust."Salesperson Code");
                                                                // Stop PA042783.88142
                                                                END;
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                // Start PA036157
                                                                IF ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases") AND ("Salesperson Code" <> '') THEN
                                                                  IF UserSetupG.GET(USERID) AND UserSetupG."Parts Generic User" THEN
                                                                    "Salesperson Code" := '';
                                                                // Stop PA036157

                                                                // Start PA037938.51460
                                                                // Stop PA037938.51460
                                                                "Combine Shipments" := Cust."Combine Shipments";
                                                                Reserve := Cust.Reserve;
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                "VAT Registration No." := Cust."VAT Registration No.";
                                                                "Item Sales Price Group" := Cust."Item Sales Price Group";
                                                                "Vehicle Sales Price Group" := Cust."Vehicle Sales Price Group";
                                                                "Option Sales Price Group" := Cust."Option Sales Price Group";
                                                                VALIDATE("Use Inventory Buffer Quantity");
                                                                VALIDATE("Gen. Bus. Posting Group",Cust."Gen. Bus. Posting Group");
                                                                // Start PA032441
                                                                GLSetup.GET;
                                                                IF GLSetup."Bill-to/Sell-to VAT Calc." = GLSetup."Bill-to/Sell-to VAT Calc."::"Bill-to/Pay-to No." THEN
                                                                // Stop PA032441
                                                                  IF Cust."VAT Bus. Posting Group" <> "VAT Bus. Posting Group" THEN
                                                                    VALIDATE("VAT Bus. Posting Group",Cust."VAT Bus. Posting Group");
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                // Start EU.0191766
                                                                InitDefaultDim();
                                                                // Stop EU.0191766
                                                                // Stop PA041187.91230
                                                                VALIDATE("Payment Terms Code");
                                                                VALIDATE("Payment Method Code");
                                                                VALIDATE("Currency Code");

                                                                IF (xRec."Sell-to Customer No." = "Sell-to Customer No.") AND
                                                                   (xRec."Bill-to Customer No." <> "Bill-to Customer No.")
                                                                // Start PA038648.49334
                                                                THEN BEGIN
                                                                  AutomSalesTextG.SalesHeaderAutomText(Rec,0);  //0 = Header and Footer
                                                                  RecreateSalesLines(FIELDCAPTION("Bill-to Customer No."));
                                                                END;
                                                                // Stop PA038648.49334
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                IF NOT SkipBillToContactG THEN
                                                                  UpdateBillToCont("Bill-to Customer No.");
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                // Start PA032441.4575857
                                                                // Stop PA032441.4575857
                                                                // Start PA032519
                                                                // Start EU.0039396
                                                                // Stop EU.0039396
                                                                // Stop PA032519
                                                                // Start PA034291.I002270
                                                                PrepmtMgtG.ChangeCustNoCheckPrepmt(Rec,xRec);
                                                                // Stop PA034291.I002270

                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,FIELDNAME("Bill-to Customer No."));
                                                                // Stop PA036544

                                                                // Start PA043093
                                                                "Bill-to IC Partner Code" := Cust."IC Partner Code";
                                                                "Send IC Document" := ("Bill-to IC Partner Code" <> '') AND ("IC Direction" = "IC Direction"::Outgoing);
                                                                // Stop PA043093
                                                                // Start EU.0061590
                                                                IF "Bill-to Customer No." <> '' THEN
                                                                  GetCust("Bill-to Customer No.");
                                                                "VAT Country Code" := Cust."Country/Region Code";
                                                                // Stop EU.0061590
                                                              END;

                                                   ValidateTableRelation=No;
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Bill-to Customer No.;
                                                   NotBlank=Yes;
                                                   Description=INC }
    { 5   ;   ;Bill-to Name        ;Text50        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Bill-to Name;
                                                   Description=PA032438 }
    { 6   ;   ;Bill-to Name 2      ;Text50        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Bill-to Name 2;
                                                   Description=PA032438 }
    { 7   ;   ;Bill-to Address     ;Text50        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Bill-to Address;
                                                   Description=PA032438 }
    { 8   ;   ;Bill-to Address 2   ;Text50        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Bill-to Address 2;
                                                   Description=PA032438 }
    { 9   ;   ;Bill-to City        ;Text30        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,FIELDNAME("Bill-to City")) THEN
                                                                  EXIT;
                                                                // Stop PA036544

                                                                // Start INC
                                                                // Start PA033005
                                                                // Start PA035901
                                                                PostCode.ValidateCity("Bill-to City", "Bill-to Post Code", "Bill-to County", "Bill-to Country Code", (CurrFieldNo <> 0) AND GUIALLOWED);
                                                                // Stop PA035901
                                                                // Stop PA033005
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);

                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,FIELDNAME("Bill-to City"));
                                                                // Stop PA036544
                                                              END;

                                                   OnLookup=BEGIN
                                                              // Start PA036544
                                                              IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnLookup,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,FIELDNAME("Bill-to City")) THEN
                                                                EXIT;
                                                              // Stop PA036544

                                                              // Start INC
                                                              // Start PA033005
                                                              // Start PA035901
                                                              PostCode.LookUpCity("Bill-to City", "Bill-to Post Code", "Bill-to County", "Bill-to Country Code", TRUE);
                                                              // Stop PA035901
                                                              // Stop PA033005
                                                              // Stop INC
                                                              // Start PA039250
                                                              ApplyStatusFunction(FALSE);
                                                              // Stop PA039250

                                                              // Start PA036544
                                                              ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnLookup,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,FIELDNAME("Bill-to City"));
                                                              // Stop PA036544
                                                            END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Bill-to City }
    { 10  ;   ;Bill-to Contact     ;Text50        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Bill-to Contact;
                                                   Description=PA032438 }
    { 11  ;   ;Your Reference      ;Text35        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                // Start EU.0000048.6925
                                                                IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases" THEN
                                                                  IF "Your Reference" > '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                    SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
                                                                    SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.", "No.");
                                                                    SalesLine.SETFILTER("Your Reference Line No.", '<>0');
                                                                    IF SalesLine.ISEMPTY THEN BEGIN
                                                                      SalesLine.SETRANGE("Your Reference Line No.");
                                                                      IF SalesLine.FINDSET(TRUE) THEN
                                                                        REPEAT
                                                                // Start EU.0007737.7677
                                                                          IF SalesLine."Your Reference" = '' THEN
                                                                            SalesLine."Your Reference" := "Your Reference";
                                                                // Stop EU.0007737.7677
                                                                          SalesLine."Your Reference Line No." := SalesLine."Line No.";
                                                                          SalesLine.MODIFY;
                                                                        UNTIL SalesLine.NEXT = 0;
                                                                    END;
                                                                  END;
                                                                // Stop EU.0000048.6925
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Customer Order No.;
                                                   Description=PA035597,AP2308 }
    { 12  ;   ;Ship-to Code        ;Code10        ;TableRelation="Ship-to Address".Code WHERE (Customer No.=FIELD(Sell-to Customer No.));
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                IF ("Document Type" = "Document Type"::Order) AND
                                                                   (xRec."Ship-to Code" <> "Ship-to Code")
                                                                THEN BEGIN
                                                                  SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type",SalesLine."Document Type"::Order);
                                                                  SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
                                                                  SalesLine.SETFILTER("Purch. Order Line No.",'<>0');
                                                                  IF NOT SalesLine.ISEMPTY THEN
                                                                    ERROR(
                                                                      Text006,
                                                                      FIELDCAPTION("Ship-to Code"));
                                                                  SalesLine.RESET;
                                                                END;

                                                                IF "Ship-to Code" <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                  ShipToAddr.GET("Sell-to Customer No.","Ship-to Code");
                                                                // Start EU.0056707
                                                                  IF ShipToAddr."Tour Code" > '' THEN
                                                                    VALIDATE("Tour Code",ShipToAddr."Tour Code");
                                                                // Stop EU.0056707
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                  "Ship-to Addr. Salutation Code" := ShipToAddr."Address Salutation Code";
                                                                  "Ship-to Name" := ShipToAddr.Name;
                                                                  IF (ShipToAddr."Title Code" <> '') AND (TitleG.GET(ShipToAddr."Title Code")) THEN BEGIN
                                                                    TitleNameG := TitleG.Description + ' ' + ShipToAddr.Name;
                                                                    IF STRLEN(TitleNameG) <= MAXSTRLEN("Ship-to Name") THEN
                                                                      "Ship-to Name" := TitleNameG;
                                                                  END;
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                  "Ship-to Name 2" := ShipToAddr."Name 2";
                                                                  "Ship-to Address" := ShipToAddr.Address;
                                                                  "Ship-to Address 2" := ShipToAddr."Address 2";
                                                                  "Ship-to City" := ShipToAddr.City;
                                                                  "Ship-to Post Code" := ShipToAddr."Post Code";
                                                                  "Ship-to County" := ShipToAddr.County;
