                                                                  "Ship-to Country Code" := ShipToAddr."Country Code";
                                                                // Start INC

                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                  EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(ShipToAddr);
                                                                  SalesHeaderExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::"Inside 1",FIELDNAME("Ship-to Code"));
                                                                // Stop PA036544

                                                                  "Ship-to Contact" := '';
                                                                  IF (ShipToAddr."Letter Salutation Code" <> '') AND (LetterSalutationG.GET(ShipToAddr."Letter Salutation Code")) THEN
                                                                    IF LetterSalutationG."Document Salutation Link" THEN
                                                                      "Ship-to Contact" := ShipToAddr.Contact;
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                  "Shipment Method Code" := ShipToAddr."Shipment Method Code";
                                                                  "VAT Country Code" := ShipToAddr."Country Code";
                                                                  "Shipping Agent Code" := ShipToAddr."Shipping Agent Code";
                                                                  IF ShipToAddr."Tax Area Code" <> '' THEN
                                                                    "Tax Area Code" := ShipToAddr."Tax Area Code";

                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                  EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(ShipToAddr);
                                                                  SalesHeaderExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::"Inside 2",FIELDNAME("Ship-to Code"));
                                                                // Stop PA036544

                                                                END ELSE BEGIN
                                                                  GetCust("Sell-to Customer No.");
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                  "Ship-to Addr. Salutation Code" := Cust."Address Salutation Code";
                                                                  "Ship-to Name" := Cust.Name;
                                                                  IF (Cust."Title Code" <> '') AND (TitleG.GET(Cust."Title Code")) THEN BEGIN
                                                                    TitleNameG := TitleG.Description + ' ' + Cust.Name;
                                                                    IF STRLEN(TitleNameG) <= MAXSTRLEN("Ship-to Name") THEN
                                                                      "Ship-to Name" := TitleNameG;
                                                                  END;
                                                                // Start EU.0056707
                                                                  IF "Tour Code" <> Cust."Tour Code" THEN
                                                                    VALIDATE("Tour Code",Cust."Tour Code");
                                                                // Stop EU.0056707
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                  "Ship-to Name 2" := Cust."Name 2";
                                                                  "Ship-to Address" := Cust.Address;
                                                                  "Ship-to Address 2" := Cust."Address 2";
                                                                  "Ship-to City" := Cust.City;
                                                                  "Ship-to Post Code" := Cust."Post Code";
                                                                  "Ship-to County" := Cust.County;
                                                                  "Ship-to Country Code" := Cust."Country/Region Code";
                                                                // Start INC

                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                  EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(Cust);
                                                                  SalesHeaderExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::"Inside 3",FIELDNAME("Ship-to Code"));
                                                                // Stop PA036544

                                                                  "Ship-to Contact" := '';
                                                                  IF (Cust."Letter Salutation Code" <> '') AND (LetterSalutationG.GET(Cust."Letter Salutation Code")) THEN
                                                                    IF LetterSalutationG."Document Salutation Link" THEN
                                                                      "Ship-to Contact" := Cust.Contact;
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                  "Shipment Method Code" := Cust."Shipment Method Code";
                                                                  "VAT Country Code" := Cust."Country/Region Code";
                                                                  "Shipping Agent Code" := Cust."Shipping Agent Code";

                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                  EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(Cust);
                                                                  SalesHeaderExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::"Inside 4",FIELDNAME("Ship-to Code"));
                                                                // Stop PA036544
                                                                // Start EU.0139128.140026
                                                                // Stop EU.0139128.140026
                                                                END;

                                                                IF (xRec."Sell-to Customer No." = "Sell-to Customer No.") AND
                                                                   (xRec."Ship-to Code" <> "Ship-to Code")
                                                                THEN
                                                                  IF (xRec."VAT Country Code" <> "VAT Country Code") OR
                                                                     (xRec."Tax Area Code" <> "Tax Area Code")
                                                                  THEN
                                                                    RecreateSalesLines(FIELDCAPTION("Ship-to Code"))
                                                                  ELSE
                                                                    IF xRec."Location Code" <> "Location Code" THEN
                                                                      MessageIfSalesLinesExist(FIELDCAPTION("Location Code"));
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Ship-to Code }
    { 13  ;   ;Ship-to Name        ;Text50        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Ship-to Name;
                                                   Description=PA032438 }
    { 14  ;   ;Ship-to Name 2      ;Text50        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Ship-to Name 2;
                                                   Description=PA032438 }
    { 15  ;   ;Ship-to Address     ;Text50        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Ship-to Address;
                                                   Description=PA032438 }
    { 16  ;   ;Ship-to Address 2   ;Text50        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Ship-to Address 2;
                                                   Description=PA032438 }
    { 17  ;   ;Ship-to City        ;Text30        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,FIELDNAME("Ship-to City")) THEN
                                                                  EXIT;
                                                                // Stop PA036544

                                                                // Start INC
                                                                // Start PA033005
                                                                // Start PA035901
                                                                PostCode.ValidateCity("Ship-to City", "Ship-to Post Code", "Ship-to County", "Ship-to Country Code", (CurrFieldNo <> 0) AND GUIALLOWED);
                                                                // Stop PA035901
                                                                // Stop PA033005
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC

                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,FIELDNAME("Ship-to City"));
                                                                // Stop PA036544
                                                              END;

                                                   OnLookup=BEGIN
                                                              // Start PA036544
                                                              IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnLookup,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,FIELDNAME("Ship-to City")) THEN
                                                                EXIT;
                                                              // Stop PA036544

                                                              // Start PA033005
                                                              // Start PA035901
                                                              PostCode.LookUpCity("Ship-to City", "Ship-to Post Code", "Ship-to County", "Ship-to Country Code", TRUE);
                                                              // Stop PA035901
                                                              // Stop PA033005

                                                              // Start PA039250
                                                              ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                              // Stop PA039250
                                                              // Start PA036544
                                                              ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnLookup,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,FIELDNAME("Ship-to City"));
                                                              // Stop PA036544
                                                            END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Ship-to City }
    { 18  ;   ;Ship-to Contact     ;Text50        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Ship-to Contact;
                                                   Description=PA032438 }
    { 19  ;   ;Order Date          ;Date          ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                IF IsImporter THEN
                                                                  IMMDealerMgmtG.CheckDealerMaxPartsOrders(Rec);
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                // Start PA033985.19213
                                                                IF ("Order Date" <> xRec."Order Date") AND ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases") THEN
                                                                  UpdateSalesIncentivesInLines(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA033985.19213
                                                                IF "Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::Quote,"Document Type"::Order] THEN
                                                                  PriceMessageIfSalesLinesExist(FIELDCAPTION("Order Date"));
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Order Date }
    { 20  ;   ;Posting Date        ;Date          ;OnValidate=VAR
                                                                __INCADEA__@125883 : Integer;
                                                                ExCurrFieldNoL@125884 : Integer;
                                                              BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                // Start PA045124
                                                                // Start EU.0012448.13245
                                                                IF "Service Order No." = '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Stop EU.0012448.13245
                                                                // Start PA034523.I002266
                                                                  IF ("Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::Invoice,"Document Type"::"Credit Memo"]) AND
                                                                     NOT ("Posting Date" = xRec."Posting Date")
                                                                  THEN
                                                                // Stop PA034523.I002266
                                                                    PriceMessageIfSalesLinesExist(FIELDCAPTION("Posting Date"));
                                                                  IF "Currency Code" <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                    UpdateCurrencyFactor;
                                                                    IF "Currency Factor" <> xRec."Currency Factor" THEN
                                                                      ConfirmUpdateCurrencyFactor;
                                                                  END;
                                                                END;
                                                                // Stop PA045124
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                // Start EU.0135165.136993
                                                                // Start EU.0138596
                                                                ExCurrFieldNoL := CurrFieldNo;
                                                                // Stop EU.0138596
                                                                IF CurrFieldNo = 0 THEN
                                                                  CurrFieldNo := FIELDNO("Posting Date");
                                                                // Stop EU.0135165.136993
                                                                VALIDATE("Document Date", "Posting Date");
                                                                // Start EU.0138596
                                                                CurrFieldNo := ExCurrFieldNoL;
                                                                // Stop EU.0138596
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                // Start PA033985.19213
                                                                IF ("Posting Date" <> xRec."Posting Date") AND ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases") THEN
                                                                  UpdateSalesIncentivesInLines(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA033985.19213
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Posting Date }
    { 21  ;   ;Shipment Date       ;Date          ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                UpdateSalesLines(FIELDNAME("Shipment Date"));
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Shipment Date }
    { 22  ;   ;Posting Description ;Text50        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Posting Description }
    { 23  ;   ;Payment Terms Code  ;Code10        ;TableRelation="Payment Terms";
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,FIELDNAME("Payment Terms Code")) THEN
                                                                  EXIT;
                                                                // Stop PA036544

                                                                // Start INC
                                                                IF CurrFieldNo = FIELDNO("Payment Terms Code") THEN
                                                                  ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                // Start PA033695
                                                                IF ("Payment Terms Code" <> '') AND ("Document Date" <> 0D) THEN BEGIN
                                                                  PaymentTerms.GET("Payment Terms Code");
                                                                  IF (("Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Return Order","Document Type"::"Credit Memo"]) AND
                                                                      NOT PaymentTerms."Calc. Pmt. Disc. on Cr. Memos")
                                                                  THEN BEGIN
                                                                    VALIDATE("Due Date","Document Date");
                                                                    VALIDATE("Pmt. Discount Date",0D);
                                                                    VALIDATE("Payment Discount %",0);
                                                                  END ELSE BEGIN
                                                                    "Due Date" := CALCDATE(PaymentTerms."Due Date Calculation","Document Date");
                                                                    "Pmt. Discount Date" := CALCDATE(PaymentTerms."Discount Date Calculation","Document Date");
                                                                // Start PA041810
                                                                    IF (xRec."Document Date" <> "Document Date") OR (xRec."Payment Terms Code" <> "Payment Terms Code") THEN
                                                                // Stop PA041810
                                                                      VALIDATE("Payment Discount %",PaymentTerms."Discount %")
                                                                  END;
                                                                END ELSE BEGIN
                                                                  VALIDATE("Due Date","Document Date");
                                                                // Start PA040916
                                                                  IF xRec."Document Date" <> "Document Date" THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Stop PA040916
                                                                    VALIDATE("Pmt. Discount Date",0D);
                                                                    VALIDATE("Payment Discount %",0);
                                                                  END;
                                                                END;
                                                                // Stop PA033695

                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,FIELDNAME("Payment Terms Code"));
                                                                // Stop PA036544
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Payment Terms Code }
    { 24  ;   ;Due Date            ;Date          ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Due Date;
                                                   Editable=No }
    { 25  ;   ;Payment Discount %  ;Decimal       ;OnValidate=VAR
                                                                SalesLineL@1109400000 : Record 37;
                                                              BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                GLSetup.GET;
                                                                IF ("Payment Discount %" <> 0) AND ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases") THEN BEGIN
                                                                  SalesLineL.RESET;
                                                                  SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
                                                                  SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.", "No.");
                                                                  SalesLineL.SETRANGE("VAT Calculation Type", SalesLineL."VAT Calculation Type"::"Differential Tax");
                                                                  IF SalesLineL.FINDFIRST THEN
                                                                    ERROR(C_INC017);
                                                                END;
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                IF "Payment Discount %" < GLSetup."VAT Tolerance %" THEN
                                                                  "VAT Base Discount %" := "Payment Discount %"
                                                                ELSE
                                                                  "VAT Base Discount %" := GLSetup."VAT Tolerance %";
                                                                VALIDATE("VAT Base Discount %");
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Payment Discount %;
                                                   DecimalPlaces=0:5;
                                                   Editable=No }
    { 26  ;   ;Pmt. Discount Date  ;Date          ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Pmt. Discount Date;
                                                   Editable=No }
    { 27  ;   ;Shipment Method Code;Code10        ;TableRelation="Shipment Method";
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Shipment Method Code }
    { 28  ;   ;Location Code       ;Code10        ;TableRelation=Location;
                                                   OnValidate=VAR
                                                                UserLocations@1109400000 : Record 5028664;
                                                              BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                IF "Location Code" = '' THEN
                                                                  ERROR(C_INC003,FIELDCAPTION("Location Code")); // Field %1 may not be blank

                                                                IF "Location Code" <> xRec."Location Code" THEN BEGIN

                                                                // Start PA037942.48654
                                                                  AutomSalesTextG.SalesHeaderAutomText(Rec,0);  //0 = Header and Footer
                                                                // Stop PA037942.48654
                                                                  SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
                                                                  SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
                                                                  SalesLine.SETRANGE(Type,SalesLine.Type::Item);
                                                                // Start PA045176
                                                                  IF NOT SalesLine.ISEMPTY THEN
                                                                // Stop PA045176
                                                                    ERROR(C_INC006,FIELDCAPTION("Location Code"),SalesLine.TABLECAPTION);
                                                                    // Field %1 may no longer be changed because there are already records in table %2.
                                                                  CLEAR(SalesLine);
                                                                  IF CurrFieldNo = FIELDNO("Location Code") THEN BEGIN
                                                                    UserLocations.SETRANGE("User ID",USERID);
                                                                // Start PA045176
                                                                    IF UserLocations.ISEMPTY THEN
                                                                // Stop PA045176
                                                                      ERROR(C_INC007,USERID);
                                                                    IF NOT UserLocations.GET(USERID,"Location Code") THEN
                                                                      ERROR(C_INC008,FIELDCAPTION("Location Code"),"Location Code",USERID);
                                                                    // The %1 %2 has not been assigned to user %3
                                                                  END;
                                                                END;
                                                                "Branch Code" := UserSessionG.GetBranchCode("Location Code");
                                                                // Stop INC

                                                                MessageIfSalesLinesExist(FIELDCAPTION("Location Code"));
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Location Code }
    { 29  ;   ;Shortcut Dimension 1 Code;Code20   ;TableRelation=Department;
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                UpdateSalesLines(FIELDNAME("Shortcut Dimension 1 Code"));
                                                                // Start PA035597
                                                                ValidateShortcutDimCode(1,"Shortcut Dimension 1 Code");
                                                                // Stop PA035597
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Shortcut Dimension 1 Code;
                                                   Description=PA035597;
                                                   CaptionClass='1,2,1' }
    { 30  ;   ;Shortcut Dimension 2 Code;Code20   ;TableRelation=Make;
                                                   OnValidate=VAR
                                                                CurrMake@1109400000 : Record 12;
                                                              BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,FIELDNAME("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code")) THEN
                                                                  EXIT;

                                                                IF IsImporter THEN
                                                                  IF "Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" <> '' THEN
                                                                    IF IMMDealerMgmtG.GetDealer <> '' THEN
                                                                      IF NOT IMMDealerMgmtG.CheckDealerMake("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code") THEN
                                                                        ERROR(C_IMS000,FIELDCAPTION("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code"),"Shortcut Dimension 2 Code");
                                                                IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases" THEN BEGIN
                                                                  IF CurrMake.GET(xRec."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code") THEN BEGIN
                                                                    IF ("Bill-to Customer No." = CurrMake."Factory Warranty Customer") AND
                                                                       (xRec."Bill-to Customer No." =CurrMake."Factory Warranty Customer")
                                                                    THEN
                                                                      ERROR(C_INC011,FIELDCAPTION("Bill-to Customer No."));
                                                                  END;
                                                                END;
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::"Inside 1",FIELDNAME("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code"));
                                                                UpdateSalesLines(FIELDNAME("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code"));
                                                                // Start PA035597
                                                                // Start PA041023.87224

                                                                // Start PA041187.91230
                                                                // Start PA041187.91230
                                                                // Start PA044353
                                                                ValidateShortcutDimCode(2,"Shortcut Dimension 2 Code");
                                                                IF "Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" <> xRec."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" THEN
                                                                  MessageIfSalesLinesExist(FIELDCAPTION("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code"));
                                                                // Stop PA044353
                                                                // Stop PA041023.87224
                                                                // Stop PA035597
                                                                // Start PA041510
                                                                UpdateReqWorksheetName();
                                                                // Stop PA041510
                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,FIELDNAME("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code"));
                                                                // Stop PA036544
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Shortcut Dimension 2 Code;
                                                   Description=PA035597;
                                                   CaptionClass='1,2,2' }
    { 31  ;   ;Customer Posting Group;Code10      ;TableRelation="Customer Posting Group";

    { 32  ;   ;Currency Code       ;Code10        ;TableRelation=Currency;
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                // Start PA033343
                                                                IF CurrFieldNo <> FIELDNO("Currency Code") THEN
                                                                // Stop PA033343
                                                                  UpdateCurrencyFactor
                                                                ELSE BEGIN
                                                                  IF "Currency Code" <> xRec."Currency Code" THEN BEGIN
                                                                    UpdateCurrencyFactor;
                                                                    RecreateSalesLines(FIELDCAPTION("Currency Code"));
                                                                  END ELSE
                                                                    IF "Currency Code" <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                      UpdateCurrencyFactor;
                                                                      IF "Currency Factor" <> xRec."Currency Factor" THEN
                                                                        ConfirmUpdateCurrencyFactor;
                                                                    END;
                                                                END;
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Currency Code }

                                                                // Start EU.0031568
                                                                // Start EU.0142312

                                                              END;

                                                                                                 No.=FIELD(No.),
                                                                                                 Document Line No.=CONST(0)));
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=On Hold }
    { 52  ;   ;Applies-to Doc. Type;Option        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                // Start PA039250
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(FALSE);
                                                                // Stop PA039250
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Applies-to Doc. Type;
                                                   OptionCaptionML=ENU=" ,Payment,Invoice,Credit Memo,Finance Charge Memo,Reminder";
                                                   OptionString=[ ,Payment,Invoice,Credit Memo,Finance Charge Memo,Reminder] }
    { 53  ;   ;Applies-to Doc. No. ;Code20        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                // Start PA039250
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(FALSE);
                                                                // Stop PA039250
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::Service THEN BEGIN
                                                                  IF "Applies-to Doc. Type" = "Applies-to Doc. Type"::Invoice THEN BEGIN
                                                                    IF InvHdrG.GET("Applies-to Doc. No.") THEN
                                                                // Start EU.0012448.13245
                                                                      "Service Order No." := InvHdrG."Service Order No.";
                                                                // Stop EU.0012448.13245
                                                                  END;
                                                                END;
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   OnLookup=BEGIN
                                                              CustLedgEntry.SETCURRENTKEY("Customer No.",Open,Positive,"Due Date");
                                                              CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Customer No.","Bill-to Customer No.");
                                                              CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE(Open,TRUE);
                                                              IF "Applies-to Doc. No." <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Document Type","Applies-to Doc. Type");
                                                                CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Document No.","Applies-to Doc. No.");
                                                                IF CustLedgEntry.FINDFIRST THEN;
                                                                CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Document Type");
                                                                CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Document No.");
                                                              END ELSE
                                                                IF "Applies-to Doc. Type" <> 0 THEN BEGIN
                                                                  CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Document Type","Applies-to Doc. Type");
                                                                  IF CustLedgEntry.FINDFIRST THEN;
                                                                  CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Document Type");
                                                                END ELSE
                                                                  IF Amount <> 0 THEN BEGIN
                                                                    CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE(Positive,Amount < 0);
                                                                    IF CustLedgEntry.FINDFIRST THEN;
                                                                    CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE(Positive);
                                                                  END;

                                                              ApplyCustEntries.SetSales(Rec,CustLedgEntry,SalesHeader.FIELDNO("Applies-to Doc. No."));
                                                              // Start EU.0126935.127476
                                                              COMMIT;
                                                              // Stop EU.0126935.127476
                                                              ApplyCustEntries.SETTABLEVIEW(CustLedgEntry);
                                                              ApplyCustEntries.SETRECORD(CustLedgEntry);
                                                              ApplyCustEntries.LOOKUPMODE(TRUE);
                                                              IF ApplyCustEntries.RUNMODAL = ACTION::LookupOK THEN BEGIN
                                                              // Start PA039250
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(FALSE);
                                                              // Stop PA039250
                                                                ApplyCustEntries.GetCustLedgEntry(CustLedgEntry);
                                                                GenJnlApply.CheckAgainstApplnCurrency(
                                                                  "Currency Code",CustLedgEntry."Currency Code",GenJnILine."Account Type"::Customer,TRUE);
                                                                "Applies-to Doc. Type" := CustLedgEntry."Document Type";
                                                                "Applies-to Doc. No." := CustLedgEntry."Document No.";
                                                              END;
                                                              CLEAR(ApplyCustEntries);
                                                            END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Applies-to Doc. No. }
    { 55  ;   ;Bal. Account No.    ;Code20        ;TableRelation=IF (Bal. Account Type=CONST(G/L Account)) "G/L Account"
                                                                 ELSE IF (Bal. Account Type=CONST(Bank Account)) "Bank Account";
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                IF "Bal. Account No." <> '' THEN
                                                                  CASE "Bal. Account Type" OF
                                                                    "Bal. Account Type"::"G/L Account":
                                                                      BEGIN
                                                                        GLAcc.GET("Bal. Account No.");
                                                                        GLAcc.CheckGLAcc;
                                                                        GLAcc.TESTFIELD("Direct Posting",TRUE);
                                                                      END;
                                                                    "Bal. Account Type"::"Bank Account":
                                                                      BEGIN
                                                                        BankAcc.GET("Bal. Account No.");
                                                                        BankAcc.TESTFIELD(Blocked,FALSE);
                                                                        BankAcc.TESTFIELD("Currency Code","Currency Code");
                                                                      END;
                                                                  END;
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Bal. Account No. }
    { 57  ;   ;Ship                ;Boolean       ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Ship }
    { 58  ;   ;Invoice             ;Boolean       ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Invoice }
    { 59  ;   ;Print Posted Documents;Boolean     ;CaptionML=ENU=Print Posted Documents;
                                                   Description=PA035901 }
    { 60  ;   ;Amount              ;Decimal       ;FieldClass=FlowField;
                                                   CalcFormula=Sum("Sales Line".Amount WHERE (Document Type=FIELD(Document Type),
                                                                                              Document No.=FIELD(No.),
                                                                                              Type=FILTER('Account (G/L)'..'Charge (Item)')));
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Amount;
                                                   Description=PA042968;
                                                   Editable=No;
                                                   AutoFormatType=1;
                                                   AutoFormatExpr="Currency Code" }
    { 61  ;   ;Amount Including VAT;Decimal       ;FieldClass=FlowField;
                                                   CalcFormula=Sum("Sales Line"."Amount Including VAT" WHERE (Document Type=FIELD(Document Type),
                                                                                                              Document No.=FIELD(No.),
                                                                                                              Type=FILTER('Account (G/L)'..'Charge (Item)')));
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Amount Including VAT;
                                                   Description=PA042968;
                                                   Editable=No;
                                                   AutoFormatType=1;
                                                   AutoFormatExpr="Currency Code" }
    { 62  ;   ;Shipping No.        ;Code20        ;OnValidate=BEGIN

                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Shipping No. }
    { 63  ;   ;Posting No.         ;Code20        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Posting No. }
    { 64  ;   ;Last Shipping No.   ;Code20        ;TableRelation="Sales Shipment Header";
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842

                                                                // Stop PA036842

    { 70  ;   ;VAT Registration No.;Text20        ;OnValidate=VAR
                                                                CustomerL@1119432000 : Record 18;
                                                              BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                // Start PA032462
                                                                // Start PA032651
                                                                CustomerL.VATRegNoCheckAndUpdate("Bill-to Customer No.","VAT Registration No.",FIELDCAPTION("Bill-to Customer No."));

    { 71  ;   ;Combine Shipments   ;Boolean       ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Combine Shipments }
    { 73  ;   ;Reason Code         ;Code10        ;TableRelation="Reason Code";
                                                   OnValidate=VAR
                                                                _INCADEA_@1101353001 : Boolean;
                                                                ReasonCodeL@1101353000 : Record 231;
                                                              BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                IF IsImporter THEN BEGIN
                                                                  IF (xRec."Reason Code" <> "Reason Code") AND ("Document Type" = "Document Type"::"Credit Memo") THEN BEGIN
                                                                    IF ReasonCodeL.GET("Reason Code") AND ReasonCodeL."Create Authorisation No." THEN BEGIN
                                                                      IF "Authorisation  No." = '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                        IMSSetupG.GET;
                                                                        IMSSetupG.TESTFIELD("Returns Auth. No. Series");
                                                                        "Authorisation  No." := NoSeriesMgt.GetNextNo(IMSSetupG."Returns Auth. No. Series",WORKDATE,TRUE);
                                                                      END;
                                                                    END ELSE BEGIN
                                                                      "Authorisation  No." := '';
                                                                    END;
                                                                  END;
                                                                END;
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Reason Code }
    { 74  ;   ;Gen. Bus. Posting Group;Code10     ;TableRelation="Gen. Business Posting Group";
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                IF xRec."Gen. Bus. Posting Group" <> "Gen. Bus. Posting Group" THEN
                                                                  IF GenBusPostingGrp.ValidateVatBusPostingGroup(GenBusPostingGrp,"Gen. Bus. Posting Group") THEN BEGIN
                                                                    "VAT Bus. Posting Group" := GenBusPostingGrp."Def. VAT Bus. Posting Group";
                                                                    RecreateSalesLines(FIELDCAPTION("Gen. Bus. Posting Group"));
                                                                  END;
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Gen. Bus. Posting Group }

                                                                  EXIT;

                                                                // Start PA033005
                                                                // Start PA035901
                                                                PostCode.ValidateCity("Sell-to City", "Sell-to Post Code", "Sell-to County", "Sell-to Country Code", (CurrFieldNo <> 0) AND GUIALLOWED);
                                                                // Stop PA035901
                                                                // Stop PA033005
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC

                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnValidate,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,FIELDNAME("Sell-to City"));
                                                                // Stop PA036544
                                                              END;

                                                              // Start PA036544
                                                              IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnLookup,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,FIELDNAME("Sell-to City")) THEN
                                                                EXIT;
                                                              // Stop PA036544

                                                              // Start PA033005
                                                              // Start PA035901
                                                              PostCode.LookUpCity("Sell-to City", "Sell-to Post Code", "Sell-to County", "Sell-to Country Code", TRUE);
                                                              // Stop PA035901
                                                              // Stop PA033005
                                                              // Stop INC
                                                              // Start PA039250
                                                              ApplyStatusFunction(FALSE);
                                                              // Stop PA039250
                                                              // Start PA036544
                                                              ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnLookup,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,FIELDNAME("Sell-to City"));
                                                              // Stop PA036544
                                                            END;
