    { 104 ;   ;Payment Method Code ;Code10        ;TableRelation="Payment Method";
                                                   OnValidate=VAR
                                                                SEPADirectDebitMandate@1000 : Record 1230;
                                                              BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                PaymentMethod.INIT;
                                                                IF "Payment Method Code" <> '' THEN
                                                                  PaymentMethod.GET("Payment Method Code");
                                                                // Start PA036966
                                                                IF PaymentMethod."Direct Debit" THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Start EU.0080854
                                                                  "Direct Debit Mandate ID" := SEPADirectDebitMandate.GetDefaultMandate("Bill-to Customer No.","Due Date");
                                                                  IF "Payment Terms Code" = '' THEN
                                                                    "Payment Terms Code" := PaymentMethod."Direct Debit Pmt. Terms Code";
                                                                END ELSE
                                                                  "Direct Debit Mandate ID" := '';
                                                                // Stop EU.0080854
                                                                // Stop PA036966
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                "Cash Payment":= PaymentMethod."Cash Payment";
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                "Bal. Account Type" := PaymentMethod."Bal. Account Type";
                                                                "Bal. Account No." := PaymentMethod."Bal. Account No.";
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Payment Method Code }
    { 105 ;   ;Shipping Agent Code ;Code10        ;TableRelation="Shipping Agent";
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Shipping Agent Code }
    { 106 ;   ;Package Tracking No.;Text30        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Package Tracking No. }
    { 107 ;   ;No. Series          ;Code10        ;TableRelation="No. Series";
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=No. Series;
                                                   Editable=No }
    { 108 ;   ;Posting No. Series  ;Code10        ;TableRelation="No. Series";
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                IF "Posting No. Series" <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                  SalesSetup.GET;
                                                                  TestNoSeries;
                                                                  NoSeriesMgt.TestSeries(GetPostingNoSeriesCode,"Posting No. Series");
                                                                END;
                                                                TESTFIELD("Posting No.",'');
                                                              END;

                                                   OnLookup=BEGIN
                                                              WITH SalesHeader DO BEGIN
                                                                SalesHeader := Rec;
                                                                SalesSetup.GET;
                                                                TestNoSeries;
                                                                IF NoSeriesMgt.LookupSeries(GetPostingNoSeriesCode,"Posting No. Series") THEN
                                                                  VALIDATE("Posting No. Series");
                                                                Rec := SalesHeader;
                                                              END;
                                                              // Start PA039250
                                                              ApplyStatusFunction(FALSE);
                                                              // Stop PA039250
                                                            END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Posting No. Series }
    { 109 ;   ;Shipping No. Series ;Code10        ;TableRelation="No. Series";
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                IF "Shipping No. Series" <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                  SalesSetup.GET;
                                                                  SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Posted Shipment Nos.");
                                                                  NoSeriesMgt.TestSeries(SalesSetup."Posted Shipment Nos.","Shipping No. Series");
                                                                END;
                                                                TESTFIELD("Shipping No.",'');
                                                              END;

                                                   OnLookup=BEGIN
                                                              WITH SalesHeader DO BEGIN
                                                                SalesHeader := Rec;
                                                                SalesSetup.GET;
                                                                SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Posted Shipment Nos.");
                                                                IF NoSeriesMgt.LookupSeries(SalesSetup."Posted Shipment Nos.","Shipping No. Series") THEN
                                                                  VALIDATE("Shipping No. Series");
                                                                Rec := SalesHeader;
                                                              END;
                                                              // Start PA039250
                                                              ApplyStatusFunction(FALSE);
                                                              // Stop PA039250
                                                            END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Shipping No. Series }
    { 114 ;   ;Tax Area Code       ;Code20        ;TableRelation="Tax Area";
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::" ",ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,FIELDNAME("Tax Area Code")) THEN
                                                                  EXIT;
                                                                // Stop PA036544

                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                PriceMessageIfSalesLinesExist(FIELDCAPTION("Tax Area Code"));

                                                                // Start PA036544
                                                                ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::" ",ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,FIELDNAME("Tax Area Code"));
                                                                // Stop PA036544
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Tax Area Code }
    { 115 ;   ;Tax Liable          ;Boolean       ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                                PriceMessageIfSalesLinesExist(FIELDCAPTION("Tax Liable"));
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Tax Liable }
    { 116 ;   ;VAT Bus. Posting Group;Code10      ;TableRelation="VAT Business Posting Group";
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                IF xRec."VAT Bus. Posting Group" <> "VAT Bus. Posting Group" THEN
                                                                  RecreateSalesLines(FIELDCAPTION("VAT Bus. Posting Group"));
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=VAT Bus. Posting Group }
    { 117 ;   ;Reserve             ;Option        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Reserve;
                                                   OptionCaptionML=ENU=Never,Optional,Always;
                                                   OptionString=Never,Optional,Always }
    { 118 ;   ;Applies-to ID       ;Code50        ;OnValidate=VAR
                                                                TempCustLedgEntry@1000 : Record 21;
                                                              BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                // Start PA039250
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(FALSE);
                                                                // Stop PA039250
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                // Start PA032441
                                                                IF "Applies-to ID" <> '' THEN
                                                                  TESTFIELD("Bal. Account No.",'');
                                                                IF ("Applies-to ID" <> xRec."Applies-to ID") AND (xRec."Applies-to ID" <> '') THEN BEGIN
                                                                  CustLedgEntry.SETCURRENTKEY("Customer No.",Open);
                                                                  CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Customer No.","Bill-to Customer No.");
                                                                  CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE(Open,TRUE);
                                                                  CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Applies-to ID",xRec."Applies-to ID");
                                                                  IF CustLedgEntry.FINDFIRST THEN
                                                                // Start PA035901
                                                                    CustEntrySetApplID.SetApplId(CustLedgEntry,TempCustLedgEntry,'');
                                                                // Stop PA035901
                                                                  CustLedgEntry.RESET;
                                                                END;
                                                                // Stop PA032441
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Applies-to ID;
                                                   Description=PA035597 }
    { 119 ;   ;VAT Base Discount % ;Decimal       ;OnValidate=VAR
                                                                ExSalesLineL@1109400001 : Record 37;
                                                                NoOfLinesProcessedL@1109400000 : Integer;
                                                                ExHideValidationDialogL@1109400002 : Boolean;
                                                              BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                GLSetup.GET;
                                                                IF "VAT Base Discount %" > GLSetup."VAT Tolerance %" THEN
                                                                  ERROR(
                                                                    Text007,
                                                                    FIELDCAPTION("VAT Base Discount %"),
                                                                    GLSetup.FIELDCAPTION("VAT Tolerance %"),
                                                                    GLSetup.TABLECAPTION);

                                                                IF ("VAT Base Discount %" = xRec."VAT Base Discount %") AND
                                                                   (CurrFieldNo <> 0)
                                                                THEN
                                                                  EXIT;

                                                                SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
                                                                SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
                                                                SalesLine.SETFILTER(Type,'<>%1',SalesLine.Type::" ");
                                                                SalesLine.SETFILTER(Quantity,'<>0');
                                                                SalesLine.LOCKTABLE;
                                                                LOCKTABLE;
                                                                IF SalesLine.FINDSET THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA040916
                                                                  IF GUIALLOWED THEN BEGIN
                                                                    WindowG.OPEN(
                                                                      C_INC_UpdateAmountInLine +
                                                                      C_INC_TotalNumberOfSalesLines);
                                                                    WindowG.UPDATE(2,SalesLine.COUNT);
                                                                  END;
                                                                // Stop PA040916
                                                                  MODIFY;
                                                                  REPEAT
                                                                // Start PA040916
                                                                    NoOfLinesProcessedL += 1;
                                                                    IF GUIALLOWED THEN
                                                                      WindowG.UPDATE(1,NoOfLinesProcessedL);
                                                                    IF (SalesLine."Quantity Invoiced" <> SalesLine.Quantity) OR
                                                                       (SalesLine.Type <> SalesLine.Type::"Charge (Item)") OR
                                                                       (CurrFieldNo <> 0)
                                                                    THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Stop PA040916
                                                                // Start EU.0138596
                                                                      SalesLine.UpdateAmounts();
                                                                // Stop EU.0138596
                                                                      SalesLine.MODIFY;
                                                                    END;
                                                                  UNTIL SalesLine.NEXT = 0;
                                                                // Start PA040916
                                                                  IF GUIALLOWED THEN
                                                                    WindowG.CLOSE;
                                                                // Stop PA040916
                                                                END;
                                                                SalesLine.RESET;
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=VAT Base Discount %;
                                                   DecimalPlaces=0:5;
                                                   MinValue=0;
                                                   MaxValue=100 }
    { 123 ;   ;Send IC Document    ;Boolean       ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                // Start PA032441.4575857
                                                                // Stop PA032441.4575857
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Send IC Document;
                                                   Description=PA032441 }
    { 124 ;   ;IC Status           ;Option        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                              END;

    { 160 ;   ;Job Queue Status    ;Option        ;OnValidate=BEGIN

                                                   OnLookup=VAR

                                                              JobQueueEntry.ShowStatusMsg("Job Queue Entry ID");

    { 1200;   ;Direct Debit Mandate ID;Code35     ;TableRelation="SEPA Direct Debit Mandate" WHERE (Customer No.=FIELD(Bill-to Customer No.),
                                                                                                    Closed=CONST(No),
                                                                                                    Blocked=CONST(No));

    { 5050;   ;Campaign No.        ;Code20        ;TableRelation=Campaign.No.;
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN

                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842

                                                                MODIFY;
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Campaign No.;
                                                   Description=PA035597 }
    { 5052;   ;Sell-to Contact No. ;Code20        ;TableRelation=Contact WHERE (Type=CONST(Company));
                                                   OnValidate=VAR
                                                                Cont@1002 : Record 5050;
                                                              BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                IF Cont.GET("Sell-to Contact No.") AND Cont.Blocked THEN
                                                                  ERROR(C_INC015);


                                                                // Start PA036869.34485
                                                                IF CurrFieldNo = FIELDNO("Sell-to Contact No.") THEN BEGIN
                                                                  IF "Sell-to Contact No." <> '' THEN
                                                                    IF "Sell-to Contact No." <> xRec."Sell-to Contact No." THEN
                                                                      UpdateOpportunity();
                                                                END;
                                                                // Stop PA036869.34485

                                                                IF ("Sell-to Contact No." <> xRec."Sell-to Contact No.") AND
                                                                   (xRec."Sell-to Contact No." <> '')
                                                                THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA033162
                                                                  IF HideValidationDialog OR NOT GUIALLOWED THEN
                                                                // Stop PA033162
                                                                    Confirmed := TRUE
                                                                  ELSE
                                                                    Confirmed := CONFIRM(Text004,FALSE,FIELDCAPTION("Sell-to Contact No."));
                                                                  IF Confirmed THEN BEGIN
                                                                    SalesLine.RESET;
                                                                    SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
                                                                    SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
                                                                    IF ("Sell-to Contact No." = '') AND ("Sell-to Customer No." = '') THEN BEGIN
                                                                      IF NOT SalesLine.ISEMPTY THEN
                                                                        ERROR(Text005,FIELDCAPTION("Sell-to Contact No."));
                                                                      INIT;
                                                                      SalesSetup.GET;
                                                                      InitRecord;
                                                                      "No. Series" := xRec."No. Series";
                                                                      IF xRec."Shipping No." <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                        "Shipping No. Series" := xRec."Shipping No. Series";
                                                                        "Shipping No." := xRec."Shipping No.";
                                                                      END;
                                                                      IF xRec."Posting No." <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                        "Posting No. Series" := xRec."Posting No. Series";
                                                                        "Posting No." := xRec."Posting No.";
                                                                      END;
                                                                      IF xRec."Return Receipt No." <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                        "Return Receipt No. Series" := xRec."Return Receipt No. Series";
                                                                        "Return Receipt No." := xRec."Return Receipt No.";
                                                                      END;
                                                                      EXIT;
                                                                    END;
                                                                  END ELSE BEGIN
                                                                    Rec := xRec;
                                                                    EXIT;
                                                                  END;
                                                                END;
                                                                IF ("Sell-to Customer No." <> '') AND ("Sell-to Contact No." <> '') THEN BEGIN
                                                                  Cont.GET("Sell-to Contact No.");
                                                                  ContactG.GET(Cont."Company No.");
                                                                  IF ContactG."Customer No." <> "Sell-to Customer No." THEN
                                                                    ERROR(Text038,Cont."No.",Cont.Name,"Sell-to Customer No.");
                                                                END;
                                                                // Start EU.0039396
                                                                // Stop EU.0039396

                                                                // Start PA032519
                                                                // Start PA036373
                                                                // Start EU.0047941
                                                                IF (CurrFieldNo = FIELDNO("Sell-to Contact No.")) OR CreatedFromOpportunityG  THEN
                                                                // Stop EU.0047941
                                                                  IF "Sell-to Contact No." <> '' THEN
                                                                    IF "Sell-to Contact No." <> xRec."Sell-to Contact No." THEN
                                                                      DataPrivManagementG.ShowAvailableDataPrivList(
                                                                        DataPrivSetupG."Check Modus"::CheckQuery,
                                                                        TRUE,
                                                                        DATABASE::Contact,
                                                                        "Sell-to Contact No.",
                                                                        TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036373
                                                                // All tests for a valid "Sell-to Contact No." must be done until here.
                                                                // Start EU.0039396
                                                                UpdateSellToCust("Sell-to Contact No.");

                                                                IF "Sell-to Contact No." <> xRec."Sell-to Contact No." THEN
                                                                  AutomSalesTextG.SalesHeaderAutomText(Rec,0);  //0 = Header and Footer

                                                                // Start PA042783.88142
                                                                "Salesperson Code" := CollectionUnitG.GetSalesPersonCode("Salesperson Code", "Sell-to Contact No.",Cust."No.");
                                                                // Stop PA042783.88142
                                                                // Stop EU.0039396
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Sell-to Contact No.;
                                                   Description=PA035597 }
    { 5053;   ;Bill-to Contact No. ;Code20        ;TableRelation=Contact WHERE (Type=CONST(Company));
                                                   OnValidate=VAR
                                                                Cont@1109400001 : Record 5050;
                                                              BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                IF Cont.GET("Bill-to Contact No.") AND Cont.Blocked THEN
                                                                  ERROR(C_INC015);
                                                                IF ("Bill-to Contact No." <> xRec."Bill-to Contact No.") AND
                                                                   (xRec."Bill-to Contact No." <> '')
                                                                THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA033162
                                                                  IF HideValidationDialog OR NOT GUIALLOWED THEN
                                                                // Stop PA033162
                                                                    Confirmed := TRUE
                                                                  ELSE
                                                                    Confirmed := CONFIRM(Text004,FALSE,FIELDCAPTION("Bill-to Contact No."));
                                                                  IF Confirmed THEN BEGIN
                                                                    SalesLine.RESET;
                                                                    SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
                                                                    SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
                                                                    IF ("Bill-to Contact No." = '') AND ("Bill-to Customer No." = '') THEN BEGIN
                                                                      IF NOT SalesLine.ISEMPTY THEN
                                                                        ERROR(Text005,FIELDCAPTION("Bill-to Contact No."));
                                                                      INIT;
                                                                      SalesSetup.GET;
                                                                      InitRecord;
                                                                      "No. Series" := xRec."No. Series";
                                                                      IF xRec."Shipping No." <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                        "Shipping No. Series" := xRec."Shipping No. Series";
                                                                        "Shipping No." := xRec."Shipping No.";
                                                                      END;
                                                                      IF xRec."Posting No." <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                        "Posting No. Series" := xRec."Posting No. Series";
                                                                        "Posting No." := xRec."Posting No.";
                                                                      END;
                                                                      IF xRec."Return Receipt No." <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                        "Return Receipt No. Series" := xRec."Return Receipt No. Series";
                                                                        "Return Receipt No." := xRec."Return Receipt No.";
                                                                      END;
                                                                      EXIT;
                                                                    END;
                                                                  END ELSE BEGIN
                                                                    "Bill-to Contact No." := xRec."Bill-to Contact No.";
                                                                    EXIT;
                                                                  END;
                                                                END;

                                                                IF ("Bill-to Customer No." <> '') AND ("Bill-to Contact No." <> '') THEN BEGIN
                                                                  Cont.GET("Bill-to Contact No.");
                                                                  ContactG.GET(Cont."Company No.");
                                                                  IF ContactG."Customer No." <> "Bill-to Customer No." THEN
                                                                    ERROR(Text038,Cont."No.",Cont.Name,"Bill-to Customer No.");
                                                                END;
                                                                // Start EU.0039396
                                                                // Stop EU.0039396

                                                                // Start PA032519
                                                                // Start PA036373
                                                                IF CurrFieldNo = FIELDNO("Bill-to Contact No.") THEN
                                                                  IF "Bill-to Contact No." <> '' THEN
                                                                    IF "Bill-to Contact No." <> xRec."Bill-to Contact No." THEN
                                                                      DataPrivManagementG.ShowAvailableDataPrivList(
                                                                        DataPrivSetupG."Check Modus"::CheckQuery,
                                                                        TRUE,
                                                                        DATABASE::Contact,
                                                                        "Bill-to Contact No.",
                                                                        TRUE);
                                                                // All tests for a valid "Bill-to Contact No." must be done until here.
                                                                // Start EU.0039396
                                                                UpdateBillToCust("Bill-to Contact No.");
                                                                // Stop EU.0039396
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Bill-to Contact No.;
                                                   Description=PA035597 }
    { 5055;   ;Opportunity No.     ;Code20        ;TableRelation=IF (Document Type=FILTER(<>Order)) Opportunity.No. WHERE (Contact No.=FIELD(Sell-to Contact No.),
                                                                                                                           Closed=CONST(No))
                                                                                                                           ELSE IF (Document Type=CONST(Order)) Opportunity.No. WHERE (Contact No.=FIELD(Sell-to Contact No.),
                                                                                                                                                                                       Sales Document No.=FIELD(No.),
                                                                                                                                                                                       Sales Document Type=CONST(Order));
                                                   OnValidate=VAR
                                                                OpportunityL@1000 : Record 5092;
                                                                SalesHeaderL@1001 : Record 36;
                                                              BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                // Start PA034402
                                                                IF xRec."Opportunity No." <> "Opportunity No." THEN BEGIN
                                                                  IF "Opportunity No." <> '' THEN
                                                                    IF OpportunityL.GET("Opportunity No.") THEN BEGIN
                                                                      OpportunityL.TESTFIELD(Status,OpportunityL.Status::"In Progress");
                                                                // Start PA035422.20942
                                                                      IF (GUIALLOWED) AND (OpportunityL."Sales Document No." <> '') THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Stop PA035422.20942
                                                                        IF CONFIRM(Text048,FALSE,OpportunityL."Sales Document No.",OpportunityL."No.") THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036869
                                                                // Stop PA036869
                                                                          OpportunityL."Sales Document Type" := OpportunityL."Sales Document Type"::Quote;
                                                                          OpportunityL."Sales Document No." := "No.";
                                                                          OpportunityL.MODIFY;
                                                                        END ELSE
                                                                          "Opportunity No." := xRec."Opportunity No.";
                                                                      END ELSE BEGIN
                                                                        OpportunityL."Sales Document Type" := OpportunityL."Sales Document Type"::Quote;
                                                                        OpportunityL."Sales Document No." := "No.";
                                                                        OpportunityL.MODIFY;
                                                                      END
                                                                    END;
                                                                  IF xRec."Opportunity No." <> '' THEN
                                                                    IF OpportunityL.GET(xRec."Opportunity No.") THEN BEGIN
                                                                      OpportunityL."Sales Document No." := '';
                                                                      OpportunityL."Sales Document Type" := OpportunityL."Sales Document Type"::" ";
                                                                      OpportunityL.MODIFY;
                                                                    END;
                                                                END;
                                                                // Stop PA034402
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Opportunity No.;
                                                   Description=PA035597, PA034402 }
    { 5800;   ;Receive             ;Boolean       ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Receive }
    { 5801;   ;Return Receipt No.  ;Code20        ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Return Receipt No. }
    { 5802;   ;Return Receipt No. Series;Code10   ;TableRelation="No. Series";
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                IF "Return Receipt No. Series" <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                  SalesSetup.GET;
                                                                  SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Posted Return Receipt Nos.");
                                                                  NoSeriesMgt.TestSeries(SalesSetup."Posted Return Receipt Nos.","Return Receipt No. Series");
                                                                END;
                                                                TESTFIELD("Return Receipt No.",'');
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   OnLookup=BEGIN
                                                              // Start INC
                                                              WITH SalesHeader DO BEGIN
                                                                SalesHeader := Rec;
                                                                SalesSetup.GET;
                                                                SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Posted Return Receipt Nos.");
                                                                IF NoSeriesMgt.LookupSeries(SalesSetup."Posted Return Receipt Nos.","Return Receipt No. Series") THEN
                                                                  VALIDATE("Return Receipt No. Series");
                                                                Rec := SalesHeader;
                                                              END;
                                                              // Stop INC
                                                              // Start PA039250
                                                              ApplyStatusFunction(FALSE);
                                                              // Stop PA039250
                                                            END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Return Receipt No. Series }
    { 5803;   ;Last Return Receipt No.;Code20     ;TableRelation="Return Receipt Header";

                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                IF SalesLinesExist THEN BEGIN
                                                                  IF "Item Sales Price Group" <> xRec."Item Sales Price Group" THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA041187.69603
                                                                    IF CONFIRM(C_INC005, FALSE, FIELDCAPTION("Item Sales Price Group")) THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Stop PA041187.69603
                                                                      UpdateSalesLines(FIELDNAME("Item Sales Price Group"));
                                                                    END ELSE BEGIN
                                                                      "Item Sales Price Group" := xRec."Item Sales Price Group";
                                                                    END;
                                                                  END;
                                                                END;
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN

                                                              END;

                                                   Description=Flag to show discounts Yes/No }
    { 5025357;;Purch. Order Type   ;Code10        ;TableRelation="Purch. Order Type";
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                IF IsImporter THEN
                                                                  IF IMMDealerMgmtG.GetDealer <> '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                    IMMDealerMgmtG.CheckDealerPurchOrderType(Rec);
                                                                    IMMDealerMgmtG.CheckDealerMaxPartsOrders(Rec);
                                                                  END;
                                                                IF SalesLinesExist THEN BEGIN
                                                                  IF "Purch. Order Type" <> xRec."Purch. Order Type" THEN BEGIN
                                                                    IF CONFIRM(C_INC004,FALSE) THEN BEGIN
                                                                      UpdateSalesLines(FIELDNAME("Purch. Order Type"));
                                                                    END ELSE BEGIN
                                                                      "Purch. Order Type" := xRec."Purch. Order Type";
                                                                    END;
                                                                  END;
                                                                END;
                                                                // Start PA041510
                                                                UpdateReqWorksheetName();
                                                                // Stop PA041510
                                                                VALIDATE("Use Inventory Buffer Quantity");
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Purch. Order Type;
                                                   Description=Order Type }
    { 5025358;;Inv. Discount %     ;Decimal       ;OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                // Start EU.0104306
                                                                SalesSetup.GET;
                                                                SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Calc. Inv. Discount");
                                                                MODIFY;
                                                                IF SalesLinesExist() THEN
                                                                  CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Sales-Calc. Discount", SalesLine);
                                                                // Stop EU.0104306
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Inv. Discount %;
                                                   DecimalPlaces=0:5;
                                                   MinValue=0;
                                                   MaxValue=100;
                                                   Description=Inv. Discount in Percent }

    { 5025362;;Vehicle Sales Price Group;Code10   ;TableRelation="Vehicle Sales Price Group".Code;
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                IF SalesLinesExist THEN BEGIN
                                                                  IF "Vehicle Sales Price Group" <> xRec."Vehicle Sales Price Group" THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA041187.69603
                                                                    IF CONFIRM(C_INC005, FALSE, FIELDCAPTION("Vehicle Sales Price Group")) THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Stop PA041187.69603
                                                                      UpdateSalesLines(FIELDNAME("Vehicle Sales Price Group"));
                                                                    END ELSE BEGIN
                                                                      "Vehicle Sales Price Group" := xRec."Vehicle Sales Price Group";
                                                                    END;
                                                                  END;
                                                                END;
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Vehicle Sales Price Group;
                                                   Description=Vehicle Price Group }
    { 5025363;;Option Sales Price Group;Code10    ;TableRelation="Option Sales Price Group".Code;
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA036842
                                                                ApplyStatusFunction(TRUE);
                                                                // Stop PA036842
                                                                // Start INC
                                                                IF SalesLinesExist THEN BEGIN
                                                                  IF "Option Sales Price Group" <> xRec."Option Sales Price Group" THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA041187.69603
                                                                    IF CONFIRM(C_INC005, FALSE, FIELDCAPTION("Option Sales Price Group")) THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA041187.69603
                                                                      UpdateSalesLines(FIELDNAME("Option Sales Price Group"));
                                                                    END ELSE BEGIN
                                                                      "Option Sales Price Group" := xRec."Option Sales Price Group";
                                                                    END;
                                                                  END;
                                                                END;
                                                                // Stop INC
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Option Sales Price Group;
                                                   Description=Option Sales Price Group }

                                                                // Start EU.0104306
                                                                IF CurrFieldNo = FIELDNO("VAT Calculation Logic") THEN
                                                                  IF "VAT Calculation Logic" <> xRec."VAT Calculation Logic" THEN BEGIN
                                                                    SalesLinesExist();
                                                                    SalesLine.SETFILTER("Quantity Invoiced",'<>0');
                                                                    IF NOT SalesLine.ISEMPTY THEN
                                                                      ERROR(C_INC_PartialInvoiceFieldChangeNotPossible);
                                                                    IF SalesLinesExist() THEN
                                                                      Confirmed := CONFIRM(Text015 + Text004,FALSE,FIELDCAPTION("VAT Calculation Logic"))
                                                                    ELSE
                                                                      Confirmed := CONFIRM(Text004,FALSE,FIELDCAPTION("VAT Calculation Logic"));
                                                                    IF Confirmed THEN
                                                                      RecreateSalesLines(FIELDCAPTION("VAT Calculation Logic"))
                                                                    ELSE
                                                                      "VAT Calculation Logic" := xRec."VAT Calculation Logic"
                                                                  END;
                                                                // Stop EU.0104306
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=VAT Calculation Logic;
                                                   OptionCaptionML=ENU=Amount + VAT,Amount incl. VAT;
                                                   OptionString=Amount + VAT,Amount incl. VAT;
                                                   Description=EU.0104306 }

                                                   Description=PA035597 }
    { 5025841;;Supply VIN          ;Code20        ;TableRelation=Vehicle WHERE (Customer No.=FIELD(Sell-to Customer No.));
                                                   OnValidate=VAR
                                                                ItemL@1109400004 : Record 27;
                                                                VehicleL@1109400003 : Record 5025400;
                                                              BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA041187.91230
                                                                TESTFIELD("Order Type", "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases");
                                                                // Stop PA041187.91230
                                                                // Start PA041023
                                                                // Start PA041023.87058
                                                                IF CurrFieldNo = FIELDNO("Supply VIN") THEN
                                                                // Start EU.0000497
                                                                  IF ("Supply VIN" = '') AND (xRec."Supply VIN" > '') THEN
                                                                    VALIDATE("Reference License No.", '');
                                                                IF (CurrFieldNo = FIELDNO("Supply VIN")) AND ("Supply VIN" > '') THEN
                                                                // Stop EU.0000497
                                                                  "Supply VIN" := VehicleL.VehicleSearch("Supply VIN");
                                                                IF STRLEN("Supply VIN") > 17 THEN
                                                                  ERROR(C_INC_VINLengthError, TABLECAPTION, FIELDCAPTION("Supply VIN"));
                                                                IF VehicleL.GET("Supply VIN") THEN
                                                                  IF "Supply VIN" > '' THEN BEGIN
                                                                    VALIDATE("Reference License No.", VehicleL."License No.");
                                                                  END ELSE
                                                                    VALIDATE("Reference License No.", '');
                                                                // Stop PA041023.87058
                                                                IF NOT SkipVehicleSellToCustomerG THEN BEGIN
                                                                // Start PA043640.94597
                                                                  IF (VehicleL."Customer No." > '') AND ("Sell-to Customer No." <> VehicleL."Customer No.") THEN BEGIN
                                                                    IF HideValidationDialog OR NOT GUIALLOWED OR ("Sell-to Customer No." = '') THEN
                                                                      Confirmed := TRUE
                                                                    ELSE
                                                                      IF SalesLinesExist THEN
                                                                        Confirmed := CONFIRM(Text015 + Text004,FALSE,FIELDCAPTION("Sell-to Customer No."))
                                                                      ELSE
                                                                        Confirmed := CONFIRM(Text004,FALSE,FIELDCAPTION("Sell-to Customer No."));
                                                                // Start EU.0139128.140026
                                                                    IF Confirmed THEN BEGIN
                                                                      ChangeSellToFromReferenceVinG := TRUE;
                                                                      VALIDATE("Sell-to Customer No.", VehicleL."Customer No.");
                                                                      ChangeSellToFromReferenceVinG := FALSE;
                                                                    END;
                                                                // Stop EU.0139128.140026
                                                                  END;
                                                                // Stop PA043640.94597
                                                                  IF ("Sell-to Customer No." = '') AND (VehicleL."Contact No." > '') AND (VehicleL."Contact No." <> "Sell-to Contact No.") THEN
                                                                    VALIDATE("Sell-to Contact No.", VehicleL."Contact No.");
                                                                END;

                                                                // Start EU.0191766
                                                                InitDefaultDim();
                                                                // Stop EU.0191766
                                                                IF "Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" <> xRec."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" THEN
                                                                  MessageIfSalesLinesExist(FIELDCAPTION("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code"));
                                                                // Stop PA041187.91230

                                                                // Stop PA041023.87224
                                                                UpdateSalesLines(FIELDNAME("Supply VIN"));
                                                                // Stop PA041023

                                                                // Start EU.0000497
                                                                // Clear the license if the VIN is cleared
                                                                IF ("Reference License No." > '') AND ("Supply VIN" = '') THEN
                                                                  IF xRec."Supply VIN" <> "Supply VIN" THEN
                                                                    "Reference License No." := '';
                                                                // Stop EU.0000497
                                                              END;

                                                   ValidateTableRelation=No;
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Reference VIN;
                                                   Description=PA041023,EU.0001175.8146,EU.0012448.13245;
                                                   AutoFormatExpr='JMD' }
    { 5025850;;Reference License No.;Code11       ;OnValidate=VAR
                                                                VINLAfterSearchL@49700 : Code[20];
                                                              BEGIN
                                                                // Start EU.0000497
                                                                VINLAfterSearchL := VehicleG.CheckVehicleLicense("Reference License No.","Supply VIN",CurrFieldNo = FIELDNO("Reference License No."));
                                                                IF VINLAfterSearchL > '' THEN
                                                                  IF VINLAfterSearchL <> "Supply VIN" THEN
                                                                    VALIDATE("Supply VIN", VINLAfterSearchL);
                                                                // Stop EU.0000497
                                                                // Start PA041023
                                                                // Start PA041187.88343
                                                                IF CurrFieldNo = FIELDNO("Reference License No.") THEN
                                                                // Stop PA041187.88343
                                                                  UpdateSalesLines(FIELDNAME("Reference License No."));
                                                                // Stop PA041023
                                                              END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Reference License No.;
                                                   Description=PA041023 }

    { 5208501;;Tour Code           ;Code20        ;TableRelation="Tour Code Setup";
                                                   OnValidate=BEGIN
                                                                // Start EU.0056707
                                                                IF "Tour Code" <> xRec."Tour Code" THEN BEGIN
                                                                  IF ("Document Type" = "Document Type"::Order) AND
                                                                      ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases")
                                                                  THEN BEGIN
                                                                    SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
                                                                    SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.", "No.");
                                                                    SalesLine.SETRANGE(Type, SalesLine.Type::Item);
                                                                    IF NOT SalesLine.ISEMPTY THEN BEGIN
                                                                      SalesLine.MODIFYALL("Tour Code","Tour Code")
                                                                    END;
                                                                  END;
                                                                END;
                                                                // Stop EU.0056707
                                                              END;

                                                   DataClassification=ToBeClassified;
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Tour Code;
                                                   Description=EU.0056707 }
    { 5208502;No;FIELD ID 5208502 BLOCKED;Integer ;DataClassification=ToBeClassified;
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=FIELD ID 5208502 BLOCKED;
                                                   Description=EU.0114065;
                                                   Editable=No }
  }
  KEYS
  {
    {    ;Document Type,No.                       ;Clustered=Yes }
    {    ;Document Type,Sell-to Customer No.,No.   }
    {    ;Document Type,Combine Shipments,Bill-to Customer No.,Currency Code }
    {    ;Document Type,Service Order No.,Bill-to Customer No. }
    {    ;Order Type,Document Type,Sell-to Customer No.,No.;
                                                   KeyGroups=INCADEA }
    {    ;Document Type,Location Code,No.         ;KeyGroups=INCADEA }
    {    ;Document Type,Prepayment,Prepayment Order No.,Location Code }
    {    ;Order Type,Document Type,Location Code,Shortcut Dimension 2 Code,No.;
                                                   KeyGroups=INCADEA }
    {    ;Document Type,Sell-to Customer No.,Document Date;
                                                   KeyGroups=INCADEA }
    {    ;Document Type,Sell-to Contact No.       ;KeyGroups=INCADEA }
    {    ;Sell-to Contact No.                     ;KeyGroups=INCADEA }
    {    ;Sell-to Customer No.,External Document No.;
                                                   KeyGroups=INCADEA }
    {    ;Order Type,Document Type,Sell-to Contact No.;
                                                   KeyGroups=INCADEA }
    {    ;Bill-to Contact No.                     ;KeyGroups=INCADEA }
    {    ;Bill-to Customer No.                    ;KeyGroups=INCADEA }
    {    ;Salesperson Code,Status Code,Location Code,Shortcut Dimension 2 Code,Order Type;
                                                   KeyGroups=INCADEA,PA032651 }
    {    ;Order Date,Salesperson Code,Status Code,Location Code,Shortcut Dimension 2 Code,Order Type;
                                                   KeyGroups=INCADEA,PA032651 }
    {    ;Dealer Code,Purch. Order Type,Order Date;KeyGroups=IMM }
    {    ;Sell-to Customer No.,Order Type,Document Type,Order Date }
    {    ;Opportunity No.                          }
    {    ;Prepayment Order No.                     }
  }
  FIELDGROUPS
  {
    { 1   ;DropDown            ;No.,Sell-to Customer Name,Sell-to City,Sell-to Post Code,Service Advisor No.,Amount Including VAT,Order Date,Status,Location Code,Shortcut Dimension 1 Code,Shortcut Dimension 2 Code }
  }
  CODE
  {
    VAR
      Text000@1000 : TextConst 'ENU=Do you want to print shipment %1?';
      Text001@1001 : TextConst 'ENU=Do you want to print invoice %1?';
      Text002@1002 : TextConst 'ENU=Do you want to print credit memo %1?';
      Text003@1003 : TextConst 'ENU=You cannot rename a %1.';
      Text004@1004 : TextConst 'ENU=Do you want to change %1?';
      Text005@1005 : TextConst 'ENU=You cannot reset %1 because the document still has one or more lines.';
      Text006@1006 : TextConst 'ENU=You cannot change %1 because the order is associated with one or more purchase orders.';
      Text007@1007 : TextConst 'ENU=%1 cannot be greater than %2 in the %3 table.';
      Text008@1008 : TextConst 'ENU="Deleting this document will cause a gap in the number series for shipments. "';
      Text009@1009 : TextConst 'ENU=An empty shipment %1 will be created to fill this gap in the number series.\\';
      Text010@1010 : TextConst 'ENU=Do you want to continue?';
      Text011@1011 : TextConst 'ENU="Deleting this document will cause a gap in the number series for posted invoices. "';
      Text012@1012 : TextConst 'ENU=An empty posted invoice %1 will be created to fill this gap in the number series.\\';
      Text013@1013 : TextConst 'ENU="Deleting this document will cause a gap in the number series for posted credit memos. "';
      Text014@1014 : TextConst 'ENU=An empty posted credit memo %1 will be created to fill this gap in the number series.\\';
      Text015@1015 : TextConst 'ENU=If you change %1, the existing sales lines will be deleted and new sales lines based on the new information on the header will be created.\\';
      Text017@1017 : TextConst 'ENU=You must delete the existing sales lines before you can change %1.';
      Text018@1018 : TextConst 'ENU=You have changed %1 on the sales header, but it has not been changed on the existing sales lines.\';
      Text019@1019 : TextConst 'ENU=You must update the existing sales lines manually.';
      Text020@1020 : TextConst 'ENU=The change may affect the exchange rate used in the price calculation of the sales lines.';
      Text021@1021 : TextConst 'ENU=Do you want to update the exchange rate?';
      Text023@1023 : TextConst 'ENU=Do you want to print return receipt %1?';
      Text029@1029 : TextConst 'ENU="Deleting this document will cause a gap in the number series for return receipts. "';
      Text030@1030 : TextConst 'ENU=An empty return receipt %1 will be created to fill this gap in the number series.\\';
      SalesSetup@1033 : Record 311;
      GLSetup@1034 : Record 98;
      GLAcc@1035 : Record 15;

      SalesLine@1037 : Record 37;

      CurrencyDate@1068 : Date;

      Text037@1078 : TextConst 'ENU=Contact %1 %2 is not related to customer %3.';

      CompanyInfo@1094 : Record 79;

      Text064@1000000001 : TextConst 'ENU=You may have changed a dimension.\\Do you want to update the lines?';
      C_INC003@1109400038 : TextConst 'ENU=Field %1 must not be blank';
      C_INC004@1109400039 : TextConst 'ENU=You have changed the order type. This might result in new prices for the sales lines.\\Do you want to recalculate the prices?';
      C_INC005@1109400040 : TextConst 'ENU=You have changed the %1. This might result in new prices\for the sales lines.\\ Do you want to recalculate the prices?';
      LetterSalutationG@1109400041 : Record 5029135;
      Cust2G@1109400042 : Record 18;
      DiffTaxTextG@1109400043 : Record 5025482;
      PurchDocTextG@1109400044 : Record 5028672;

      OptionVariantG@1109400049 : Record 5025424;
