      SalesAssistanceLineG@1109400051 : Record 5025486;
      CurrencyG@1109400052 : Record 4;
      ContactG@1119427000 : Record 5050;
      VehicleStocklistG@1109400109 : Record 5086715;
      AddressLinkG@1109400045 : Record 5029112;
      MessagingAppG@1109400002 : Record 5206871;
      TempCommBufferG@1109400003 : TEMPORARY Record 5100;
      DocChainEntryG@1000000000 : Record 5206330;
      VehicleG@1109400008 : Record 5025400;
      VehicleCollectionUnitG@1109400007 : Codeunit 5025409;
      DataPrivManagementG@1101342644 : Codeunit 5060978;
      ArchSalesHdrG@1101342643 : Codeunit 5206894;
      AutomSalesTextG@1109400054 : Codeunit 5028666;
      SubtotalsG@1109400055 : Codeunit 5028659;
      IntDocPostG@1109400088 : Codeunit 5025649;
      PrepmtMgtG@1101219227 : Codeunit 5208830;
      CollectionUnitG@1055660 : Codeunit 5028657;
      UserSessionUnitG@1055699 : Codeunit 5028665;
      UserMgtG@1109400000 : Codeunit 418;
      IMMDealerMgmtG@1101251784 : Codeunit 5086700;
      SalesIncentiveMgmtG@1101286982 : Codeunit 5025412;
      DocChainMgtG@1055602 : Codeunit 5206330;
      ReservMgtG@1109400208 : Codeunit 99000845;
      ShipPropMgtG@1737400 : Codeunit 5045910;
      ReqWorksheetFuncG@8524400 : Codeunit 5028744;
      WindowG@1109400004 : Dialog;
      ContactNoG@1170000001 : Code[20];
      TitleNameG@1109400056 : Text[100];
      C_INC006@1109400057 : TextConst 'ENU=" Field %1 may no longer be changed because there are already records in table %2."';
      C_INC007@1109400058 : TextConst 'ENU=The user %1 has not been assigned any locations';
      C_INC008@1109400059 : TextConst 'ENU=The %1 %2 has not been assigned for the user %3';
      C_INC009@1109400060 : TextConst 'ENU=The user %1 has not been assigned a current location';
      C_INC010@1109400061 : TextConst 'ENU=The warranty customer of this make cannot be assigned because\lines with another make code exist!';
      C_INC011@1109400062 : TextConst 'ENU=A warranty customer has been entered into the %1 field!\You cannot change the Make Code!';
      C_INC012@1109400063 : TextConst 'ENU=There is already an archived quote with the number %1 !\Please assign a new quote number !';
      C_INC013@1109400064 : TextConst 'ENU=There is already an archived order with the number %1 !\Please assign a new order number !';
      C_INC014@1109400087 : TextConst 'ENU=Sell-to Customer No. must not be changed because there are active Trade-Ins';
      SkipSellToContactG@1109400091 : Boolean;
      SkipBillToContactG@1109400090 : Boolean;
      C_INC015@1109400104 : TextConst 'ENU=This Contact is Blocked. You cannot use this Contact.';
      C_INC017@1109400106 : TextConst 'ENU=You are not allowed to enter a payment discount if VAT Calculation Type in \ some document lines is Differential Tax!';
      C_INC016@1109400089 : TextConst 'ENU=No associated purchase document found.';
      C_IMS000@1101353004 : TextConst 'ENU=Unauthorized %1 %2.';
      C_IMS001@1101353003 : TextConst 'ENU=Not a valid Pick Release No.';
      IgnoreRecreateSalesLinesG@1101205748 : Boolean;
      C_INCRelatedSalesDocument@1109400001 : TextConst 'ENU=Opportunity %1 has a related sales document. Do you also want to replace the current sales document in the "Opportunity Card"?"';
      NotUpdateQuotesG@1055600 : Boolean;
      SkipDocumentStatusCodeCheckG@1109400102 : Boolean;
      C_INC_UpdateAmountInLine@1109400005 : TextConst 'ENU=Updating Amounts on Sales Lines          #1######\';
      C_INC_TotalNumberOfSalesLines@1109400006 : TextConst 'ENU=Number Of Sales Lines            #2######';
      SkipDocChainG@1055601 : Boolean;
      C_INC_VINLengthError@1109400011 : TextConst 'ENU=%1 %2 must have 17 characters!';
      C_INC_UpdateOnVIN@1109400010 : TextConst 'ENU=You may have changed a VIN. Do you want to update the lines?';
      SkipVehicleSellToCustomerG@1055603 : Boolean;
      ContactNoAvailableG@1170000000 : Boolean;
      C_INC_DimensionChanged@1109400009 : TextConst 'ENU=You have changed dimension %1. Do you want to update the lines?';
      C_INC_ErrCancelNegRes@1000000201 : TextConst 'ENU=Must not close negative reservations manually.';
      CreatedFromOpportunityG@72000 : Boolean;
      C_INC_ConfirmCheckReservation@8524402 : TextConst 'ENU=%1 out of %2 lines have %3 as a %4 status. Do you want to skip those lines and continue?';
      C_INC_MsgCheckReservation@8524401 : TextConst 'ENU=Reservations are not possible as the %1 status is %2 for the selected Sales Lines.';
      C_INC_ResBatchNameWarning@8524411 : TextConst 'ENU=Note that %1 out of %2 lines have Reservation Entries from %3, the value "%4" different than %5';
      C_INC_DlgReserveAllLines@8524410 : TextConst 'ENU=Auto Reserve All Lines...';
      C_INC_DlgReserveSelLines@8524409 : TextConst 'ENU=Auto Reserve Selected Lines...';
      C_INC_DlgReserveInvAll@8524408 : TextConst 'ENU=Reserve Inventory All Lines...';
      C_INC_DlgReserveInvSel@8524407 : TextConst 'ENU=Reserve Inventory Selected Lines...';

      C_INC_DlgCancelResAllLines@8524405 : TextConst 'ENU=Cancel Reservation All Lines...';
      C_INC_DlgCancelResSelLines@8524404 : TextConst 'ENU=Cancel Reservation Selected Lines...';
      C_INC_PartialInvoiceFieldChangeNotPossible@1016 : TextConst 'ENU=Partial Invoice exists. Field can nit be changed.';
      C_INC_NotFound@2018 : TextConst 'ENU=Document %1 %2 not found.';
      ChangeSellToFromReferenceVinG@13785800 : Boolean;

    PROCEDURE InitRecord@10();
    VAR
      LocationL@1109400000 : Record 14;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA036544
      IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function",ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,'InitRecord') THEN
        EXIT;
      // Stop PA036544

      // Start EU.0114065
      IF "General Document" THEN BEGIN
        CASE "Document Type" OF
          "Document Type"::Invoice:
            BEGIN
              IF ("No. Series" <> '') AND
                 (SalesSetup."Gen. Sales Invoice Nos." = SalesSetup."Posted Gen. Sales Invoice Nos.")
              THEN
                "Posting No. Series" := "No. Series"
              ELSE
                NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Gen. Sales Invoice Nos.");
              IF SalesSetup."Shipment on Invoice" THEN
               NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Shipping No. Series",SalesSetup."Gen. Sales Shipment Nos.");
            END;
          "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
            BEGIN
              IF ("No. Series" <> '') AND
                 (SalesSetup."Credit Memo Nos." = SalesSetup."Posted Gen. Sales Cr. Memo")
              THEN
                "Posting No. Series" := "No. Series"
              ELSE
                NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Gen. Sales Cr. Memo");
              IF SalesSetup."Return Receipt on Credit Memo" THEN
                NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Return Receipt No. Series",SalesSetup."Gen. Sales Re. Receipt Nos.");
            END;
        END;
      END ELSE
      // Stop EU.0114065
      // Start INC
        IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases" THEN BEGIN
          CASE "Document Type" OF
            "Document Type"::Quote,"Document Type"::Order:
              BEGIN
                NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Vehicle Invoice Nos.");
                NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Shipping No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Vehicle Shipment Nos.");
              END;
            "Document Type"::Invoice:
              BEGIN
                IF ("No. Series" <> '') AND
                   (SalesSetup."Invoice Nos." = SalesSetup."Posted Vehicle Invoice Nos.")
                THEN
                  "Posting No. Series" := "No. Series"
                ELSE
                  NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Vehicle Invoice Nos.");
                IF SalesSetup."Shipment on Invoice" THEN
                  NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Shipping No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Vehicle Shipment Nos.");
              END;
            "Document Type"::"Return Order":
              BEGIN
                NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Vehicle Cr. Memo Nos.");
                NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Return Receipt No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Veh. Ret. Receipt Nos.");
              END;
            "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
              BEGIN
                IF ("No. Series" <> '') AND
                   (SalesSetup."Credit Memo Nos." = SalesSetup."Posted Vehicle Cr. Memo Nos.")
                THEN
                  "Posting No. Series" := "No. Series"
                ELSE
                  NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Vehicle Cr. Memo Nos.");
                IF SalesSetup."Return Receipt on Credit Memo" THEN
                  NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Return Receipt No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Veh. Ret. Receipt Nos.");
              END;
          END;
        END ELSE
      // Stop INC
          CASE "Document Type" OF
            "Document Type"::Quote,"Document Type"::Order:
              BEGIN
                NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Invoice Nos.");
                NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Shipping No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Shipment Nos.");
              END;
            "Document Type"::Invoice:
              BEGIN
      // Start INC
                IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::Service THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA032651
                  ServSetupG.GET;
      // Stop PA032651
                  IF IntDocPostG.CheckCustomerInternal("Bill-to Customer No.") THEN BEGIN
                    NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",ServSetupG."Internal Document Nos.");
                  END ELSE BEGIN
                    IF ("No. Series" <> '') AND
                       (ServSetupG."Invoice Nos." = ServSetupG."Posted Invoice Nos.")
                    THEN
                      "Posting No. Series" := "No. Series"
                    ELSE
                      NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",ServSetupG."Posted Invoice Nos.");
                  END;
      // Start EU.0083728
                  IF SalesSetup."Shipment on Invoice" THEN
                    NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Shipping No. Series",ServSetupG."Posted Shipment Nos.");
      // Stop EU.0083728
                END ELSE BEGIN
      // Stop INC
                  IF ("No. Series" <> '') AND
                     (SalesSetup."Invoice Nos." = SalesSetup."Posted Invoice Nos.")
                  THEN
                    "Posting No. Series" := "No. Series"
                  ELSE
                    NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Invoice Nos.");
      // Start EU.0083728
                  IF SalesSetup."Shipment on Invoice" THEN
                    NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Shipping No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Shipment Nos.");
                END;
      // Stop EU.0083728
              END;
            "Document Type"::"Return Order":
              BEGIN
                NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Credit Memo Nos.");
                NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Return Receipt No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Return Receipt Nos.");
              END;
            "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
      // Start INC
              IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::Service THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA032651
                ServSetupG.GET;
      // Stop PA032651
                IF SalesSetup."Return Receipt on Credit Memo" THEN
                  NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Return Receipt No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Return Receipt Nos.");
                IF IntDocPostG.CheckCustomerInternal("Bill-to Customer No.") THEN BEGIN
                  NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",ServSetupG."Internal Credit Memo Nos.");
                END ELSE BEGIN
                  IF ("No. Series" <> '') AND
                     (ServSetupG."Credit Memo Nos." = ServSetupG."Posted Credit Memo Nos.")
                  THEN
                    "Posting No. Series" := "No. Series"
                  ELSE
                    NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",ServSetupG."Posted Credit Memo Nos.");
      // Start EU.0083728
                  IF SalesSetup."Return Receipt on Credit Memo" THEN
                    NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Return Receipt No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Return Receipt Nos.");
      // Stop EU.0083728
                END;
              END ELSE BEGIN
      // Stop INC
                IF ("No. Series" <> '') AND
                   (SalesSetup."Credit Memo Nos." = SalesSetup."Posted Credit Memo Nos.")
                THEN
                  "Posting No. Series" := "No. Series"
                ELSE
                  NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Credit Memo Nos.");
                IF SalesSetup."Return Receipt on Credit Memo" THEN
                  NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Return Receipt No. Series",SalesSetup."Posted Return Receipt Nos.");
              END;
          END;
      // Start INC

      CASE "Document Type" OF
        "Document Type"::Order,"Document Type"::Invoice,"Document Type"::Quote:
          BEGIN
      // Start PA037813
      // Start PA041187.94278
            IF ("Document Type" <> "Document Type"::Order) OR ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases") THEN
      // Stop PA041187.94278
      // Stop PA037813
              "Shipment Date" := WORKDATE;
            IF IsImporter THEN BEGIN
              IMSSetupG.GET;
              "Shipment Date" := CALCDATE(IMSSetupG."Def. Shipment Date Lead",WORKDATE);
            END;
            "Order Date" := WORKDATE;
          END;
        "Document Type"::"Return Order":
          "Order Date":= WORKDATE;
      END;
      // Stop INC
      // Start EU.0172844.172842
      IF ("Posting Date" = 0D) THEN
      // Stop EU.0172844.172842
        "Posting Date" := WORKDATE;
      "Document Date" := WORKDATE;
      // Start INC
      "Order Date" := WORKDATE;
      IF ("Document Type" = "Document Type"::Quote) THEN
        "Order Date" := WORKDATE;
      IF "Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Return Order","Document Type"::"Credit Memo"] THEN BEGIN
      // Stop INC
        GLSetup.GET;
        Correction := GLSetup."Mark Cr. Memos as Corrections";
      END;
      "Posting Description" := FORMAT("Document Type") + ' ' + "No.";
      // Start INC
      SetStatus(DocStatusLineG.Type::Created);
      "Location Code" := UserSessionG.GetLocation;
      "Branch Code" := UserSessionG.GetBranchCode("Location Code");
      IF "Location Code" = '' THEN
        IF CurrFieldNo > 0 THEN
          MESSAGE(C_INC009,USERID);
      IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases" THEN
        "Vehicle Unit Price Date" := WORKDATE;
      // Stop INC
      // Start PA041895
      // Start PA032450
      ReservSetupG.GET;
      "Req. Wksh. Template Name" := ReservSetupG."Auto Req. Wksh. Template";
      // Start PA041510
      "Requisition Wksh. Name" := ReqWorksheetFuncG.GetDefReqWorksheetName(
        "Req. Wksh. Template Name", "Location Code", "Purch. Order Type", "Shortcut Dimension 2 Code", TRUE);
      // Stop PA041510
      // Start PA045176
      IF ("Location Code" <> '') AND ("Req. Wksh. Template Name" <> '') THEN BEGIN
        IF LocationL.GET("Location Code") AND (LocationL."Auto Req. Wksh. Name" <> '') THEN
          "Requisition Wksh. Name" := LocationL."Auto Req. Wksh. Name";
      END;
      // Stop PA045176
      // Stop PA032450
      // Stop PA041895
      // Start EU.0005640
      IF ("Document Type" = "Document Type"::"Credit Memo") AND ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::Service) THEN
        "Reship Credited Items" := ServSetupG."Reship Credited Items";
      // Stop EU.0005640

      // Start PA036544
      ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function",ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,'InitRecord');
      // Stop PA036544
    END;

    PROCEDURE AssistEdit@1(OldSalesHeader@1109400000 : Record 36) : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      WITH SalesHeader DO BEGIN
        SalesHeader := Rec;
        SalesSetup.GET;
      // Start INC
        ServSetupG.GET;
      // Stop INC
        TestNoSeries;
        IF NoSeriesMgt.SelectSeries(GetNoSeriesCode,OldSalesHeader."No. Series","No. Series") THEN BEGIN
          SalesSetup.GET;
          TestNoSeries;
          NoSeriesMgt.SetSeries("No.");
          Rec := SalesHeader;
          EXIT(TRUE);
        END;
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE TestNoSeries@6() : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA036544
      IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function",ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,'TestNoSeries') THEN
        EXIT;
      ServSetupG.GET;
      // Stop PA036544

      // Start EU.0114065
      IF "General Document" THEN BEGIN
        CASE "Document Type" OF
          "Document Type"::Invoice:
            BEGIN
              SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Gen. Sales Invoice Nos.");
              SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Posted Gen. Sales Invoice Nos.");
            END;
          "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
            BEGIN
              SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Gen. Sales Cr. Memo Nos.");
              SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Posted Gen. Sales Cr. Memo");
            END;
        END;
      END ELSE
      // Stop EU.0114065
      // Start INC
        IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases" THEN BEGIN
          CASE "Document Type" OF
            "Document Type"::Quote:
              SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Vehicle Quote Nos.");
            "Document Type"::Order:
              SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Vehicle Order Nos.");
            "Document Type"::Invoice:
              BEGIN
                SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Vehicle Invoice Nos.");
                SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Posted Vehicle Invoice Nos.");
              END;
            "Document Type"::"Return Order":
              SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Vehicle Return Order Nos.");
            "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
              BEGIN
                SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Vehicle Credit Memo Nos.");
                SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Posted Vehicle Cr. Memo Nos.");
              END;
          END;
        END ELSE
      // Stop INC
          CASE "Document Type" OF
            "Document Type"::Quote:
              SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Quote Nos.");
            "Document Type"::Order:
              SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Order Nos.");
            "Document Type"::Invoice:
              BEGIN
      // Start INC
                IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::Service THEN BEGIN
                  ServSetupG.TESTFIELD("Invoice Nos.");
                  ServSetupG.TESTFIELD("Posted Invoice Nos.");
                END ELSE BEGIN
      // Stop INC
                  SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Invoice Nos.");
                  SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Posted Invoice Nos.");
      // Start INC
                END;
      // Stop INC
              END;
      // Start INC
            "Document Type"::"Return Order":
              SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Return Order Nos.");
      // Stop INC
            "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
              BEGIN
      // Start INC
                IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::Service THEN BEGIN
                  ServSetupG.TESTFIELD("Credit Memo Nos.");
                  ServSetupG.TESTFIELD("Posted Credit Memo Nos.");
                END ELSE BEGIN
                  SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Credit Memo Nos.");
                  SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Posted Credit Memo Nos.");
                END;
      // Stop INC
              END;
            "Document Type"::"Blanket Order":
              SalesSetup.TESTFIELD("Blanket Order Nos.");
          END;

      // Start INC
      IF IsImporter THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA034521.I001387
        IF NOT UserSessionG.GetBatchProcess THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA034521.I001387
          IMSSetupG.GET;
          IF ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases") AND
             ("Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::Quote,"Document Type"::Order,"Document Type"::Invoice])
          THEN
            IF IMMDealerMgmtG.GetDealer() <> '' THEN
              "Purch. Order Type" := IMMDealerMgmtG.GetDealerPurchOrderTypes(0) // Def. Purch. Order Type
            ELSE
              "Purch. Order Type" := IMSSetupG."Def. Purch. Order Type";
      // Start PA033760
          END;
      // Stop PA033760
      END;
      // Stop INC
      // Start PA036544
      ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function",ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,'TestNoSeries');
      // Stop PA036544
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE GetNoSeriesCode@9() : Code[10];
    BEGIN
      // Start PA036544
      IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function",ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,'GetNoSeriesCode') THEN
        EXIT("No. Series");
      // Stop PA036544
      // Start EU.0114065
      IF "General Document" THEN BEGIN
        CASE "Document Type" OF
          "Document Type"::Invoice:
            EXIT(SalesSetup."Gen. Sales Invoice Nos.");
          "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
            EXIT(SalesSetup."Gen. Sales Cr. Memo Nos.");
        END;
      END;
      // Stop EU.0114065
      // Start INC
      IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases" THEN BEGIN
        CASE "Document Type" OF
          "Document Type"::Quote:
            EXIT(SalesSetup."Vehicle Quote Nos.");
          "Document Type"::Order:
            EXIT(SalesSetup."Vehicle Order Nos.");
          "Document Type"::Invoice:
            EXIT(SalesSetup."Vehicle Invoice Nos.");
          "Document Type"::"Return Order":
            EXIT(SalesSetup."Vehicle Return Order Nos.");
          "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
            EXIT(SalesSetup."Vehicle Credit Memo Nos.");
        END;
      END ELSE
        IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::Service THEN BEGIN
          CASE "Document Type" OF
            "Document Type"::Quote:
              EXIT(ServSetupG."Quote Nos.");
            "Document Type"::Order:
              EXIT(ServSetupG."Order Nos.");
            "Document Type"::Invoice:
              EXIT(ServSetupG."Invoice Nos.");
            "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
      // Stop INC
              EXIT(ServSetupG."Credit Memo Nos.");
          END;
        END ELSE
          CASE "Document Type" OF
            "Document Type"::Quote:
              EXIT(SalesSetup."Quote Nos.");
            "Document Type"::Order:
              EXIT(SalesSetup."Order Nos.");
            "Document Type"::Invoice:
              EXIT(SalesSetup."Invoice Nos.");
      // Start INC
            "Document Type"::"Return Order":
              EXIT(SalesSetup."Return Order Nos.");
      // Stop INC
            "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
              EXIT(SalesSetup."Credit Memo Nos.");
            "Document Type"::"Blanket Order":
              EXIT(SalesSetup."Blanket Order Nos.");
          END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE GetPostingNoSeriesCode@8() : Code[10];
    BEGIN
      // Start PA036544
      IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function",ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,'GetPostingNoSeriesCode') THEN
        EXIT("Posting No. Series");
      // Stop PA036544
      // Start INC
      // Start PA034291
      IF Prepayment THEN BEGIN
        IF "Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Credit Memo"] THEN
          EXIT(SalesSetup."Posted Prepmt. Cr. Memo. Nos");
        EXIT(SalesSetup."Posted Prepmt. Inv. Nos");
      END;
      // Stop PA034291
      IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases" THEN BEGIN
        IF "Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Return Order","Document Type"::"Credit Memo"] THEN
          EXIT(SalesSetup."Posted Vehicle Cr. Memo Nos.");
        EXIT(SalesSetup."Posted Vehicle Invoice Nos.");
      END ELSE BEGIN
        IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::Service THEN BEGIN
          IF "Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Return Order","Document Type"::"Credit Memo"] THEN
            EXIT(ServSetupG."Posted Credit Memo Nos.");
          EXIT(ServSetupG."Posted Invoice Nos.");
        END ELSE BEGIN
          IF "Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Return Order","Document Type"::"Credit Memo"] THEN
            EXIT(SalesSetup."Posted Credit Memo Nos.");
          EXIT(SalesSetup."Posted Invoice Nos.");
        END;
      END;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE ConfirmDeletion@11() : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      SalesPost.TestDeleteHeader(Rec,SalesShptHeader,SalesInvHeader,SalesCrMemoHeader,ReturnRcptHeader);
      // Stop INC
      IF SalesShptHeader."No." <> '' THEN
        IF NOT CONFIRM(
             Text008 +
             Text009 +
             Text010,TRUE,
             SalesShptHeader."No.")
        THEN
          EXIT;
      IF SalesInvHeader."No." <> '' THEN
        IF NOT CONFIRM(
             Text011 +
             Text012 +
             Text010,TRUE,
             SalesInvHeader."No.")
        THEN
          EXIT;
      IF SalesCrMemoHeader."No." <> '' THEN
        IF NOT CONFIRM(
             Text013 +
             Text014 +
             Text010,TRUE,
             SalesCrMemoHeader."No.")
        THEN
          EXIT;
      // Start INC
      IF ReturnRcptHeader."No." <> '' THEN
        IF NOT CONFIRM(
           Text029 +
           Text030 +
           Text010,TRUE,
           SalesCrMemoHeader."No.")
        THEN
          EXIT;
      // Stop INC
      EXIT(TRUE);
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE GetCust@2(CustNo@1000 : Code[20]);
    BEGIN
      // Start PA036544
      ExitPointParamG."Customer No. 1" := CustNo;
      IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function",ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,'GetCust') THEN
        EXIT;
      // Stop PA036544
      IF CustNo <> Cust."No." THEN
        Cust.GET(CustNo);
    END;

    PROCEDURE SalesLinesExist@3() : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      SalesLine.RESET;
      SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
      SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
      EXIT(SalesLine.FINDFIRST);
    END;

    PROCEDURE RecreateSalesLines@4(ChangedFieldName@1000 : Text[100]);
    VAR
      SalesLineTmp@1001 : TEMPORARY Record 37;
      _INCADEA_@1109400000 : Integer;
      SalesLineTmp4@1109400005 : TEMPORARY Record 37;
      VehTradeInL@1109400002 : Record 5025442;
      VariOptL@1109400003 : Record 5025424;
      ServiceLineL@1101175180 : Record 5025625;
      CurrencyFactorOld@1109400008 : Decimal;
      CurrencyFactorNew@1109400009 : Decimal;
      BelongsToSaveLineNoL@1109400010 : Codeunit 379;
      TempVehicleLinenumber@1109400011 : Integer;
      DepItemMakeSetupL@1101257463 : Record 5205395;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0128664.129225
      OnBeforeRecreateSalesLinesEvent(Rec);
      // Stop EU.0128664.129225
      IF SalesLinesExist THEN BEGIN
      // Start INC
      // Start PA033343
        IF HideValidationDialog OR NOT GUIALLOWED THEN
      // Start PA033343
      // Stop INC
          Confirmed := TRUE
        ELSE
      // Start PA041187.91179
          IF NOT Confirmed THEN
            Confirmed :=
              CONFIRM(
                Text015 +
                Text004,FALSE,ChangedFieldName);
      // Stop PA041187.91179
      // Start EU.0142312
      // Start PA034047
      // Start PA034291
        IF ("Service Order No." > '') AND NOT Prepayment THEN BEGIN
          ServiceLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type",ServiceLineL."Document Type"::Order);
      // Start EU.0012448.13245
          ServiceLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","Service Order No.");
      // Stop EU.0012448.13245
          ServiceLineL.SETFILTER("Quantity Shipped", '<>0');
          IF ServiceLineL.FINDFIRST THEN
            ServiceLineL.TESTFIELD("Quantity Shipped",0);
        END;
      // Stop PA034291
      // Stop PA034047
      // Stop EU.0142312
        IF Confirmed THEN BEGIN
          SalesLine.LOCKTABLE;

          SalesLine.RESET;
          SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
          SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
          IF SalesLine.FINDSET THEN BEGIN
      // Start EU.0070058
            REPEAT
      // Start EU.0203951.207654
              IF NOT (ChangedFieldName IN [FIELDCAPTION("VAT Bus. Posting Group"), FIELDCAPTION("Sell-to Customer No.")]) THEN
      // Stop EU.0203951.207654
                SalesLine.TESTFIELD("Quantity Shipped",0);
      // Stop EU.0070058
              SalesLine.TESTFIELD("Quantity Invoiced",0);
              SalesLine.TESTFIELD("Return Qty. Received",0);
              SalesLine.TESTFIELD("Reserved Qty. (Base)",0);
              SalesLine.TESTFIELD("Shipment No.",'');
              SalesLine.TESTFIELD("Purchase Order No.",'');
              SalesLine.TESTFIELD("Return Receipt No.",'');
              SalesLine.TESTFIELD("Blanket Order No.",'');
      // Start EU.0070058
            UNTIL SalesLine.NEXT = 0;
            VariOptL.ChangeLineNoPartOne(VariOptL.Area::Sale, "Document Type", "No.");
            VehTradeInL.ChangeLineNoPartOne("Document Type", "No.");
            SalesLine.FINDSET;
            REPEAT
      // Stop EU.0070058
              SalesLineTmp := SalesLine;
              SalesLineTmp.INSERT;
      // Start INC
              IF (SalesLine.Type = SalesLine.Type::" ") AND (SalesLine."Attached to Line No." > 0) THEN BEGIN
                SalesLineTmp4 := SalesLine;
                SalesLineTmp4."Line No." := SalesLine."Attached to Line No.";
                IF SalesLineTmp4.INSERT THEN
                  ;
              END;
              SalesLine.OnDeleteDeleteSubTables();
      // Stop INC
            UNTIL SalesLine.NEXT = 0;
      // Start INC
            DeleteInstallment();
      // Stop INC
            SalesLine.DELETEALL;
      // Start PA036549.34660

      // Start AP2263
            SalesLine.SetxSalesHeader(xRec);
      // Stop AP2263
            SalesLine.SetSalesHeader(Rec);
            SalesLine.SkipUpdateStatus(TRUE);
      // Stop PA036549.34660
            SalesLine.INIT;
            SalesLine."Line No." := 0;
            SalesLineTmp.FINDSET;
      // Start INC
            REPEAT
              IF (SalesLineTmp."Attached to Line No." = 0) OR
                 (SalesLineTmp.Type <> SalesLineTmp.Type::" ")
              THEN BEGIN
                SalesLine.INIT;
      // Start PA045564
                SalesLine."Line No." := SalesLineTmp."Line No.";
      // Stop PA045564
                SalesLine.VALIDATE(Type,SalesLineTmp.Type);
      // Start PA044965
                IF SalesLineTmp."No." > '' THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA044965
                  SalesLine."Item Type" := SalesLineTmp."Item Type";
                  SalesLine."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" := SalesLineTmp."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code";
                  SalesLine."Order Type" := SalesLineTmp."Order Type";
                  SalesLine."Additional Item" := SalesLineTmp."Additional Item";
                  SalesLine."Quantity Multiplier" := SalesLineTmp."Quantity Multiplier";
                  IF SalesLine."Sell-to Customer No." = "Sell-to Customer No." THEN BEGIN
                    SalesLine."Gen. Bus. Posting Group" := "Gen. Bus. Posting Group";
                    SalesLine."VAT Bus. Posting Group" := "VAT Bus. Posting Group";
                  END;
                  IF IsImporter THEN
                    IF SalesLine."Sell-to Customer No." <> "Sell-to Customer No." THEN BEGIN
                      VehicleStocklistG.RESET;
                      VehicleStocklistG.SETCURRENTKEY(VIN,"Book No.");
                      VehicleStocklistG.SETRANGE(VIN,SalesLineTmp.VIN);
                      VehicleStocklistG.SETRANGE("Book No.",SalesLineTmp."Book No.");
                      IF VehicleStocklistG.FINDFIRST THEN
                        IF VehicleStocklistG."Retail Customer No." =  SalesLineTmp."Sell-to Customer No." THEN BEGIN
                          VehicleStocklistG."Retail Customer No." := "Sell-to Customer No.";
                          VehicleStocklistG."Retail Customer Name" := "Sell-to Customer Name";
                          VehicleStocklistG.MODIFY(TRUE);
                        END;
                    END;
                  SalesLine."Vehicle Status" := SalesLineTmp."Vehicle Status";
                  SalesLine."No." := SalesLineTmp."No.";
      // Start EU.0142312
                  SalesLine."Vehicle Line No." := SalesLineTmp."Vehicle Line No.";
                  IF (SalesLine."Item Type" = SalesLine."Item Type"::Vehicle) AND (SalesLineTmp.VIN > '') THEN BEGIN
                    SalesLine.VALIDATE(VIN,SalesLineTmp.VIN);
                    SalesLine.Promotion := SalesLineTmp.Promotion;
                    SalesLine."Promotion Price incl. VAT" := SalesLineTmp."Promotion Price incl. VAT";
                  END ELSE
      // Stop EU.0142312
                    SalesLine.VALIDATE("No.",SalesLineTmp."No.");
                  SalesLine."Shortcut Dimension 1 Code" := SalesLineTmp."Shortcut Dimension 1 Code";
                  SalesLine."From Purch. Document Type" := SalesLineTmp."From Purch. Document Type";
                  SalesLine."From Purch. Document No." := SalesLineTmp."From Purch. Document No.";
                  SalesLine."From Purch. Line No." := SalesLineTmp."From Purch. Line No.";
      // Start EU.0143914.144749
                  SalesLine."Service Order No." := SalesLineTmp."Service Order No.";
                  SalesLine."Service Order Line No." := SalesLineTmp."Service Order Line No.";
      // Stop EU.0143914.144749
                  IF SalesLineTmp.Quantity <> 0 THEN BEGIN
      // Start EU.0203951.207654
                    SalesLine.VALIDATE("Quantity Shipped", SalesLineTmp."Quantity Shipped");
                    SalesLine.VALIDATE("Qty. Shipped Not Invoiced", SalesLineTmp."Qty. Shipped Not Invoiced");
      // Stop EU.0203951.207654
                    SalesLine.VALIDATE(Quantity, SalesLineTmp.Quantity);
                    SalesLine.VALIDATE("Qty. to Ship", SalesLineTmp."Qty. to Ship");
                  END;
                  SalesLine."Customer Group Code" := "Customer Group Code";
                  IF SalesLineTmp.VIN <> '' THEN
      // Start EU.0142312
                    IF SalesLine."Item Type" <> SalesLine."Item Type"::Vehicle THEN BEGIN
      // Stop EU.0142312
                      SalesLine.VIN := SalesLineTmp.VIN;
      // Start PA041187.88343
                      SalesLine."Supply VIN" := SalesLineTmp."Supply VIN";
                      SalesLine."Reference License No." := SalesLineTmp."Reference License No.";
      // Stop PA041187.88343
                      SalesLine."Book No." := SalesLineTmp."Book No.";
                      SalesLine."Serial No." := SalesLineTmp."Serial No.";
                      SalesLine."Vehicle Line No." := TempVehicleLinenumber;
                      SalesLine."Vehicle Status" := SalesLineTmp."Vehicle Status";
                      SalesLine."Shortcut Dimension 1 Code" := SalesLineTmp."Shortcut Dimension 1 Code";
                      SalesLine."Posting Group" := SalesLineTmp."Posting Group";
                      SalesLine."Gen. Prod. Posting Group" := SalesLineTmp."Gen. Prod. Posting Group";
      // Start PA044965
      // Stop PA044965
                      SalesLine."From Veh. Opt.Inv. Doc. Type" := SalesLineTmp."From Veh. Opt.Inv. Doc. Type";
                      SalesLine."From Veh. Option Inv. Doc. No." := SalesLineTmp."From Veh. Option Inv. Doc. No.";
                      SalesLine."From Veh. Opt.Inv. Doc. Line" := SalesLineTmp."From Veh. Opt.Inv. Doc. Line";
                      SalesLine."From Veh. Opt.Inv. Line Type" := SalesLineTmp."From Veh. Opt.Inv. Line Type";
                      SalesLine."From Veh. Option Inv. No." := SalesLineTmp."From Veh. Option Inv. No.";
                      SalesLine."From Veh. Opt.Inv. IntCode" := SalesLineTmp."From Veh. Opt.Inv. IntCode";
                      SalesLine."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" := SalesLineTmp."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code";
                      SalesLine."Veh. Opt. Line No." := SalesLineTmp."Veh. Opt. Line No.";
                    END;
      // Start PA044965
                  SalesLine.Description := SalesLineTmp.Description;
                  SalesLine."Description 2" := SalesLineTmp."Description 2";
      // Stop PA044965
      // Start EU.0169755.170300
                END ELSE
                  SalesLine := SalesLineTmp;
      // Stop EU.0169755.170300
      // Start PA044507
                SalesLine."Attached to Line No." := BelongsToSaveLineNoL.TransferExtendedText(         // "Attached to Line No." must be set before VALIDATE(Quantity),
                  SalesLineTmp."Line No.", SalesLine."Line No.", SalesLineTmp."Attached to Line No."); // or else the "Tranfer Fees" "Unit Price" will not be found.
      // Stop PA044507
      // Start EU.0142312
      // Start EU.0141665.144336
                IF ChangedFieldName IN [FIELDCAPTION("Currency Factor"), FIELDCAPTION("Currency Code")] THEN
      // Stop EU.0141665.144336
                  IF SalesLine.Type <> SalesLine.Type::" " THEN BEGIN
      // Stop EU.0142312
                    SalesLine.VALIDATE("Unit Cost (LCY)",SalesLineTmp."Unit Cost (LCY)");
                    IF (SalesLine."Unit Price" = 0) AND (SalesLineTmp."Unit Price" <> 0) THEN BEGIN
                      CurrencyFactorNew := "Currency Factor";
                      IF CurrencyFactorNew = 0 THEN
                        CurrencyFactorNew := 1;
                      CurrencyFactorOld := xRec."Currency Factor";
                      IF CurrencyFactorOld = 0 THEN
                        CurrencyFactorOld := 1;
                      IF CurrencyFactorOld = CurrencyFactorNew THEN BEGIN
                        SalesLine.VALIDATE("Unit Price", SalesLineTmp."Unit Price");
                      END ELSE BEGIN
                        IF "Currency Code" = '' THEN
                          CurrencyG.InitRoundingPrecision()
                        ELSE
                          CurrencyG.GET("Currency Code");
                        SalesLine.VALIDATE("Unit Price",
                          ROUND((SalesLineTmp."Unit Price" / CurrencyFactorOld * CurrencyFactorNew),
      // Start EU.0142312
                          CurrencyG."Unit-Amount Rounding Precision"));
      // Stop EU.0142312
                      END;
      // Start EU.0045729
                      IF SalesLine.Quantity <> 0 THEN BEGIN
      // Stop EU.0045729
      // Start PA033251
                        IF IsImporter THEN BEGIN
                          SalesLine.SetValidateAvailableQty(TRUE);
                          SalesLine.VALIDATE(Quantity, SalesLine.Quantity);
                          SalesLine.SetValidateAvailableQty(FALSE);
                        END ELSE
      // Stop PA033251
                          SalesLine.VALIDATE(Quantity, SalesLine.Quantity);
      // Start EU.0045729
                        SalesLine.VALIDATE("Qty. to Ship", SalesLineTmp."Qty. to Ship");
                      END;
      // Stop EU.0045729
      // Start PA042864
      // Start EU.0142312
      // Stop PA042864
                    END;
                  END;
      // Start EU.0156444.157741
      // Stop EU.0142312.157741
      // Start PA034291
                IF Prepayment THEN
                  SalesLine."Prepayment Line" := TRUE;
      // Stop PA034291
      // Start EU.0056707
                SalesLine."Tour Code" := SalesLineTmp."Tour Code";
      // Stop EU.0056707
      // Start PA044507
      // Stop PA044507
      // Start PA035597
                UpdateDimSetID();
      // Stop PA035597
                SalesLine.INSERT;
      // Start EU.0121768.123090
      // Stop EU.0121768.123090
                IF SalesLine."Item Type" = SalesLine."Item Type"::Vehicle THEN BEGIN
                  TempVehicleLinenumber := SalesLine."Line No.";
                  OptionVariantG.SETRANGE(Area, OptionVariantG.Area::Sale);
                  OptionVariantG.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
                  OptionVariantG.SETRANGE("Document No.", SalesLine."Document No.");
                  OptionVariantG.SETRANGE("Document Line No.", SalesLine."Line No.");
                  IF OptionVariantG.FINDFIRST THEN
                    OptionVariantG.DELETEALL;  //Delete the new ones first
                  VariOptL.ChangeLineNoPartTwo(SalesLineTmp."Line No.", SalesLine."Line No.");
      // Start EU.0121768.123090
      // Stop EU.0121768.123090
      // Start PA042864
                  SalesLine.Description := SalesLineTmp.Description;
      // Start PA042864
                  SalesLine.MODIFY;
                END;
      // Start EU.0121768.123090
                SalesLine.SalesPriceCalculation();
                IF SalesLine."Item Type" = SalesLine."Item Type"::Vehicle THEN
                  SalesLine.GetOptionPrice();
      // Stop EU.0121768.123090
      // Start EU.0159757.159868
                SalesLine.MODIFY;
      // Stop EU.0159757.159868
      // Start EU.0180475.180550
      // Stop EU.0180475.180550
                VehTradeInL.ChangeLineNoPartTwo(SalesLineTmp."Line No.", SalesLine."Line No.");
      // Start PA033985.19213
                IF (ChangedFieldName = FIELDCAPTION("Sell-to Customer No.")) THEN
                  SalesLine.CalcSalesIncentives(TRUE);
      // Stop PA033985.19213
      // Start PA035101.19493
                IF SalesLine."Additional Item" = SalesLine."Additional Item"::Deposit THEN BEGIN
                  DepItemMakeSetupL.CheckDepositSalesLine2(SalesLine);
                  SalesLine.MODIFY;
                END;
      // Stop PA035101.19493
                SalesLine.FINDLAST;
              END;
            UNTIL SalesLineTmp.NEXT = 0;
      // Start EU.0180475.180550
      // Start EU.0195242
            IF SalesLineTmp4.FINDSET THEN
              REPEAT
                SalesLine.GET(SalesLineTmp.RECORDID);
                IF TransferExtendedText.SalesCheckIfAnyExtText(SalesLine,TRUE) THEN BEGIN
                  TransferExtendedText.InsertSalesExtText(SalesLine);
                  SalesLineTmp4.DELETE;
                END;
              UNTIL SalesLineTmp4.NEXT = 0;
            IF SalesLineTmp4.FINDSET THEN
              REPEAT
                SalesLineTmp.SETRANGE(Type, SalesLineTmp4.Type::" ");
                SalesLineTmp.SETRANGE("Attached to Line No.", SalesLineTmp4."Line No.");
                IF SalesLineTmp.FINDSET THEN
                  REPEAT
                    SalesLine := SalesLineTmp;
                    SalesLine."Sell-to Customer No." := "Sell-to Customer No.";
                    SalesLine.INSERT;
                  UNTIL SalesLineTmp.NEXT = 0;
              UNTIL SalesLineTmp4.NEXT = 0;
            SalesLineTmp.RESET;
      // Stop EU.0195242
      // Stop EU.0180475.180550
            SalesLineTmp4.DELETEALL;
            SalesLineTmp.DELETEALL;
            SubtotalsG.CalculateSalesLine(Rec);
          END;
        END ELSE
          ERROR(
            Text017,ChangedFieldName);
        Rec.GET("Document Type","No.");
      // Stop INC
      // Start EU.0142312
      // Stop EU.0142312
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE MessageIfSalesLinesExist@5(ChangedFieldName@1000 : Text[100]);
    BEGIN
      IF SalesLinesExist AND NOT HideValidationDialog THEN
        MESSAGE(
          Text018 +
          Text019,
          ChangedFieldName);
    END;

    PROCEDURE PriceMessageIfSalesLinesExist@7(ChangedFieldName@1000 : Text[100]);
    BEGIN
      IF SalesLinesExist AND NOT HideValidationDialog THEN
        MESSAGE(
          Text018 +
          Text020,ChangedFieldName);
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE UpdateCurrencyFactor@12();
    BEGIN
      IF "Currency Code" <> '' THEN BEGIN
        IF "Document Type" <> "Document Type"::Quote THEN
      // Start PA041960.87198
          IF "Posting Date" <> 0D THEN BEGIN
            CurrencyDate := "Posting Date"
          END ELSE BEGIN
            CurrencyDate := WORKDATE;
          END
      // Stop PA041960.87198
        ELSE
          CurrencyDate := WORKDATE;

        "Currency Factor" := CurrExchRate.ExchangeRate(CurrencyDate,"Currency Code");
      END ELSE
        "Currency Factor" := 0;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ConfirmUpdateCurrencyFactor@13();
    BEGIN
      // Start PA033162
      IF HideValidationDialog OR NOT GUIALLOWED THEN
      // Stop PA033162
        Confirmed := TRUE
      ELSE
      // Start EU.0142312
        IF NOT SalesLinesExist() THEN
          Confirmed := TRUE
        ELSE
      // Stop EU.0142312
          Confirmed := CONFIRM(Text021,FALSE);
      IF Confirmed THEN
        VALIDATE("Currency Factor")
      ELSE
        "Currency Factor" := xRec."Currency Factor";
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetHideValidationDialog@14(NewHideValidationDialog@1000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      HideValidationDialog := NewHideValidationDialog;
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateSalesLines@15(ChangedFieldName@1000 : Text[100]);
    VAR
      ItemL@1055600 : Record 27;
    BEGIN
      IF SalesLinesExist THEN BEGIN
        SalesLine.LOCKTABLE;
        MODIFY;

        SalesLine.RESET;
        SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
        SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
        IF SalesLine.FINDSET THEN
      // Start PA041023
          IF (ChangedFieldName = FIELDNAME("Supply VIN")) AND ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases") THEN
            IF NOT CONFIRM(C_INC_UpdateOnVIN) THEN
              EXIT;
      // Stop PA041023
          REPEAT
            CASE ChangedFieldName OF
              FIELDNAME("Shipment Date"):
                SalesLine.VALIDATE("Shipment Date","Shipment Date");
              FIELDNAME("Currency Factor"):
      // Start PA034523.18585
                IF SalesLine.Type <> SalesLine.Type::" " THEN BEGIN
                  SalesLine.VALIDATE("Unit Price");
                  SalesLine.VALIDATE("Unit Cost (LCY)");
                END;
      // Stop PA034523.18585
              FIELDNAME("Transaction Type"):
                SalesLine.VALIDATE("Transaction Type","Transaction Type");
              FIELDNAME("Transport Method"):
                SalesLine.VALIDATE("Transport Method","Transport Method");
              FIELDNAME("Exit Point"):
                SalesLine.VALIDATE("Exit Point","Exit Point");
              FIELDNAME(Area):
                SalesLine.VALIDATE(Area,Area);
              FIELDNAME("Transaction Specification"):
                SalesLine.VALIDATE("Transaction Specification","Transaction Specification");
      // Start INC
              FIELDNAME("Purch. Order Type"):
                SalesLine.NewPriceDeterm();
              FIELDNAME("Item Sales Price Group"):
      // Start PA041187.69603
                IF SalesLine."Item Type" IN [SalesLine."Item Type"::Item] THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA041187.69603
                  SalesLine.NewPriceDeterm();
      // Stop INC
                  IF "Item Sales Price Group" = '' THEN
                    SalesLine.VALIDATE("Line Discount %");
      // Start INC
                END;
              FIELDNAME("Vehicle Sales Price Group"):
      // Start PA041187.69603
                IF SalesLine."Item Type" IN [SalesLine."Item Type"::Vehicle,SalesLine."Item Type"::"Veh. Transfer"] THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA041187.69603
                  SalesLine.NewPriceDeterm();
      // Stop INC
                  IF "Vehicle Sales Price Group" = '' THEN
                    SalesLine.VALIDATE("Line Discount %");
      // Start INC
                END;
              FIELDNAME("Option Sales Price Group"):
      // Start PA041187.69603
                IF SalesLine."Item Type" IN [SalesLine."Item Type"::"Own Option"] THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA041187.69603
                  SalesLine.NewPriceDeterm();
      // Stop INC
                  IF "Option Sales Price Group" = '' THEN
                    SalesLine.VALIDATE("Line Discount %");
      // Start INC
                END;
              FIELDNAME("Pick User ID"):
                IF (SalesLine."Qty. to Ship" <> 0) AND
                   (("Pick Release No." = 0) OR ("Pick Release No." = SalesLine."Pick Release No."))
                THEN BEGIN
                  SalesLine.SetSalesLineUpdate(TRUE);
                  SalesLine."Pick User ID" := "Pick User ID";
                END;
      // Stop INC
      // Start PA041023
              // Update "Supply VIN" and "Reference License No." Values in all Sales Inquiery Lines.
              FIELDNAME("Supply VIN"):
      // Start PA041023.87192
                IF (SalesLine.Type IN [SalesLine.Type::Item, SalesLine.Type::"Account (G/L)"]) AND (SalesLine."No." <> '') THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA041023.87192
                  SalesLine.VALIDATE("Supply VIN", "Supply VIN");
                  SalesLine.VALIDATE("Reference License No." , "Reference License No.");
                  IF ItemL.GET(SalesLine."No.") THEN
                    SalesLine.VALIDATE("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code", ItemL."Make Code")
      // Start PA041023.87058
      // Stop PA041023.87058
                END;
              FIELDNAME("Reference License No."):
      // Start PA041023.87192
                IF (SalesLine.Type IN [SalesLine.Type::Item, SalesLine.Type::"Account (G/L)"]) AND (SalesLine."No." <> '') THEN
      // Stop PA041023.87192
      // Start EU.0000497
                  IF "Supply VIN" > '' THEN
                    IF "Supply VIN" = SalesLine."Supply VIN" THEN
                      SalesLine.VALIDATE("Reference License No.", "Reference License No.");
      // Stop EU.0000497
      // Stop PA041023
            END;
            SalesLine.MODIFY(TRUE);
          UNTIL SalesLine.NEXT = 0;
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckCustomerCreated@18(Prompt@1000 : Boolean) : Boolean;
    VAR
      Cont@1001 : Record 5050;
      CreateCustomerReportL@1109400000 : Report 5047083;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF ("Bill-to Customer No." <> '') AND ("Sell-to Customer No." <> '') THEN
        EXIT(TRUE);

      IF Prompt THEN
        IF NOT CONFIRM(Text035,TRUE) THEN
          EXIT(FALSE);

      IF "Sell-to Customer No." = '' THEN BEGIN
        TESTFIELD("Sell-to Contact No.");
        Cont.GET("Sell-to Contact No.");
        CLEAR(CreateCustomerReportL);
        CreateCustomerReportL.SetProspect(Cont);
      // Start PA035398.19968
        IF NOT Prompt THEN
          CreateCustomerReportL.CreateWithoutQuestion();
      // Stop PA035398.19968
      // Start PA037938.51460
      // Stop PA037938.51460
        CreateCustomerReportL.RUNMODAL;
        COMMIT;
        GET("Document Type"::Quote,"No.");
      END;
      IF ("Bill-to Customer No." = '') AND ("Sell-to Customer No." <> '') THEN BEGIN
        TESTFIELD("Bill-to Contact No.");
        Cont.GET("Bill-to Contact No.");
        CLEAR(CreateCustomerReportL);
        CreateCustomerReportL.SetProspect(Cont);
      // Start PA035398.19968
        IF NOT Prompt THEN
          CreateCustomerReportL.CreateWithoutQuestion();
      // Stop PA035398.19968
        CreateCustomerReportL.RUNMODAL;
        COMMIT;
        GET("Document Type"::Quote,"No.");
      END;

      EXIT(("Bill-to Customer No." <> '') AND ("Sell-to Customer No." <> ''));
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateSellToCont@24(CustomerNo@1000 : Code[20]);
    VAR
      Cust@1004 : Record 18;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF Cust.GET(CustomerNo) THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA032178
        "Sell-to Contact No." := Cust.GetContactNo(CustomerNo);
      // Stop PA032178
        "Sell-to Contact" := Cust.Contact;
      END;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateBillToCont@27(CustomerNo@1000 : Code[20]);
    VAR
      Cust@1001 : Record 18;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF Cust.GET(CustomerNo) THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA032178
        "Bill-to Contact No." := Cust.GetContactNo(CustomerNo);
      // Stop PA032178
        "Bill-to Contact" := Cust.Contact;
      END;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateSellToCust@25(ContactNo@1002 : Code[20]);
    VAR
      Customer@1006 : Record 18;
      Cont@1005 : Record 5050;
      ContComp@1003 : Record 5050;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      "Sell-to Contact" := '';
      IF NOT Cont.GET(ContactNo) THEN
        EXIT;
      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(Cont);
      IF SalesHeaderExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function",ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,'UpdateSellToCust') THEN
        EXIT;
      // Stop PA036544

      "Sell-to Contact No." := Cont."No.";
      IF Cont.Type = Cont.Type::Person THEN BEGIN
        "Sell-to Contact" := Cont.Name;
        IF NOT ContComp.GET(Cont."Company No.") THEN
          ContComp := Cont;
      END ELSE BEGIN
        IF Customer.GET("Sell-to Customer No.") THEN
          "Sell-to Contact" := Customer.Contact;
        ContComp := Cont;
      END;

      AddressLinkG.RESET;
      AddressLinkG.SETRANGE("Address No.", ContComp."Address No.");
      AddressLinkG.SETRANGE(Type, AddressLinkG.Type::Customer);
      IF AddressLinkG.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
        IF ("Sell-to Customer No." <> '') AND ("Sell-to Customer No." <> AddressLinkG."No.") THEN
          ERROR(Text037, Cont."No.", Cont.Name,"Sell-to Customer No.")
        ELSE
          IF "Sell-to Customer No." = '' THEN BEGIN
            SkipSellToContactG := TRUE;
            VALIDATE("Sell-to Customer No.", AddressLinkG."No.");
            SkipSellToContactG := FALSE;
          END;
      END ELSE BEGIN
        IF "Document Type" <> "Document Type"::Quote THEN
          ERROR(Text039, Cont."No.", Cont.Name);
        Cont.TESTFIELD("Company No.");
        ContComp.GET(Cont."Company No.");
        "Sell-to Customer Name" := ContComp."Company Name";
        "Sell-to Customer Name 2" := ContComp."Name 2";
        "Sell-to Address" := ContComp.Address;
        "Sell-to Address 2" := ContComp."Address 2";
        "Sell-to City" := ContComp.City;
        "Sell-to Post Code" := ContComp."Post Code";
        "Sell-to County" := ContComp.County;
        "Sell-to Country Code" := ContComp."Country Code";
        "Ship-to Name" := ContComp."Company Name";
        "Ship-to Name 2" := ContComp."Name 2";
        "Ship-to Address" := ContComp.Address;
        "Ship-to Address 2" := ContComp."Address 2";
        "Ship-to City" := ContComp.City;
        "Ship-to Post Code" := ContComp."Post Code";
        "Ship-to County" := ContComp.County;
      // Start PA036544
        EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(ContComp);
        SalesHeaderExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function",ExitPointSetupG.Type::"Inside 1",'UpdateSellToCust');
      // Stop PA036544
        VALIDATE("Ship-to Country Code",ContComp."Country Code");
      END;

      IF ("Sell-to Customer No." = "Bill-to Customer No.") OR ("Bill-to Customer No." = '') THEN
        VALIDATE("Bill-to Contact No.","Sell-to Contact No.");
      // Stop INC
      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(Cont);
      SalesHeaderExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function",ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,'UpdateSelltoCust');
      // Stop PA036544
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateBillToCust@26(ContactNo@1000 : Code[20]);
    VAR
      Cust@1004 : Record 18;
      Cont@1003 : Record 5050;
      ContComp@1001 : Record 5050;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      "Bill-to Contact" := '';
      IF NOT Cont.GET(ContactNo) THEN
        EXIT;
      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(Cont);
      IF SalesHeaderExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function",ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,'UpdateBillToCust') THEN
        EXIT;
      // Stop PA036544
      "Bill-to Contact No." := Cont."No.";
      IF Cont.Type = Cont.Type::Person THEN
        "Bill-to Contact" := Cont.Name
      ELSE
        IF Cust.GET("Bill-to Customer No.") THEN
          "Bill-to Contact" := Cust.Contact;

      AddressLinkG.RESET;
      AddressLinkG.SETRANGE(Type, AddressLinkG.Type::Customer);
      AddressLinkG.SETRANGE("Address No.", Cont."Address No.");
      IF AddressLinkG.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
        IF "Bill-to Customer No." = '' THEN BEGIN
          SkipBillToContactG := TRUE;
          VALIDATE("Bill-to Customer No.",AddressLinkG."No.");
          SkipBillToContactG := FALSE;
        END ELSE
          IF "Bill-to Customer No." <> AddressLinkG."No." THEN
            ERROR(Text037, Cont."No.", Cont.Name,"Bill-to Customer No.");
      END ELSE BEGIN
        IF "Document Type" <> "Document Type"::Quote THEN
          ERROR(Text039,Cont."No.",Cont.Name);
        Cont.TESTFIELD("Company No.");
        ContComp.GET(Cont."Company No.");
        "Bill-to Name" := ContComp."Company Name";
        "Bill-to Name 2" := ContComp."Name 2";
        "Bill-to Address" := ContComp.Address;
        "Bill-to Address 2" := ContComp."Address 2";
        "Bill-to City" := ContComp.City;
        "Bill-to Post Code" := ContComp."Post Code";
        "Bill-to County" := ContComp.County;
        "Bill-to Country Code" := ContComp."Country Code";
      // Start PA036544
        EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(ContComp);
        SalesHeaderExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function",ExitPointSetupG.Type::"Inside 1",'UpdateBillToCust');
      // Stop PA036544
        "VAT Registration No." := ContComp."VAT Registration No.";
        VALIDATE("Currency Code",ContComp."Currency Code");
        "Language Code" := ContComp."Language Code";
      // Start PA036544
        EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(Cont);
        SalesHeaderExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function",ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,'UpdateBillToCust');
      // Stop PA036544
      END;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckCreditMaxBeforeInsert@28();
    VAR
      SalesHeader@1001 : Record 36;
      Cont@1003 : Record 5050;
      CustCheckCreditLimit@1000 : Codeunit 312;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF GETFILTER("Sell-to Customer No.") <> '' THEN BEGIN
        IF GETRANGEMIN("Sell-to Customer No.") = GETRANGEMAX("Sell-to Customer No.") THEN BEGIN
          SalesHeader."Bill-to Customer No." := GETRANGEMIN("Sell-to Customer No.");
          CustCheckCreditLimit.SalesHeaderCheck(SalesHeader);
        END
      END ELSE
        IF GETFILTER("Sell-to Contact No.") <> '' THEN
          IF GETRANGEMIN("Sell-to Contact No.") = GETRANGEMAX("Sell-to Contact No.") THEN BEGIN
            Cont.GET(GETRANGEMIN("Sell-to Contact No."));
            AddressLinkG.RESET;
            AddressLinkG.SETRANGE("Address No.", Cont."Address No.");
            AddressLinkG.SETRANGE(Type, AddressLinkG.Type::Customer);
            IF AddressLinkG.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
              SalesHeader."Bill-to Customer No." := AddressLinkG."No.";
              CustCheckCreditLimit.SalesHeaderCheck(SalesHeader);
            END;
          END;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowDocDim@32();
    VAR
      OldDimSetID@1000 : Integer;
    BEGIN
      OldDimSetID := "Dimension Set ID";
      "Dimension Set ID" :=
        DimMgt.EditDimensionSet2(
          "Dimension Set ID",STRSUBSTNO('%1 %2',"Document Type","No."),
          "Shortcut Dimension 1 Code","Shortcut Dimension 2 Code");
      IF OldDimSetID <> "Dimension Set ID" THEN BEGIN
        MODIFY;
        IF SalesLinesExist THEN
          UpdateAllLineDim("Dimension Set ID",OldDimSetID);
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE UpdateAllLineDim@34(NewParentDimSetID@1000 : Integer;OldParentDimSetID@1001 : Integer);
    VAR
      ExSalesLineL@14166500 : Record 37;
      NewDimSetID@1002 : Integer;
    BEGIN
      // Update all lines with changed dimensions.

      IF NewParentDimSetID = OldParentDimSetID THEN
        EXIT;
      // Start PA041187.91179
      // Stop PA041187.91179


      GLSetup.GET;
      SalesLine.RESET;
      SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
      SalesLine.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
      // Start EU.0141665.142411
      // Start PA041187.91179
      // Stop PA041187.91179
      SalesLine.LOCKTABLE;
      IF SalesLine.FINDSET THEN BEGIN
        IF NOT GetHideValidationDialog AND GUIALLOWED THEN
          IF NOT CONFIRM(Text064) THEN
            EXIT;
        REPEAT
      // Start PA041187.91179
      // Stop PA041187.91179
          ExSalesLineL := SalesLine;
          SalesLine.GetDepartment();
          IF SalesLine."Shortcut Dimension 1 Code" <> ExSalesLineL."Shortcut Dimension 1 Code" THEN
            SalesLine.UpdateDimSetID();
          SalesLine.MODIFY;
        UNTIL SalesLine.NEXT = 0;
      END;
      // Stop EU.0141665.142411
    END;

    PROCEDURE CreateDim@16(Type1@1000 : Integer;No1@1001 : Code[20];Type2@1002 : Integer;No2@1003 : Code[20];Type3@1004 : Integer;No3@1005 : Code[20]);
    VAR
      SourceCodeSetup@1010 : Record 242;
      TableID@1011 : ARRAY [10] OF Integer;
      No@1012 : ARRAY [10] OF Code[20];
      OldDimSetID@1013 : Integer;
      MakeCodeL@1109400000 : ARRAY [10] OF Code[20];
    BEGIN
      SourceCodeSetup.GET;
      TableID[1] := Type1;
      No[1] := No1;
      TableID[2] := Type2;
      No[2] := No2;
      TableID[3] := Type3;
      No[3] := No3;
      // Start PA036002.26254
      DimMgt.SetLineParam(DATABASE::Customer,TRUE);
      // Stop PA036002.26254
      OldDimSetID := "Dimension Set ID";
      // Start PA036002.27153
      "Dimension Set ID" := DimMgt.GetDefaultDimID(TableID,No,MakeCodeL,SourceCodeSetup.Sales,"Shortcut Dimension 1 Code","Shortcut Dimension 2 Code",0,0);
      // Stop PA036002.27153

      // Start PA044942
      ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function",ExitPointSetupG.Type::"Inside 1",'CreateDim');
      // Stop PA044942

      IF (OldDimSetID <> "Dimension Set ID") AND SalesLinesExist THEN BEGIN
        MODIFY;
        UpdateAllLineDim("Dimension Set ID",OldDimSetID);
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE ValidateShortcutDimCode@19(FieldNumber@1000 : Integer;VAR ShortcutDimCode@1001 : Code[20]);
    VAR
      OldDimSetID@1005 : Integer;
      RecordFoundL@1109400000 : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      OldDimSetID := "Dimension Set ID";
      DimMgt.ValidateShortcutDimValues(FieldNumber,ShortcutDimCode,"Dimension Set ID");
      // Start PA036549.32702
      RecordFoundL := TRUE;
      IF IsImporter THEN BEGIN
        IF IMMDealerMgmtG.GetDealer <> '' THEN BEGIN
          SalesHeader := Rec;
          RecordFoundL := SalesHeader.FIND('=');
        END;
      END;
      // Stop PA036549.32702
      IF "No." <> '' THEN
      // Start PA036549.32702
        IF RecordFoundL THEN
      // Stop PA036549.32702
          MODIFY;

      IF OldDimSetID <> "Dimension Set ID" THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA036549.32702
        IF RecordFoundL THEN
      // Stop PA036549.32702
          MODIFY;
      // Start PA044353
      // Stop PA044353
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE CancelBackgroundPosting@48();
    VAR
      SalesPostViaJobQueue@1000 : Codeunit 88;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA035901
      SalesPostViaJobQueue.CancelQueueEntry(Rec);
      // Stop PA035901
    END;

    PROCEDURE CalcInvDiscForHeader@45();
    VAR
      SalesInvDisc@1000 : Codeunit 60;
    BEGIN
      SalesSetup.GET;
      IF SalesSetup."Calc. Inv. Discount" THEN
        SalesInvDisc.CalculateIncDiscForHeader(Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE OpenSalesOrderStatistics@60();
    BEGIN
      CalcInvDiscForHeader;
      COMMIT;
      PAGE.RUNMODAL(PAGE::"Sales Order Statistics",Rec);
    END;

    [External]
    PROCEDURE GetDocTypeTxt@140() TypeText : Text[50];
    VAR
      IdentityManagement@1000 : Codeunit 9801;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0101361
      {IF "Document Type" = "Document Type"::Quote THEN
        IF IdentityManagement.IsInvAppId THEN
          TypeText := EstimateTxt;}

      TypeText := FORMAT("Document Type");

      OnAfterGetDocTypeText(Rec,TypeText);
      // Stop EU.0101361
    END;

    [External]
    PROCEDURE GetBillToNo@132() : Code[20];
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0101361
      IF ("Document Type" = "Document Type"::Quote) AND
         ("Bill-to Customer No." = '') AND ("Bill-to Contact No." <> '') //AND
         //("Bill-to Customer Template Code" <> '')
      // Stop EU.0101361
      THEN
        EXIT("Bill-to Contact No.");
      EXIT("Bill-to Customer No.");
    END;

    [Integration]
    LOCAL PROCEDURE OnAfterGetDocTypeText@257(VAR SalesHeader@1000 : Record 36;VAR TypeText@1001 : Text[50]);
    BEGIN
    END;

    PROCEDURE __INCADEA__@5025350();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __START_EXITPOINT__@5025455();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ExitPointCall@5025380(MakeCoddeP@1109400003 : Code[20];TriggerP@1109400002 : Integer;TypeP@1109400001 : Integer;ExitPointIDP@1109400000 : Text[50];VAR EPRecRefP@1109400005 : RecordRef) : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      EXIT(ExitPointUnitG.RunExitPoint(
        ExitPointSetupG."Object Type"::Table,
        DATABASE::"Sales Header",
        MakeCoddeP, TriggerP, TypeP, ExitPointIDP, EPRecRefP, EPRecRef2G, ExitPointParamG));
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ExitPoint@5025454(TriggerP@1119452001 : Integer;TypeP@1119432000 : Integer;ExitPointIDP@1119432001 : Text[50]) ReturnR : Boolean;
    VAR
      EPRecRefL@1109400004 : RecordRef;
    BEGIN
      // @ This local function works as ExitPoint wrapper function. It will control the ExitPointCheck function call.
      // @ It passes thru all the handshake parameter values.
      // @ It takes care to provide the processing records as RecordReference to the ExitPointCheck function.
      // @ When possible a Make Code is also identified and passed to the called ExitPointCheck function.

      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
      EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(xRec);
      ExitPointParamG."Called CurrFieldNo" := CurrFieldNo;
      ReturnR := ExitPointCall("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code", TriggerP, TypeP, ExitPointIDP, EPRecRefL);
      EPRecRefL.SETTABLE(Rec);
      CLEAR(EPRecRef2G);
      // Stop PA036544
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE SalesHeaderExitPoint@5025307(VAR SalesHdrP@1101342643 : Record 36;TriggerP@1109400002 : Integer;TypeP@1109400001 : Integer;ExitPointIDP@1109400000 : Text[50]) ReturnR : Boolean;
    VAR
      EPRecRefL@1109400004 : RecordRef;
    BEGIN
      // @ This local function works as ExitPoint wrapper function. It will control the ExitPointCheck function call.
      // @ It passes thru all the handshake parameter values.
      // @ It takes care to provide the processing records as RecordReference to the ExitPointCheck function.
      // @ When possible a Make Code is also identified and passed to the called ExitPointCheck function.

      EPRecRefL.GETTABLE(SalesHdrP);
      ReturnR := ExitPointCall(SalesHdrP."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code", TriggerP, TypeP, ExitPointIDP, EPRecRefL);
      EPRecRefL.SETTABLE(SalesHdrP);
      CLEAR(EPRecRef2G);
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __STOP_EXITPOINT__@5025453();
    BEGIN
    END;

    PROCEDURE InitDefaultDim@19176600();
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0191766
      // Start PA041187.91230
      IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases" THEN BEGIN
        IF VehicleG.GET("Supply VIN") THEN
          CreateDim(
            DATABASE::Vehicle, "Supply VIN",
            DATABASE::"Salesperson/Purchaser", "Salesperson Code",
            DATABASE::Customer, "Bill-to Customer No.")
        ELSE
          CreateDim(
            DATABASE::"Salesperson/Purchaser", "Salesperson Code",
            DATABASE::Customer, "Bill-to Customer No.",
            DATABASE::Campaign, "Campaign No.");
      END ELSE
      // Start PA035597
        CreateDim(
          DATABASE::Customer, "Bill-to Customer No.",
          DATABASE::"Salesperson/Purchaser", "Salesperson Code",
          DATABASE::Campaign, "Campaign No.");
      // Stop PA035597
      // Stop PA041187.91230
      // Stop EU.0191766
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowDocument@2542300(DocTypeP@2542301 : Integer;DocNoP@2542302 : Code[20]);
    VAR
      SalesHdrL@2542303 : Record 36;
      ArchSalesHdrL@2542300 : Record 5046905;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0025423
      IF SalesHdrL.GET(DocTypeP, DocNoP) THEN BEGIN
        PAGE.RUNMODAL(SalesHdrL.GetDocumentPageID(), SalesHdrL);
        IF NOT GET(DocTypeP, DocNoP) THEN
          INIT;
      END ELSE
        IF ArchSalesHdrL.GET(DocTypeP, DocNoP) AND (ArchSalesHdrL.GetDocumentPageID > 0) THEN
          ArchSalesHdrL.ShowDocument(DocTypeP, DocNoP)
        ELSE BEGIN
          SalesHdrL."Document Type" := DocTypeP;
          ERROR(C_INC_NotFound, SalesHdrL."Document Type", DocNoP);
        END;
      // Stop EU.0025423
    END;

    PROCEDURE GetDocumentPageID@2542303() : Integer;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0174523
      IF Prepayment THEN
        EXIT(PAGE::"Prepayment Invoice")
      ELSE
      // Stop EU.0174523
      // Start EU.0025423
      CASE "Order Type" OF
        "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases":
          CASE "Document Type" OF
            "Document Type"::Invoice:
      // Start EU.0114065
              BEGIN
                IF "General Document" THEN
                  EXIT(PAGE::"General Sales Invoice")
                ELSE
                  EXIT(PAGE::"Parts Sales Invoice");
              END;
      // Stop EU.0114065
            "Document Type"::"Return Order":
              EXIT(PAGE::"Sales Return Order");
            ELSE
              IF CheckIfIsDealer() THEN
                CASE "Document Type" OF
                  "Document Type"::Quote:
                    EXIT(PAGE::"Dealer Parts Quote");
                  "Document Type"::Order:
                    EXIT(PAGE::"Dealer Parts Order");
                  "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
                    EXIT(PAGE::"Dealer Parts Credits");
                END
              ELSE
                CASE "Document Type" OF
                  "Document Type"::Quote:
                    EXIT(PAGE::"Parts Sales Quote");
                  "Document Type"::Order:
                    EXIT(PAGE::"Parts Sales Order");
                  "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
      // Start EU.0114065
                    BEGIN
                      IF "General Document" THEN
                        EXIT(PAGE::"General Sales Cr. Memo")
                      ELSE
                        EXIT(PAGE::"Parts Sales Credit Memo");
                    END;
      // Stop EU.0114065
                END;
          END;
        "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases":
          CASE "Document Type" OF
            "Document Type"::Invoice:
              EXIT(PAGE::"Vehicle Sales Invoice");
            "Document Type"::"Return Order":
              EXIT(PAGE::"Vehicle Sales Return Order");
            ELSE
              IF CheckIfIsDealer() THEN
                CASE "Document Type" OF
                  "Document Type"::Quote:
                    EXIT(PAGE::"Dealer Vehicle Quote");
                  "Document Type"::Order:
                    EXIT(PAGE::"Dealer Vehicle Order");
                  "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
                    EXIT(PAGE::"Dealer Veh. Credits");
                END
              ELSE
                CASE "Document Type" OF
                  "Document Type"::Quote:
                    EXIT(PAGE::"Vehicle Sales Quote");
                  "Document Type"::Order:
                    EXIT(PAGE::"Vehicle Sales Order");
                  "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
                    EXIT(PAGE::"Vehicle Sales Credit Memo");
                END;
          END;
        "Order Type"::Service:
          CASE "Document Type" OF
            "Document Type"::Invoice:
              EXIT(PAGE::"Service Invoice");
            "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
              EXIT(PAGE::"Service Sales Credit Memo");
            "Document Type"::Quote:
              EXIT(PAGE::"Sales Quote");
            "Document Type"::Order:
              EXIT(PAGE::"Sales Order");
            "Document Type"::"Blanket Order":
              EXIT(PAGE::"Blanket Sales Order");
            "Document Type"::"Return Order":
              EXIT(PAGE::"Sales Return Order");
          END;
      END;
      EXIT(0);
      // Stop EU.0025423
    END;

    PROCEDURE GetListPageID@17425800(DocTypeP@17425800 : Option;OrderTypeP@17425801 : Option;GeneralDocumentP@17425802 : Boolean) PageID : Integer;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0174523
      IF Prepayment THEN
        EXIT(PAGE::"Prepayment Invoices List")
      ELSE
        CASE DocTypeP OF
          "Document Type"::Quote:
            CASE OrderTypeP OF
              "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases":
                EXIT(PAGE::"Parts Sales Quote List");
              "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases":
                EXIT(PAGE::"Vehicle Sales Quote List");
              "Order Type"::Service:
                EXIT(PAGE::"Service Quote List");
            END;
          "Document Type"::Order:
            CASE OrderTypeP OF
              "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases":
                EXIT(PAGE::"Parts Sales Order List");
              "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases":
                EXIT(PAGE::"Vehicle Sales Order List");
              "Order Type"::Service:
                EXIT(PAGE::"Service Invoice List");
            END;
          "Document Type"::Invoice:
            IF GeneralDocumentP THEN
              EXIT(PAGE::"General Sales Invoice List")
            ELSE
              CASE OrderTypeP OF
                "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases":
                  EXIT(PAGE::"Parts Sales Invoice List");
                "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases":
                  EXIT(PAGE::"Vehicle Sales Invoice List");
                "Order Type"::Service:
                  EXIT(PAGE::"Service Invoice List");
              END;
          "Document Type"::"Return Order":
            CASE OrderTypeP OF
              "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases":
                EXIT(PAGE::"Parts Sales Return Order List");
              "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases":
                EXIT(PAGE::"Vehicle Sales Ret. Order List");
            END;
          "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
            IF GeneralDocumentP THEN
              EXIT(PAGE::"General Sales Cr. Memo List")
            ELSE
              CASE OrderTypeP OF
                "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases":
                  EXIT(PAGE::"Parts Sales Credit Memos List");
                "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases":
                  EXIT(PAGE::"Vehicle Sales Cr. Memos List");
                "Order Type"::Service:
                  EXIT(PAGE::"Service Sales Cr. Memo List");
              END;
        END;
      EXIT(0);
      // Stop EU.0174523
    END;

    PROCEDURE FilterServiceInvoices@17452300(VAR RecP@17452300 : Record 36;OrderNoP@17452301 : Code[20]);
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0174523
      RecP.RESET;
      RecP.SETCURRENTKEY("Service Order No.");
      RecP.SETRANGE("Service Order No.",OrderNoP);
      RecP.SETRANGE("Document Type",RecP."Document Type"::Invoice);
      RecP.SETRANGE("Order Type",RecP."Order Type"::Service);
      RecP.SETRANGE(Prepayment,FALSE);
      IF RecP.FINDSET THEN
        REPEAT
          RecP.MARK(TRUE);
        UNTIL RecP.NEXT = 0;

      RecP.SETRANGE("Service Order No.");
      RecP.SETCURRENTKEY("Prepayment Order No.");
      RecP.SETRANGE("Prepayment Order No.",OrderNoP);
      RecP.SETRANGE(Prepayment,TRUE);
      IF RecP.FINDSET THEN
        REPEAT
          RecP.MARK(TRUE);
        UNTIL RecP.NEXT = 0;

      RecP.SETRANGE("Prepayment Order No.");
      RecP.SETRANGE(Prepayment);
      RecP.SETCURRENTKEY("No.");
      RecP.MARKEDONLY(TRUE);
      // Stop EU.0174523
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckIfIsDealer@2542301() : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0025423
      IF IsImporter() THEN
        EXIT(IMMDealerMgmtG.GetDealer <> '');
      EXIT(FALSE);
      // Stop EU.0025423
    END;

    PROCEDURE CallUpdateSalesLines@49701(ChangedFieldNameP@1000 : Text[100]);
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0000497
      IF SalesLinesExist THEN
        UpdateSalesLines(ChangedFieldNameP);
      // Stop EU.0000497
    END;

    PROCEDURE SalesHeaderBuildPossible@5029351(SalesHeader@1109400000 : Record 36);
    VAR
      ArchSalesHdr@1109400001 : Record 5046905;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      // Archived Document already exists ?
      SalesSetup.GET;
      CASE SalesHeader."Document Type" OF
        SalesHeader."Document Type"::Quote:
          IF (SalesSetup."Archive Quote" = SalesSetup."Archive Quote"::Always) AND
             ArchSalesHdr.GET(SalesHeader."Document Type"::Quote, SalesHeader."No.")
          THEN
            ERROR(C_INC012,SalesHeader."No.");
        SalesHeader."Document Type"::Order:
          IF SalesSetup."Archive Order" AND ArchSalesHdr.GET(SalesHeader."Document Type"::Order,SalesHeader."No.") THEN
            ERROR(C_INC013,SalesHeader."No.");
      END;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE FromPrintInvoiceOut@5025353(ShowRequestPageP@1109400000 : Boolean);
    VAR
      VehicleSalesHdrL@1109400001 : Record 36;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      VehicleSalesHdrL.COPY(Rec);
      REPORT.RUNMODAL(REPORT::"Veh. Confirmation/Invoice", ShowRequestPageP, FALSE, VehicleSalesHdrL);
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE LocationCodeLookup@5025351(VAR TextP@1109400000 : Text[250]) : Boolean;
    VAR
      UserLocationL@1109400001 : Record 5028664;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      UserLocationL.FILTERGROUP(2);
      UserLocationL.SETRANGE("User ID",USERID);
      UserLocationL.FILTERGROUP(0);
      IF PAGE.RUNMODAL(PAGE::"User Locations List", UserLocationL) <> ACTION::LookupOK THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);
      TextP := UserLocationL."Location Code";
      EXIT(TRUE);
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckWarrantyMake@5025362();
    VAR
      MakeL@1109400000 : Record 12;
      SalesLineL@1109400001 : Record 37;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases" THEN BEGIN
        MakeL.RESET;
        MakeL.SETRANGE("Factory Warranty Customer","Bill-to Customer No.");
        IF MakeL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
          IF MakeL.COUNT > 1 THEN
            IF PAGE.RUNMODAL(PAGE::"Parts Sales/Purch. Make Sel.", MakeL) <> ACTION::LookupOK THEN
              EXIT;
          SalesLineL.RESET;
          SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
          SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
          SalesLineL.SETFILTER("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code",'<>%1', MakeL.Code);
