          IF SalesLineL.FINDFIRST THEN
            ERROR(C_INC010);
          "Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" := MakeL.Code;
          VALIDATE("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code");
        END;
      END;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DeleteInstallment@5025354();
    VAR
      InstAgrmtSalesL@1109400000 : Record 5025350;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      InstAgrmtSalesL.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
      InstAgrmtSalesL.SETRANGE("Document No.", "No.");
      // Start PA045176
      IF NOT InstAgrmtSalesL.ISEMPTY THEN
      // Stop PA045176
      InstAgrmtSalesL.DELETEALL;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE StatusOnDrillDown@20(StatusP@1000 : Option);
    VAR
      SalesLineL@1109400000 : Record 37;
    BEGIN
      // @ Opens the Lines in the default Page which are fitting to the StatusP.
      // Start EU.0111610.111441
      SalesLineL.RESET;
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
      SalesLineL.SETFILTER(Type,'<>%1',SalesLineL.Type::" ");
      SalesLineL.SETFILTER("No.",'<>%1','');
      SalesLineL.SETFILTER(Quantity, '<>0');
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Line Status", StatusP);
      IF StatusP = Status::"Fully Reserved on Inventory" THEN
        SalesLineL.SETFILTER("Line Status", '%1|%2|%3|%4|%5',
          Status::"Ready for Shipment",
          Status::"Partly Shipped",
          Status::"Completely Shipped",
          Status::"Partly Invoiced",
          Status::"Fully Reserved on Inventory");
      PAGE.RUNMODAL(0, SalesLineL);
      // Stop EU.0111610.111441
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateStatus@5025361();
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0095631
      UpdateDocStatus(0);
      // Stop EU.0095631
    END;

    PROCEDURE CalcCurrentStatus@17(ExcludeLineNoP@1001 : Integer) CurrentStatusR : Integer;
    VAR
      SalesLineL@1109400000 : Record 37;
      NoOfReservableItemLinesL@9012500 : Integer;
    BEGIN
      // @ Calculates the accurate Status option based on the individual "Shipment", "Posting" or "Reservation" situation in the Order Lines.
      // @ The result is returned as an integer in CurrentStatusR
      // Start EU.0111610.111441
      // Start EU.0095631
      SETFILTER("Document Line No. Filter", '<>%1', ExcludeLineNoP);
      CALCFIELDS(Status);
      SalesLineL.RESET;
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
      SalesLineL.SETFILTER("Line No.", '<>%1', ExcludeLineNoP);
      SalesLineL.SETFILTER(Type,'<>%1',SalesLineL.Type::" ");
      SalesLineL.SETFILTER("No.",'<>%1','');
      SalesLineL.SETFILTER(Quantity, '<>0');
      IF SalesLineL.ISEMPTY THEN
        Status := Status::" "
      ELSE BEGIN
        IF Status IN [Status::" ", Status::"Ready for Shipment"] THEN BEGIN
          SalesLineL.SETRANGE(Type, SalesLineL.Type::Item);
          SalesLineL.SETRANGE(Reserve, SalesLineL.Reserve::Optional, SalesLineL.Reserve::Always);
      // Start EU.0090125
          NoOfReservableItemLinesL := SalesLineL.COUNT;
          IF NoOfReservableItemLinesL <> 0 THEN BEGIN
            SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Line Status", SalesLineL."Line Status"::"Fully Reserved on Inventory");
            IF NoOfReservableItemLinesL = SalesLineL.COUNT THEN
              Status := Status::"Fully Reserved on Inventory"
            ELSE BEGIN
              SalesLineL.SETFILTER("Line Status", '%1|%2', SalesLineL."Line Status"::"Ready for Shipment", SalesLineL."Line Status"::"Fully Reserved on Inventory");
              IF NOT SalesLineL.ISEMPTY THEN
                Status := Status::"Ready for Shipment";
            END;
          END;
      // Stop EU.0090125
        END ELSE
          IF Status IN [Status::"Completely Shipped", Status::"Completely Invoiced"] THEN BEGIN
            SalesLineL.SETFILTER("Line Status",'<%1|%2', Status ,Status::"Fully Reserved on Inventory");
            IF NOT SalesLineL.ISEMPTY THEN
              Status := Status -1;
          END;
      END;
      // Stop EU.0095631
      EXIT(Status);
      // Stop EU.0111610.111441
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateDocStatus@5026136(ExcludeLineNoP@1000 : Integer);
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0095631
      // Start EU.0111610.111441
      CalcCurrentStatus(ExcludeLineNoP);
      // Srop EU.0111610.111441
      CASE Status OF
        Status::" ": //=0
          SetStatus(DocStatusLineG.Type::Created);
        Status::"Ready for Shipment": //=1
          SetStatus(DocStatusLineG.Type::"Ready for Shipment");
        Status::"Fully Reserved on Inventory": //=6
          SetStatus(DocStatusLineG.Type::"Fully Reserved on Inventory");
        Status::"Partly Shipped"://=2
          SetStatus(DocStatusLineG.Type::"Partly Shipped");
        Status::"Completely Shipped": //=3
          BEGIN
            SetStatus(DocStatusLineG.Type::"Completely Shipped");
            SetStatus(DocStatusLineG.Type::"Ready for Invoicing");
          END;
        Status::"Partly Invoiced": //=4
          SetStatus(DocStatusLineG.Type::"Partly Invoiced");
        Status::"Completely Invoiced": //=5
          SetStatus(DocStatusLineG.Type::"Completely Invoiced");
      END;
      // Stop EU.0095631
      // Start EU.0017374
      ShipPropMgtG.UpdateStatusCode(Rec);
      // Stop EU.0017374
    END;

    PROCEDURE ApplyStatusFunction@5025357(CheckFieldNumberP@1109400000 : Boolean);
    VAR
      DocStatusLineL@1109400001 : Record 5045607;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF CheckFieldNumberP AND (CurrFieldNo = 0) THEN
        EXIT;
      // Start PA040256.59475
      IF UserSessionUnitG.GetLock() THEN
        EXIT;
      // Stop PA040256.59475
      CASE "Order Type" OF
        "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases":
      // Start EU.0174523
          DocStatusLineL.Area := DocStatusLineG.Area::"Parts Sales";
        "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases":
          DocStatusLineL.Area := DocStatusLineG.Area::"Vehicle Sales";
        "Order Type"::Service:
          DocStatusLineL.Area := DocStatusLineG.Area::"Service Sales";
        ELSE
          EXIT;
      END;
      IF DocStatusLineL.GET(DocStatusLineL.Area, "Document Type", "Status Code", DocStatusLineG."Status Type"::"Document Status") THEN
        DocStatusLineL.DoExecuteStatusFunctions(STRSUBSTNO('%1 %2 %3', "Order Type", "Document Type", "No."));
      // Stop EU.0174523
      // Stop INC
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE CheckNewStatus@5025359(TriggeredFromPageFieldP@18884300 : Boolean);
    VAR
      DocStatusLineL@1109400000 : Record 5045607;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      CASE "Order Type" OF
        "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases":
      // Start EU.0188843.192508
          DocStatusLineG.Area := DocStatusLineG.Area::"Parts Sales";
        "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases":
          DocStatusLineG.Area := DocStatusLineG.Area::"Vehicle Sales";
        "Order Type"::Service:
          DocStatusLineG.Area := DocStatusLineG.Area::"Service Sales";
        ELSE
          EXIT;
      END;
      IF TriggeredFromPageFieldP THEN
        DocStatusLineL.CheckUserStatusSelection(
          DocStatusLineG.Area,
          "Document Type",
          "Status Code", xRec."Status Code",
          DocStatusLineG."Status Type"::"Document Status")
      ELSE
        DocStatusLineL.CheckStatusSelection(
          DocStatusLineG.Area,
          "Document Type",
          "Status Code",
          DocStatusLineG."Status Type"::"Document Status");
      // Stop EU.0188843.192508
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetStatus@5025356(DocStatusLineTypeP@1109400000 : Integer);
    VAR
      DocStatusLineL@1109400001 : Record 5045607;
      OldStatusCodeL@1109400002 : Code[20];
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      // Start PA032877
      // Start PA038224.48164
      // Start EU.0041404
      OldStatusCodeL := "Status Code";
      // Start EU.0041404
      // Stop PA038224.48164
      // Start PA032877
      CASE "Order Type" OF
        "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases":
          BEGIN
            "Status Code" := DocStatusLineL.SetStatus(
                "Status Code",
                DocStatusLineG.Area::"Parts Sales",
                "Document Type",
                DocStatusLineTypeP,
                DocStatusLineG."Status Type"::"Document Status");
      // Start PA035801.23176
      // Start EU.0174523
      // Start EU.0188843.192508
      // Stop EU.0188843.192508
      // Stop EU.0174523
      // Stop PA035801.23176
              END;
        "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases":
          BEGIN
            "Status Code" := DocStatusLineL.SetStatus(
                "Status Code",
                DocStatusLineG.Area::"Vehicle Sales",
                "Document Type",
                DocStatusLineTypeP,
                DocStatusLineG."Status Type"::"Document Status");
      // Start PA035801.23176
      // Start EU.0174523
      // Start EU.0188843.192508
      // Stop EU.0188843.192508
      // Stop EU.0174523
      // Stop PA035801.23176
          END;
        "Order Type"::Service:
          BEGIN
            "Status Code" := DocStatusLineL.SetStatus(
                "Status Code",
                DocStatusLineG.Area::"Service Sales",
                "Document Type",
                DocStatusLineTypeP,
                DocStatusLineG."Status Type"::"Document Status");
      // Start PA035801.23176
      // Start EU.0174523
      // Start EU.0188843.192508
      // Stop EU.0188843.192508
      // Stop EU.0174523
      // Stop PA035801.23176
          END;
      END;
      // Start EU.0188843.192508
      IF "Status Code" <> OldStatusCodeL THEN
        DoStatusHistoryUpdate();
      // Stop EU.0188843.192508
      // Stop PA032877
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE DoStatusHistoryUpdate@18884300();
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0188843.192508
      CASE "Order Type" OF
        "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases":
          UpdateStatusHistory("Status Code", StatusHistoryG.Area::"Parts Sales");
        "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases":
          UpdateStatusHistory("Status Code", StatusHistoryG.Area::"Vehicle Sales");
        "Order Type"::Service:
          UpdateStatusHistory("Status Code", StatusHistoryG.Area::"Service Sales");
      END;
      // Stop EU.0188843.192508
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowStatusHistory@18884301();
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0188843.192508
      StatusHistoryG.RESET;
      StatusHistoryG.SETCURRENTKEY(Area,"Document Type","Document No.","Modification Date/Time");
      CASE "Order Type" OF
        "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases":
          StatusHistoryG.SETRANGE(Area,StatusHistoryG.Area::"Parts Sales");
        "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases":
          StatusHistoryG.SETRANGE(Area,StatusHistoryG.Area::"Vehicle Sales");
        "Order Type"::Service:
          StatusHistoryG.SETRANGE(Area,StatusHistoryG.Area::"Service Sales");
      END;
      StatusHistoryG.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
      StatusHistoryG.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
      StatusHistoryG.SETRANGE("Status Type", StatusHistoryG."Status Type"::"Document Status");
      StatusHistoryG.SETRANGE("Line No.", 0);
      PAGE.RUNMODAL(0, StatusHistoryG);
      // Stop EU.0188843.192508
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateStatusHistory@17425801(StatusCodeP@17425801 : Code[20];AreaP@17425802 : Option);
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0174523
      StatusHistoryG.UpdateStatusHistory(AreaP,"Document Type","No.", DocStatusLineG."Status Type"::"Document Status", "Status Code");
      // Start PA035801.23176
      IF DocStatusLineG.GET(AreaP, "Document Type", StatusCodeP, DocStatusLineG."Status Type"::"Document Status") THEN BEGIN
        DocStatusLineG.SetDocumentNo("No.");
      // Start PA038224.48181
        DocStatusLineG.SetCommBuffer(TempCommBufferG);
      // Stop PA038224.48181
        DocStatusLineG.ExecuteNotifications();
      // Start PA038224
        DocStatusLineG.SendMessage();
      // Stop PA038224
      END;
      // Stop PA035801.23176
      // Stop EU.0174523
    END;

    PROCEDURE TransferAddressDataSalesInq@5025352(SalInquiryHdrP@1109400000 : Record 5028930);
    BEGIN
      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(SalInquiryHdrP);
      IF SalesHeaderExitPoint(Rec,ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function",ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre,'TransferAddressDataSalesInq') THEN
        EXIT;
      // Stop PA036544
      // Start INC
      SalesSetup.GET;
      // Start EU.0032453
      ServSetupG.GET;
      IF (SalInquiryHdrP."Customer No." = '') OR
         (SalInquiryHdrP."Customer No." IN [
         SalesSetup."Def. Cust. No. Parts Inquiry",
         ServSetupG."Def. Cust. No. Service Inquiry"])
      THEN BEGIN
      // Stop EU.0032453
        "Sell-to Customer No." := '';
        "Bill-to Customer No." := '';
        VALIDATE("Sell-to Contact No.",SalInquiryHdrP."Contact No.");
        VALIDATE("Bill-to Contact No.",SalInquiryHdrP."Contact No.");
      END ELSE BEGIN
        VALIDATE("Bill-to Customer No.",SalInquiryHdrP."Customer No.");
        VALIDATE("Sell-to Customer No.",SalInquiryHdrP."Customer No.");
      END;
      "Bill-to Name" := SalInquiryHdrP.Name;
      "Bill-to Name 2" := SalInquiryHdrP."Name 2";
      "Bill-to Address" := SalInquiryHdrP.Address;
      "Bill-to Address 2" := SalInquiryHdrP."Address 2";
      "Bill-to City" := SalInquiryHdrP.City;
      "Bill-to Contact" := SalInquiryHdrP.Contact;
      "Sell-to Customer Name" := SalInquiryHdrP.Name;
      "Sell-to Customer Name 2" := SalInquiryHdrP."Name 2";
      "Sell-to Address" := SalInquiryHdrP.Address;
      "Sell-to Address 2" := SalInquiryHdrP."Address 2";
      "Sell-to City" := SalInquiryHdrP.City;
      "Sell-to Contact" := SalInquiryHdrP.Contact;
      "Bill-to Post Code" := SalInquiryHdrP."Post Code";
      "Sell-to Post Code" := SalInquiryHdrP."Post Code";
      "Ship-to Name" := SalInquiryHdrP.Name;
      "Ship-to Name 2" := SalInquiryHdrP."Name 2";
      "Ship-to Address" := SalInquiryHdrP.Address;
      "Ship-to Address 2" := SalInquiryHdrP."Address 2";
      "Ship-to City" := SalInquiryHdrP.City;
      "Ship-to Contact" := SalInquiryHdrP.Contact;
      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(SalInquiryHdrP);
      SalesHeaderExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function",ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,'TransferAddressDataSalesInq');
      // Stop PA036544
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE DisplayUnsettledDeposits@5025358();
    VAR
      CustomerL@1109400000 : Record 18;
      DepositItemL@1109400001 : Record 27;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF CustomerL.GET("Sell-to Customer No.") THEN
        DepositItemL.ShowOpenCustDeposit(CustomerL);
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE DisplayRemarksWindow@5025360() : Boolean;
    VAR
      SalesRemarksPageL@1109400000 : Page 5025541;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA036842
      IF Cust."Disable Remarks" THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);
      // Stop PA036842

      // Start PA033019
      IF NOT SalesRemarksPageL.ShowRemarks(Rec) THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);
      SalesRemarksPageL.RUNMODAL;
      EXIT(TRUE);
      // Stop PA033019
    END;

    PROCEDURE CustomerSelection@1119427000(VAR SearchExpressionP@1109400000 : Code[90]) : Code[90];
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF CurrFieldNo = 0 THEN
        EXIT;
      IF SearchExpressionP = '' THEN
        EXIT('');
      SearchExpressionP := Cust.ShowCustomerSelectionWindow(SearchExpressionP);
      IF SearchExpressionP = '' THEN
        ERROR('');
      EXIT(SearchExpressionP);
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetServPostNoSeries@1109400001();
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF "Order Type" <> "Order Type"::Service THEN
        EXIT;
      ServSetupG.GET;
      CASE "Document Type" OF
        "Document Type"::Invoice:
          BEGIN
            IF IntDocPostG.CheckCustomerInternal("Bill-to Customer No.") THEN BEGIN
              NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",ServSetupG."Internal Document Nos.");
            END ELSE BEGIN
              IF ("No. Series" <> '') AND (ServSetupG."Invoice Nos." = ServSetupG."Posted Invoice Nos.") THEN
                "Posting No. Series" := "No. Series"
              ELSE
                NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",ServSetupG."Posted Invoice Nos.");
            END;
          END;
        "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
          BEGIN
            IF IntDocPostG.CheckCustomerInternal("Bill-to Customer No.") THEN BEGIN
              NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",ServSetupG."Internal Credit Memo Nos.");
            END ELSE BEGIN
              IF ("No. Series" <> '') AND (ServSetupG."Credit Memo Nos." = ServSetupG."Posted Credit Memo Nos.") THEN
                "Posting No. Series" := "No. Series"
              ELSE
                NoSeriesMgt.SetDefaultSeries("Posting No. Series",ServSetupG."Posted Credit Memo Nos.");
            END;
          END;
      END;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowLinkedPurchDocs@1109400016();
    VAR
      PurchHdrL@1109400000 : Record 38;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF FilterLinkedPurchDocs(PurchHdrL) THEN BEGIN
        PAGE.RUNMODAL(0,PurchHdrL);
        EXIT;
      END;
      MESSAGE(C_INC016);
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE FilterLinkedPurchDocs@1109400015(VAR PurchHdrP@1109400000 : Record 38) : Boolean;
    VAR
      SalesLineL@1109400001 : Record 37;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      PurchHdrP.RESET;
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
      SalesLineL.SETFILTER("From Purch. Document No.",'<>%1','');
      IF NOT SalesLineL.FINDSET THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);
      REPEAT
        IF STRPOS(PurchHdrP.GETFILTER("Document Type"),FORMAT(SalesLineL."From Purch. Document Type")) = 0 THEN
          IF PurchHdrP.GETFILTER("Document Type") = '' THEN
            PurchHdrP.SETRANGE("Document Type",SalesLineL."From Purch. Document Type")
          ELSE
            PurchHdrP.SETFILTER("Document Type",PurchHdrP.GETFILTER("Document Type") + '|%1',
              SalesLineL."From Purch. Document Type");
        IF STRPOS(PurchHdrP.GETFILTER("No."),SalesLineL."From Purch. Document No.") = 0 THEN
          IF PurchHdrP.GETFILTER("No.") = '' THEN
            PurchHdrP.SETRANGE("No.",SalesLineL."From Purch. Document No.")
          ELSE
            PurchHdrP.SETFILTER("No.",PurchHdrP.GETFILTER("No.") + '|' + SalesLineL."From Purch. Document No.");
      UNTIL SalesLineL.NEXT = 0;
      EXIT(PurchHdrP.FINDFIRST);
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE ClearVehicleSetReference@1109400002(VAR SalesLineP@1109400000 : Record 37);
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      SalesLineP.Promotion := FALSE;
      SalesLineP."Set Vehicle Line No." := 0;
      SalesLineP."Promotion Price incl. VAT" := 0;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE ReverseVehicleLedgEntries@1109400003(ServOrderNoP@1109400000 : Code[20]);
    VAR
      VehicleLedgEntryL@1109400001 : Record 5025405;
      VehicleCmpLedgEntryL@1109400002 : Record 5025405;
      VehLastLedgEntryL@1109400003 : Record 5025405;
      ServiceHdrL@1109400004 : Record 5025624;
    BEGIN
      // @ Function will roll back applied service campaigns used after Undo Service Shipment & Credit Memo functions.
      // Start PA033484
      ServiceHdrL.RESET;
      IF ServiceHdrL.GET(ServiceHdrL."Document Type"::Order,ServOrderNoP) THEN BEGIN
        VehicleLedgEntryL.RESET;
        VehicleLedgEntryL.SETCURRENTKEY("Service Order No.","Service Order Line No.");
        VehicleLedgEntryL.SETRANGE("Service Order No.",ServOrderNoP);
        VehicleLedgEntryL.SETRANGE(VIN,ServiceHdrL.VIN);
        VehicleLedgEntryL.SETRANGE(Open,FALSE);
        IF VehicleLedgEntryL.FINDSET(TRUE) THEN
          REPEAT
            VehicleCmpLedgEntryL.RESET;
            VehicleCmpLedgEntryL.SETCURRENTKEY("Service Order No.","Service Order Line No.");
            VehicleCmpLedgEntryL.SETRANGE("Service Order No.",VehicleLedgEntryL."Service Order No.");
            VehicleCmpLedgEntryL.SETRANGE("Service Order Line No.",VehicleLedgEntryL."Service Order Line No.");
            VehicleCmpLedgEntryL.SETRANGE(Open,FALSE);
            VehicleCmpLedgEntryL.SETRANGE(Positive,FALSE);
            IF VehicleCmpLedgEntryL.FINDLAST THEN BEGIN
              VehLastLedgEntryL.RESET;
              VehLastLedgEntryL.SETCURRENTKEY("Service Order No.","Service Order Line No.");
              VehLastLedgEntryL.SETRANGE("Service Order No.",VehicleLedgEntryL."Service Order No.");
              VehLastLedgEntryL.SETRANGE("Service Order Line No.",VehicleLedgEntryL."Service Order Line No.");
              VehLastLedgEntryL.SETRANGE("Entry Type",VehicleCmpLedgEntryL."Entry Type");
              VehLastLedgEntryL.SETRANGE(Open,FALSE);
              VehLastLedgEntryL.SETRANGE(Positive,TRUE);
              IF VehLastLedgEntryL.FINDLAST THEN BEGIN
                IF ((VehicleCmpLedgEntryL."Entry Type" = VehicleCmpLedgEntryL."Entry Type"::"Service Usage") AND
                   (VehLastLedgEntryL."Entry No." < VehicleCmpLedgEntryL."Entry No.")) OR
                   ((VehicleCmpLedgEntryL."Entry Type" = VehicleCmpLedgEntryL."Entry Type"::"Service Sale") AND
                   (VehLastLedgEntryL."Entry No." > VehicleCmpLedgEntryL."Entry No."))
                THEN BEGIN
                  VehicleLedgEntryL."Campaign Reversion" := TRUE;
                  VehicleLedgEntryL.MODIFY;
                END;
              END;
            END;
          UNTIL VehicleLedgEntryL.NEXT = 0;
      END;
      // Stop PA033484
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE IsImporter@5025800() : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      EXIT(CompanyInfo.IMSCheck());
      // Stop INC
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE TestIMSFieldAccess@1101353014(FieldNoP@1101353000 : Integer);
    VAR
      CompanyInfoL@1101353001 : Record 79;
      RecordRefL@1101353002 : RecordRef;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      RecordRefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
      CompanyInfoL.TestIMSFieldAccess(RecordRefL,FieldNoP);
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateSalesPerson@1101422630(OldSalesPersonCodeP@1101422631 : Code[10];NewSalesPersonCodeP@1101422632 : Code[10]);
    VAR
      SalesHdrL@1101422633 : Record 36;
    BEGIN
      // @ function to update the Sales Person Code
      // @ param ContactCodeP - the contact No.
      // @ param OldSalespersonCodeP - the old Sales Person
      // @ param NewSalespersonCodeP - the new Sales person
      // Start PA034807
      SalesHdrL.RESET;
      // Start PA034807.I001866
      // Stop PA034807.I001866
      // Start PA034807.I001867
      SalesHdrL.SETFILTER("Document Type", '<>%1&<>%2',
        SalesHdrL."Document Type"::"Credit Memo",
        SalesHdrL."Document Type"::"Return Order");
      // Stop PA034807.I001867
      SalesHdrL.SETRANGE("Salesperson Code", OldSalesPersonCodeP);
      SalesHdrL.MODIFYALL("Salesperson Code", NewSalesPersonCodeP);
      // Stop PA034807
    END;

    PROCEDURE CalculatePrepaymentAmounts@1101219228(VAR TotalPrpmtInvP@1101219230 : Decimal;VAR TotalPrpmtOpenP@1101219229 : Decimal);
    VAR
      CustLedgEntryL@1101219227 : Record 21;
    BEGIN
      // @ function to calculate total invoiced prepayment amount and total open prepayment amount for the current
      // @ "Bill-to Customer No." and current "No." with the help of the Customer Ledger Entries
      // @ param TotalPrpmtInvP: sum of "Amount (LCY)" of table "Cust. Ledger Entry"
      // @ param TotalPrpmtOpenP: sum of "Remaining Amt. (LCY)" of table "Cust. Ledger Entry"
      // Start PA034291
      TotalPrpmtInvP := 0;
      TotalPrpmtOpenP := 0;
      // Start EU.0174523
      IF NOT Prepayment THEN BEGIN
      // Stop EU.0174523
        CustLedgEntryL.RESET;
        CustLedgEntryL.SETCURRENTKEY("Customer No.",Open,"Document No.");
        CustLedgEntryL.SETRANGE("Customer No.","Bill-to Customer No.");
        CustLedgEntryL.SETRANGE(Prepayment,TRUE);
        CustLedgEntryL.SETRANGE("Prepayment Order No.","No.");
        IF CustLedgEntryL.FINDSET THEN BEGIN
          REPEAT
            CustLedgEntryL.CALCFIELDS("Amount (LCY)","Remaining Amt. (LCY)");
            TotalPrpmtInvP += CustLedgEntryL."Amount (LCY)";
            TotalPrpmtOpenP += CustLedgEntryL."Remaining Amt. (LCY)";
          UNTIL CustLedgEntryL.NEXT = 0;
      // Start EU.0174523
        END;
      // Stop EU.0174523
      END;
      // Stop PA034291
    END;

    PROCEDURE LookupTotalPrepaymentsInvoiced@1101219229();
    VAR
      CustLedgEntryL@1101219227 : Record 21;
    BEGIN
      // @ Lookup opens all prepayment relevant Customer Ledger Entries for the current "Bill-to Customer No." and "No."
      // Start PA034291
      CustLedgEntryL.RESET;
      CustLedgEntryL.SETCURRENTKEY("Customer No.",Open,"Document No.");
      CustLedgEntryL.SETRANGE("Customer No.","Bill-to Customer No.");
      CustLedgEntryL.SETRANGE(Prepayment,TRUE);
      CustLedgEntryL.SETRANGE("Prepayment Order No.","No.");
      PAGE.RUNMODAL(0, CustLedgEntryL)
      // Stop PA034291
    END;

    PROCEDURE LookupTotalPrepaymentsOpen@1101219230();
    VAR
      CustLedgEntryL@1101219227 : Record 21;
    BEGIN
      // @ Lookup opens prepayment relevant open Customer Ledger Entries for the current "Bill-to Customer No." and "No."
      // Start PA034291
      CustLedgEntryL.RESET;
      CustLedgEntryL.SETCURRENTKEY("Customer No.",Open,"Document No.");
      CustLedgEntryL.SETRANGE("Customer No.","Bill-to Customer No.");
      CustLedgEntryL.SETRANGE(Open,TRUE);
      CustLedgEntryL.SETRANGE(Prepayment,TRUE);
      CustLedgEntryL.SETRANGE("Prepayment Order No.","No.");
      PAGE.RUNMODAL(0, CustLedgEntryL)
      // Stop PA034291
    END;

    PROCEDURE CalcNoOfOpenPrepmtInvoices@1101219231(VAR NoOfUnpostedPrepmtP@1101219228 : Integer);
    VAR
      SalesHdrL@1101219227 : Record 36;
    BEGIN
      // @ filters table Sales Header for all Invoices, where the Prepayment Order No. equals the
      // @ "No." of the current record and where Prepayment is set to true
      // @ param NoOfUnpostedPrepmtP: 0, if nothing is found, else the number of Prepayment relevant Sales Headers
      // Start PA034291
      SalesHdrL.RESET;
      SalesHdrL.SETRANGE("Document Type",SalesHdrL."Document Type"::Invoice);
      SalesHdrL.SETRANGE("Prepayment Order No.","No.");
      SalesHdrL.SETRANGE(Prepayment,TRUE);
      IF NOT SalesHdrL.ISEMPTY THEN
        NoOfUnpostedPrepmtP := SalesHdrL.COUNT
      ELSE
        NoOfUnpostedPrepmtP := 0;
      // Stop PA034291
    END;

    PROCEDURE LookupUnpostedPrepmtInvoices@1101219232();
    VAR
      SalesHdrL@1101219227 : Record 36;
    BEGIN
      // @ opens Page "Prepayment Invoices List" filtered for Sales Headers where the Prepayment Order No. equals the current "No." and
      // @ Prepayment is set to yes
      // Start PA034291
      SalesHdrL.RESET;
      SalesHdrL.SETRANGE("Prepayment Order No.","No.");
      SalesHdrL.SETRANGE(Prepayment,TRUE);
      PAGE.RUNMODAL(PAGE::"Prepayment Invoices List", SalesHdrL)
      // Stop PA034291
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateSalesIncentivesInLines@1101286982(HideDialogP@1101286983 : Boolean);
    VAR
      SalesLineL@1101286982 : Record 37;
    BEGIN
      // @ for all Sales Lines of Type Vehicle update the associated Sales Incentive Lines.
      // @ param HideDialogP: parameter to define, wether the confirmation message should be shown
      // Start PA033985.19213
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Item Type",SalesLineL."Item Type"::Vehicle);
      IF SalesLineL.FINDSET THEN
        REPEAT
          CLEAR(SalesIncentiveMgmtG);
          SalesIncentiveMgmtG.SetHideConfirmMsg(HideDialogP);
          SalesIncentiveMgmtG.UpdateSalesIncentivesSale(Rec,SalesLineL);
          SalesIncentiveMgmtG.SetHideConfirmMsg(FALSE);
        UNTIL (SalesLineL.NEXT = 0);
      // Stop PA033985.19213
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateDimSetID@1109400026();
    BEGIN
      // Start PA035597
      ValidateShortcutDimCode(1,"Shortcut Dimension 1 Code");
      ValidateShortcutDimCode(2,"Shortcut Dimension 2 Code");
      // Stop PA035597
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateOpportunity@1101382984();
    VAR
      OpportunityL@1101382987 : Record 5092;
      ContactL@1101382986 : Record 5050;
      CustomerL@1101382985 : Record 18;
      OpportunitySelectionL@1101382984 : Page 5207814;
      ContactNoL@1101382983 : Code[20];
    BEGIN
      // Start PA036869
      // @ Updates the Opportunity No. in the order
      IF ("Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::Order,"Document Type"::Quote]) AND
         ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases") AND
         GUIALLOWED
      THEN BEGIN
        IF "Opportunity No." = '' THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA045610
          IF NOT ContactNoAvailableG THEN BEGIN
            CASE "Document Type" OF
              "Document Type"::Order:
                BEGIN
                  CustomerL.GET("Sell-to Customer No.");
                  ContactL.SETCURRENTKEY("Address No.");
                  ContactL.SETRANGE("Address No.",CustomerL."Address No.");
                  IF ContactL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
                    ContactNoL := ContactL."No.";
                  END;
                END;
              "Document Type"::Quote:
                BEGIN
      // Start PA036869.34553
                  IF CurrFieldNo = FIELDNO("Sell-to Customer No.") THEN BEGIN
                    CustomerL.GET("Sell-to Customer No.");
                    ContactL.SETCURRENTKEY("Address No.");
                    ContactL.SETRANGE("Address No.",CustomerL."Address No.");
                    IF ContactL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
                      ContactNoL := ContactL."No.";
                    END;
                  END ELSE BEGIN
                    ContactNoL := "Sell-to Contact No.";
                   END;
                END;
      // Stop PA036869.34553
            END;
          END ELSE
            ContactNoL := ContactNoG;
      // Stop PA045610
          OpportunityL.RESET;
          OpportunityL.SETRANGE("Contact No.",ContactNoL);
          OpportunityL.SETRANGE(Closed,FALSE);
          IF NOT OpportunityL.ISEMPTY THEN BEGIN
            CLEAR(OpportunitySelectionL);
            OpportunitySelectionL.LOOKUPMODE(TRUE);
            OpportunitySelectionL.SETTABLEVIEW(OpportunityL);
            IF OpportunitySelectionL.RUNMODAL = ACTION::LookupOK THEN BEGIN
              OpportunitySelectionL.GETRECORD(OpportunityL);
      // Start PA036869.34485
              "Opportunity No." := OpportunityL."No.";
      // Start EU.0017305
              UpdateDocumentChainEntry(OpportunityL);
      // Stop EU.0017305
              IF (OpportunityL."Sales Document Type" <> OpportunityL."Sales Document Type"::" ") AND
                (OpportunityL."Sales Document No." <> '')
              THEN BEGIN
                IF NOT CONFIRM(C_INCRelatedSalesDocument,FALSE,OpportunityL."No.") THEN
                  EXIT;
              END;
      // Stop PA036869.34485
              OpportunityL."Sales Document Type" := "Document Type" + 1;
              OpportunityL."Sales Document No." := "No.";
      // Start PA041187.88318
              OpportunityL."Sales Quote Type" := OpportunityL."Sales Quote Type"::Vehicle;
      // Stop PA041187.88318
              OpportunityL.MODIFY;
              "Opportunity No." := OpportunityL."No.";
            END;
          END;
        END;
      END;
      // Stop PA036869
    END;

    PROCEDURE ContactOnLookup@1101205748(VAR TextP@1101205747 : Text[250]) : Boolean;
    VAR
      ContactL@1101205748 : Record 5050;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA036957
      ContactL.FILTERGROUP(2);
      ContactL.SETRANGE(Type,ContactL.Type::Company);
      ContactL.FILTERGROUP(0);
      IF NOT ContactL.GET(TextP) THEN
        ContactL.INIT;
      IF PAGE.RUNMODAL(0,ContactL) <> ACTION::LookupOK THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);
      TextP := ContactL."No.";
      EXIT(TRUE);
      // Stop PA036957
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetMessageNotification@1109400008(ValidateP@1109400000 : Boolean);
    VAR
      CustL@1109400003 : Record 18;
      MessageL@1109400005 : Record 5047002;
      ContactThroughL@1109400002 : Codeunit 5053;
      TypeL@1109400001 : Option;
      SelectedNotificationL@1109400004 : Text[80];
    BEGIN
      // @ function to set the Message Notification information
      // @ param ValidateP boolean if on Validate on not
      // Start EU.0174523
      TESTFIELD("Sell-to Customer No.");
      // Start PA038224.47832
      ContactThroughL.SetParams(ValidateP, "Message Notification");
      CustL.GET("Sell-to Customer No.");
      // Stop EU.0174523
      IF ValidateP THEN BEGIN
        IF "Message Notification" > '' THEN BEGIN
      // Start EU.0174523
      // Stop EU.0174523
      // Start EU.0032067
          ContactThroughL.ShowCustomerPhoneNumbers("Sell-to Customer No.",CustL."Address No.", TypeL, "Messaging App Type", "Document Type", "No.", FindArea());
      // Stop EU.0032067
          "Message Type" := TypeL;
        END;
      END ELSE BEGIN
      // Start EU.0032067
        SelectedNotificationL := ContactThroughL.ShowCustomerPhoneNumbers("Sell-to Customer No.",CustL."Address No.", TypeL, "Messaging App Type", "Document Type", "No.", FindArea());
      // Stop EU.0032067
      // Start EU.0122714.123625
        "Message Notification" := '';
      // Stop EU.0122714.123625
        IF SelectedNotificationL <> '' THEN BEGIN
          "Message Notification" := SelectedNotificationL;
          "Message Type" := TypeL;
        END;
      END;
      // Stop PA038224.47832
    END;

    PROCEDURE MessageSentOnLookup@19075412();
    VAR
      MessageListL@1109400001 : Record 5047002;
      MessageMgtL@1109400000 : Codeunit 5047001;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA038224.47364
      CLEAR(MessageMgtL);
      CASE "Order Type" OF
      // Start EU.0046364
        "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases":
          MessageMgtL.ShowSentMessageDocument(MessageListL.Area::"Vehicle Sales","Document Type","No.");
        "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases":
          MessageMgtL.ShowSentMessageDocument(MessageListL.Area::"Parts Sales","Document Type","No.");
      // Stop EU.0046364
      END;
      // Stop PA038224.47364
    END;

    PROCEDURE AssignMessageNotification@1109400000(CustomerNoP@1109400000 : Code[20];ContactNoP@1109400004 : Code[20]);
    VAR
      CustomerL@1109400001 : Record 18;
      ContactL@1109400002 : Record 5050;
      AssignL@1109400003 : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // @ Assigns "Message Type", "Messaging App Type" and "Message Notification" values based on source contact or customer.
      // @ param FromCustomerNoP: source contact or customer code.
      // @ param CustomerOrContactP: specifies whether parameter code FromCustomerNoP is a contact code (true) or customer code (false).
      // Start PA038224.48181
      TempCommBufferG.DELETEALL;
      // Start PA041187.88726
      IF ContactNoP > '' THEN
        IF ContactL.GET(ContactNoP) AND (ContactL."Message Notification" <> '') THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA041187.88726
          AssignL := TRUE;
          CustomerL."No." := ContactL."Customer No.";
          CustomerL."Message Type" := ContactL."Message Type";
          CustomerL."Message Notification App Type" := ContactL."Message Notification App Type";
          CustomerL."Message Notification" := ContactL."Message Notification";
        END
      ELSE
      // Start PA041187.88726
        IF CustomerL.GET(CustomerNoP) THEN
      // Start PA041187.88726
          AssignL := CustomerL."Message Notification" <> '';
      IF NOT AssignL THEN
        EXIT;
      TempCommBufferG.INIT;
      TempCommBufferG."Contact No." := CustomerL."No.";
      TempCommBufferG."Message Type" := CustomerL."Message Type";
      TempCommBufferG."Messaging App Type" := CustomerL."Message Notification App Type";
      TempCommBufferG."Selected Comm. Method" := CustomerL."Message Notification";
      TempCommBufferG.INSERT;
      // Stop PA038224.48181
    END;

    PROCEDURE SkipDocumentStatusCodeCheck@1109400004();
    BEGIN
      // @ update the SkipDocumentStatusCodeCheckG to true

      // Start PA039250.51242
      SkipDocumentStatusCodeCheckG := TRUE;
      // Stop PA039250.51242
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckCloseOpportunity@1109400005();
    VAR
      TempOpportunityEntryL@1109400003 : TEMPORARY Record 5093;
      LinkedOpportunityL@1109400001 : Record 5092;
      CheckOpportunityL@1109400002 : Record 5092;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA041864
      // Start PA036209.28630
      IF (("Document Type" = "Document Type"::Quote) OR
         ("Document Type" = "Document Type"::Order)) AND (LinkedOpportunityL.READPERMISSION)
      THEN BEGIN
        LinkedOpportunityL.RESET;
        LinkedOpportunityL.SETCURRENTKEY("Sales Document Type","Sales Document No.");
        IF "Document Type" = "Document Type"::Quote THEN
          LinkedOpportunityL.SETRANGE("Sales Document Type",LinkedOpportunityL."Sales Document Type"::Quote)
        ELSE
          IF "Document Type" = "Document Type"::Order THEN
            LinkedOpportunityL.SETRANGE("Sales Document Type", LinkedOpportunityL."Sales Document Type"::Order);
        LinkedOpportunityL.SETRANGE("Sales Document No.","No.");
        IF LinkedOpportunityL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA041187.88322
          LinkedOpportunityL."Sales Document Type" := LinkedOpportunityL."Sales Document Type"::" ";
          LinkedOpportunityL."Sales Quote Type" := LinkedOpportunityL."Sales Quote Type"::" ";
          LinkedOpportunityL."Sales Document No." := '';
          LinkedOpportunityL.MODIFY;
        END;
      // Stop PA041187.88322
      END;
      // Stop PA036209.28630
      // Stop PA041864
    END;

    PROCEDURE AutomaticOpportunityCreation@1109500005();
    VAR
      MarketingSetupL@1109400000 : Record 5079;
      SalesHeaderL@1109400003 : Record 36;
      SalesLineL@1109400004 : Record 37;
      AutoOppCreationTemplateL@1109400005 : Record 5207866;
      CreateOpportunityL@1109400001 : Page 5046860;
    BEGIN
      // @ It will be called during the modification of a the record to create a new Opportunity automatically.

      // Start PA040025
      IF ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function", ExitPointSetupG.Type::Pre, 'AutomaticOpportunityCreation') THEN
        EXIT;

      MarketingSetupL.GET;
      IF NOT ("Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::Order, "Document Type"::Quote]) THEN
        EXIT;
      // Start PA041187.88856
      IF (NOT MarketingSetupL."Auto. Opp. Cr. For Sales Doc.") OR ("Opportunity No." <> '') OR
      // Stop PA041187.88856
      // Start PA041187.93596
         (("Salesperson Code" = '') AND ("Sell-to Contact No." = '')) OR ("Salesperson Code" = '')
      // Stop PA041187.93596
      THEN
        EXIT;
      // Start PA041187.88856
      SalesLineL.RESET;
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.", "No.");
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Item Type", SalesLineL."Item Type"::Vehicle);
      IF SalesLineL.ISEMPTY THEN
        EXIT;
      SalesLineL.FINDFIRST;
      AutoOppCreationTemplateL.RESET;
      AutoOppCreationTemplateL.SETRANGE("Make Code", SalesLineL."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code");
      AutoOppCreationTemplateL.SETRANGE("Vehicle Status", SalesLineL."Vehicle Status");
      IF AutoOppCreationTemplateL.ISEMPTY THEN
        EXIT;
      AutoOppCreationTemplateL.FINDFIRST;
      CreateOpportunityL.SetSalesHeader(Rec, AutoOppCreationTemplateL);
      // Stop PA041187.88856
      // Start PA040025.83488
      UserSessionUnitG.SetUseOppTemplate(TRUE);
      // Stop PA040025.83488
      // Start PA041187.88423
      CreateOpportunityL.SetAutomaticOppCreation(TRUE);
      // Stop PA041187.88423
      CreateOpportunityL.PageSetup();
      // Start PA040025.83488
      UserSessionUnitG.SetUseOppTemplate(FALSE);
      // Stop PA040025.83488
      CreateOpportunityL.GetSalesHeader(Rec);
      // Start PA041187.88336
      IF SalesHeaderL.GET("Document Type", "No.") THEN
        MODIFY;
      // Stop PA041187.88336

      ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function", ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post, 'AutomaticOpportunityCreation');
      // Stop PA040025
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetSkipDocChain@1101353001(SkipDocChainP@1101353000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      // Start PA042167
      SkipDocChainG := SkipDocChainP;
      // Stop PA042167
    END;

    PROCEDURE SkipVehicleSellToCustomer@1055600(SkipVehicleSellToCustomerP@1055600 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      // @ it updates SkipVehicleSellToCustomerG from Customer table.
      // @ param SkipVehicleSellToCustomerP
      // Start PA041187.88726
      SkipVehicleSellToCustomerG := SkipVehicleSellToCustomerP;
      // Stop PA041187.88726
    END;

    PROCEDURE CreateNewDimSetIDSalesLine@1109400007(VAR TempDimSetEntryP@1109400000 : TEMPORARY Record 480;VAR SalesLineP@1109400001 : Record 37);
    VAR
      DimValueL@1109400004 : Record 349;
    BEGIN
      // @ This function is used to fill Temporary Dimension Set Entry when Global Dimensions (Department or Make) are changed in the Sales Header - to get a new DimensionSetID
      // @ When Global Dimension 1 Code (Department) is changed in the header, should changed also Global Dimension 1 Code in the lines
      // @ When Global Dimension 2 Code (Make) is changed in the header, should not changed Global Dimenesion 2 Code in the lines
      // @ param TempDimSetEntryP : Temp Dimension Set Entry
      // @ param SalesLineP : corresponding Sales Line record

      // Start PA041187.91179
      TempDimSetEntryP.DELETEALL;
      IF DimValueL.GET(GLSetup."Global Dimension 1 Code", "Shortcut Dimension 1 Code") THEN BEGIN
        TempDimSetEntryP.INIT;
        TempDimSetEntryP.VALIDATE("Dimension Code", GLSetup."Global Dimension 1 Code");
        TempDimSetEntryP.VALIDATE("Dimension Value Code", "Shortcut Dimension 1 Code");
        TempDimSetEntryP."Dimension Value ID" := DimValueL."Dimension Value ID";
        TempDimSetEntryP.INSERT;
      END;

      IF DimValueL.GET(GLSetup."Global Dimension 2 Code", SalesLineP."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code") THEN BEGIN
        TempDimSetEntryP.INIT;
        TempDimSetEntryP.VALIDATE("Dimension Code", GLSetup."Global Dimension 2 Code");
        TempDimSetEntryP.VALIDATE("Dimension Value Code", SalesLineP."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code");
        TempDimSetEntryP."Dimension Value ID" := DimValueL."Dimension Value ID";
        TempDimSetEntryP.INSERT;
      END;
      // Stop PA041187.91179
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE CheckReservation@36901(VAR SalesLineP@36900 : Record 37) ResultR : Boolean;
    VAR
      NeverCountL@36901 : Integer;
      LinesCountL@36902 : Integer;
    BEGIN
      // @ Support function to check whether a reservation can be performed on a specific set of Sales Line records according to the Reservation Setup
      // @ and Reserve field on the line. In case there are lines with Reserve as Never a confirmation message is displayed
      // @ param SalesLineP : Record based on Sales Line table which is filtered to Reserve different than Never
      // @ retval ResultR : Boolean TRUE the reservation process can go on, FALSE otherwise
      // Start EU.0000369
      ReservMgtG.CheckAllowReserveForSales("Document Type", TRUE);
      // Start EU.0020674.22214
      SalesLineP.SETFILTER("Item Type", '%1|%2', SalesLineP."Item Type"::Item, SalesLineP."Item Type"::Vehicle);
      LinesCountL := SalesLineP.COUNT;
      SalesLineP.SETRANGE(Reserve, SalesLineP.Reserve::Never);
      NeverCountL := SalesLineP.COUNT;
      SalesLineP.SETFILTER(Reserve, '<>%1', SalesLineP.Reserve::Never);
      IF NeverCountL = 0 THEN
        EXIT(TRUE);
      IF SalesLineP.ISEMPTY THEN
        ERROR(C_INC_MsgCheckReservation, SalesLineP.FIELDCAPTION(Reserve), SalesLineP.Reserve::Never);
      EXIT(CONFIRM(C_INC_ConfirmCheckReservation, FALSE, NeverCountL, LinesCountL, SalesLineP.Reserve::Never, SalesLineP.FIELDCAPTION(Reserve)));
      // Stop EU.0020674.22214
      // Stop EU.0000369
    END;

    PROCEDURE QuickReservationAllLines@1109400207(TypeP@1109400001 : Integer);
    VAR
      SalesLineL@1109400000 : Record 37;
      TotalQuantityToReserveL@2067401 : Decimal;
      TotalUnReservedQuantityL@2067400 : Decimal;
    BEGIN
      // @ Function to provide automatic reservation for all the item lines
      // @ To be called from an Action on header of Sales Documents
      // Start PA041510
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.", "No.");
      // Start EU.0020674.22214
      SalesLineL.SETFILTER("Item Type", '%1|%2', SalesLineL."Item Type"::Item, SalesLineL."Item Type"::Vehicle);
      // Stop EU.0020674.22214
      // Start EU.0000369
      IF NOT CheckReservation(SalesLineL) THEN
        EXIT;
      // Stop EU.0000369
      IF SalesLineL.FINDSET THEN BEGIN
        IF GUIALLOWED THEN
          CASE TypeP OF
            0:
              WindowG.OPEN(C_INC_DlgReserveAllLines);
            1:
              WindowG.OPEN(C_INC_DlgReserveInvAll);
          END;
        REPEAT
      // Start EU.0020674.22214
          ReservMgtG.QuickReserveOneSalesLineWithFeedback(SalesLineL, TypeP, TotalQuantityToReserveL, TotalUnReservedQuantityL);
      // Start EU.0090125
          SalesLineL.GET(SalesLineL."Document Type", SalesLineL."Document No.", SalesLineL."Line No.");
          SalesLineL.MODIFY(TRUE);
      // Stop EU.0090125
        UNTIL SalesLineL.NEXT = 0;
        ReservMgtG.AfterQuickReservationShowFeedbackMessage(TotalQuantityToReserveL, TotalUnReservedQuantityL);
      // Stop EU.0020674.22214
        IF GUIALLOWED THEN
          WindowG.CLOSE;
      END;
      // Stop PA041510
    END;

    PROCEDURE QuickReservationSelectedLines@1109400025(VAR TempSalesLineP@1109400000 : TEMPORARY Record 37;TypeP@1109400002 : Integer);
    VAR
      SalesLineL@1109400001 : Record 37;
      TotalQuantityToReserveL@2067401 : Decimal;
      TotalUnReservedQuantityL@2067400 : Decimal;
    BEGIN
      // @ Function to provide automatic reservation for the selected item lines
      // @ To be called from an Action on header of Sales Documents
      // Start PA041510
      TempSalesLineP.RESET;
      // Start EU.0020674.22214
      TempSalesLineP.SETFILTER("Item Type", '%1|%2', TempSalesLineP."Item Type"::Item, TempSalesLineP."Item Type"::Vehicle);
      // Stop EU.0020674.22214
      // Start EU.0000369
      IF NOT CheckReservation(TempSalesLineP) THEN
        EXIT;
      // Stop EU.0000369
      IF TempSalesLineP.FINDSET THEN BEGIN
        IF GUIALLOWED THEN
          CASE TypeP OF
            0:
              WindowG.OPEN(C_INC_DlgReserveSelLines);
            1:
              WindowG.OPEN(C_INC_DlgReserveInvSel);
          END;
        REPEAT
          SalesLineL.GET(TempSalesLineP."Document Type", TempSalesLineP."Document No.", TempSalesLineP."Line No.");
      // Start EU.0020674.22214
          ReservMgtG.QuickReserveOneSalesLineWithFeedback(SalesLineL, TypeP, TotalQuantityToReserveL, TotalUnReservedQuantityL);
      // Start EU.0090125
          SalesLineL.GET(SalesLineL."Document Type", SalesLineL."Document No.", SalesLineL."Line No.");
          SalesLineL.MODIFY(TRUE);
      // Stop EU.0090125
        UNTIL TempSalesLineP.NEXT = 0;
        ReservMgtG.AfterQuickReservationShowFeedbackMessage(TotalQuantityToReserveL, TotalUnReservedQuantityL);
      // Stop EU.0020674.22214
        IF GUIALLOWED THEN
          WindowG.CLOSE;
      END;
      // Stop PA041510
    END;

    PROCEDURE CreateRequisitionAllLines@36900();
    VAR
      SalesLineL@36901 : Record 37;
      ReqWorksheetFuncL@36900 : Codeunit 5028744;
    BEGIN
      // @ Function to provide creation of reservation on new requisition lines for for all the item lines
      // @ To be called from an Action on header of Sales Documents
      // Start EU.0000369
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.", "No.");
      // Start EU.0020674.22214
      SalesLineL.SETFILTER("Item Type", '%1|%2', SalesLineL."Item Type"::Item, SalesLineL."Item Type"::Vehicle);
      // Stop EU.0020674.22214
      IF NOT CheckReservation(SalesLineL) THEN
        EXIT;
      ReqWorksheetFuncL.CreateRequisition(DATABASE::"Sales Line", "Document Type", "No.");
      // Stop EU.0000369
    END;

    PROCEDURE CreateRequisitionSelectedLines@1109400027(VAR TempSalesLineP@1109400000 : TEMPORARY Record 37);
    VAR
      SalesLineL@1109400001 : Record 37;
    BEGIN
      // @ Function to provide creation of reservation on new requisition lines for the selected item lines
      // @ To be called from an Action on header of Sales Documents
      // Start PA041510
      TempSalesLineP.RESET;
      // Start EU.0020674.22214
      TempSalesLineP.SETFILTER("Item Type", '%1|%2', TempSalesLineP."Item Type"::Item, TempSalesLineP."Item Type"::Vehicle);
      // Stop EU.0020674.22214
      // Start EU.0000369
      IF NOT CheckReservation(TempSalesLineP) THEN
        EXIT;
      // Stop EU.0000369
      IF TempSalesLineP.FINDSET THEN BEGIN
        IF GUIALLOWED THEN
          WindowG.OPEN(C_INC_DlgCreateReqSel);
        IF "Req. Wksh. Template Name" = '' THEN BEGIN
          ReservSetupG.GET;
          ReservSetupG.TESTFIELD("Auto Req. Wksh. Template");
          "Req. Wksh. Template Name" := ReservSetupG."Auto Req. Wksh. Template";
        END;
        REPEAT
          SalesLineL.GET(TempSalesLineP."Document Type", TempSalesLineP."Document No.", TempSalesLineP."Line No.");
          ReqWorksheetFuncG.CreateRequisitionSales("Req. Wksh. Template Name", SalesLineL);
        UNTIL TempSalesLineP.NEXT = 0;
        IF GUIALLOWED THEN
          WindowG.CLOSE;
      END;
      // Stop PA041510
    END;

    PROCEDURE CancelReservationAllLines@1109400029();
    VAR
      SalesLineL@1109400000 : Record 37;
    BEGIN
      // @ Function to provide automatic cancelation for all the item lines
      // @ To be called from an Action on header of Sales Documents
      // Start PA041510
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.", "No.");
      // Start EU.0020674.22214
      SalesLineL.SETFILTER("Item Type", '%1|%2', SalesLineL."Item Type"::Item, SalesLineL."Item Type"::Vehicle);
      // Stop EU.0020674.22214
      IF SalesLineL.FINDSET THEN BEGIN
        IF GUIALLOWED THEN
          WindowG.OPEN(C_INC_DlgCancelResAllLines);
      // Start PA044975
        REPEAT
          CancelReservationOneLine(SalesLineL);
      // Stop PA044975
        UNTIL SalesLineL.NEXT = 0;
        IF GUIALLOWED THEN
          WindowG.CLOSE;
      END;
      // Stop PA041510
    END;

    PROCEDURE CancelReservationSelectedLines@1109400028(VAR TempSalesLineP@1109400000 : TEMPORARY Record 37);
    VAR
      SalesLineL@1109400001 : Record 37;
    BEGIN
      // @ Function to provide automatic cancelation for the selected item lines
      // @ To be called from an Action on header of Sales Documents
      // Start PA041510
      TempSalesLineP.RESET;
      // Start EU.0020674.22214
      TempSalesLineP.SETFILTER("Item Type", '%1|%2', TempSalesLineP."Item Type"::Item, TempSalesLineP."Item Type"::Vehicle);
      // Stop EU.0020674.22214
      IF TempSalesLineP.FINDSET THEN BEGIN
        IF GUIALLOWED THEN
          WindowG.OPEN(C_INC_DlgCancelResSelLines);
      // Start PA044975
        REPEAT
          SalesLineL.GET(TempSalesLineP."Document Type", TempSalesLineP."Document No.", TempSalesLineP."Line No.");
          CancelReservationOneLine(SalesLineL);
      // Stop PA044975
        UNTIL TempSalesLineP.NEXT = 0;
        IF GUIALLOWED THEN
          WindowG.CLOSE;
      END;
      // Stop PA041510
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE UpdateReqWorksheetName@1109400017();
    VAR
      SalesLineL@1109400003 : Record 37;
      ResEntryL@1109400004 : Record 337;
      ReqWshtNameL@1109400000 : Code[10];
      FromCurrFieldL@1109400001 : Boolean;
      NotUpdatedLinesL@1109400002 : Integer;
    BEGIN
      // @ Function to support specific updating of "Requisition Wksh. Name" field
      // Start PA041510
      ReqWshtNameL := ReqWorksheetFuncG.GetDefReqWorksheetName(
        "Req. Wksh. Template Name", "Location Code", "Purch. Order Type", "Shortcut Dimension 2 Code", TRUE);
      IF ReqWshtNameL <> "Requisition Wksh. Name" THEN BEGIN
        IF CurrFieldNo = FIELDNO("Requisition Wksh. Name") THEN
          ReqWshtNameL := "Requisition Wksh. Name"
        ELSE
          "Requisition Wksh. Name" := ReqWshtNameL;
      END;
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.", "No.");
      // Start EU.0020674.22214
      SalesLineL.SETFILTER("Item Type", '%1|%2', SalesLineL."Item Type"::Item, SalesLineL."Item Type"::Vehicle);
      // Stop EU.0020674.22214
      IF NOT SalesLineL.FINDSET(TRUE) THEN
        EXIT;
      ReservMgtG.InitFilterAndSortingLookupFor(ResEntryL, TRUE);
      REPEAT
        ReservMgtG.SalesLineFilterReservFor(ResEntryL, SalesLineL);
        ResEntryL.SETFILTER("From Batch Name", '<>%1', "Requisition Wksh. Name");
        IF ResEntryL.ISEMPTY THEN BEGIN
          IF CurrFieldNo = FIELDNO("Requisition Wksh. Name") THEN BEGIN
            SalesLineL."Req. Worksheet Name" := "Requisition Wksh. Name";
          END ELSE BEGIN
            IF (SalesLineL."Location Code" = "Location Code") AND
               (SalesLineL."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" = "Shortcut Dimension 2 Code")
            THEN
              SalesLineL."Req. Worksheet Name" := "Requisition Wksh. Name"
            ELSE
              SalesLineL."Req. Worksheet Name" := ReqWorksheetFuncG.GetDefReqWorksheetName(
                "Req. Wksh. Template Name", SalesLineL."Location Code", "Purch. Order Type",
                SalesLineL."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code", TRUE);
          END;
          SalesLineL.MODIFY;
        END;
      UNTIL SalesLineL.NEXT = 0;
      SalesLineL.SETFILTER("Req. Worksheet Name", '<>%1', ReqWshtNameL);
      // Start EU.0106426.106315
      SalesLineL.SETFILTER("Reserved Quantity", '<>%1',0);
      // Stop EU.0106426.106315
      NotUpdatedLinesL := SalesLineL.COUNT;
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Req. Worksheet Name");
      IF NotUpdatedLinesL > 0 THEN BEGIN
        ResEntryL."From Type" := ResEntryL."From Type"::"Requisition Line";
        IF GUIALLOWED THEN
          MESSAGE(C_INC_ResBatchNameWarning,
            NotUpdatedLinesL, SalesLineL.COUNT, ResEntryL."From Type",
            ResEntryL.FIELDCAPTION("From Batch Name"), "Requisition Wksh. Name");
      END;
      // Stop PA041510
    END;

    PROCEDURE CancelReservationOneLine@563600(SalesLineP@563600 : Record 37);
    VAR
      ResEntryL@1000000000 : Record 337;
    BEGIN
      // @ Function will cancel all reservation entries for one given Sales Line
      // Start PA044975
      ReservMgtG.InitFilterAndSortingLookupFor(ResEntryL, TRUE);
      ReservMgtG.SalesLineFilterReservFor(ResEntryL, SalesLineP);
      IF ResEntryL.FINDSET THEN
        REPEAT
          IF ResEntryL.Quantity < 0 THEN
            ERROR(C_INC_ErrCancelNegRes);
          ReservMgtG.CloseReservEntry(ResEntryL."Entry No.", ResEntryL."Reservation Status"::"Canceled or Changed", TRUE, TRUE);
        UNTIL ResEntryL.NEXT = 0;
      // Start EU.0090125
      SalesLineP.GET(SalesLineP."Document Type", SalesLineP."Document No.", SalesLineP."Line No.");
      SalesLineP.MODIFY(TRUE);
      // Stop EU.0090125
      // Stop PA044975
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetContactNoforOpprtunityAssignment@1170000000(ContactNoP@1170000001 : Code[20];ContactNoAvailableP@1170000000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      // @ This function is to assign contact No from Vehicle collection codeunit
      // @ param ContactNoP : Contact No.
      // @ param ContactNoAvailableP : Boolean

      // Start PA045610
      ContactNoAvailableG := ContactNoAvailableP;
      ContactNoG := ContactNoP;
      // Stop PA045610
    END;

    PROCEDURE ContainsMainCustomerLines@564000() : Boolean;
    VAR
      SalesLineL@564000 : Record 37;
    BEGIN
      // @ Returns TRUE is the current document contains at least one line with the flag "Main Customer" set.
      // Start EU.0005640
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.", "No.");
      SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Main Customer", TRUE);
      EXIT(NOT SalesLineL.ISEMPTY);
      // Stop EU.0005640
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateDocumentChainEntry@1109400006(OpportunityP@1109400000 : Record 5092);
    VAR
      DocumentChainEntryL@1109400002 : Record 5206330;
      DocChainNoL@1109400001 : Integer;
    BEGIN
      // @ This function is created to update the "Document Chain No." in Sales Header
      // @ param OpportunityP : Record (Opportunity)

      // Start EU.0017305
      DocChainNoL := OpportunityP."Document Chain No.";

      IF NOT SkipDocChainG THEN BEGIN
        CASE "Document Type" OF
          "Document Type"::Quote:
            DocumentChainEntryL.SETRANGE("Document Type", DocChainEntryG."Document Type"::"Vehicle Quote");
          "Document Type"::Order:
            DocumentChainEntryL.SETRANGE("Document Type", DocChainEntryG."Document Type"::"Vehicle Order");
          "Document Type"::Invoice:
            DocumentChainEntryL.SETRANGE("Document Type", DocChainEntryG."Document Type"::"Vehicle Invoice");
        END;
        DocumentChainEntryL.SETRANGE("Document No.", "No.");
        DocumentChainEntryL.SETRANGE(Archived, FALSE);
        IF DocumentChainEntryL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
          DocumentChainEntryL."Chain No." := DocChainNoL;
          DocumentChainEntryL.MODIFY;
        END ELSE
          CASE "Document Type" OF
            "Document Type"::Quote:
              DocChainMgtG.InsertChainEntry(DocChainNoL, DocChainEntryG."Document Type"::"Vehicle Quote", "No.", FALSE);
            "Document Type"::Order:
              DocChainMgtG.InsertChainEntry(DocChainNoL, DocChainEntryG."Document Type"::"Vehicle Order", "No.", FALSE);
            "Document Type"::Invoice:
              DocChainMgtG.InsertChainEntry(DocChainNoL, DocChainEntryG."Document Type"::"Vehicle Invoice", "No.", FALSE);
          END;
        "Document Chain No." := DocChainNoL;
      END;
      // Stop EU.0017305
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetCreatedFromOpportunity@72000(CreatedFromOpportunityP@72000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0047941
      CreatedFromOpportunityG := CreatedFromOpportunityP;
      // Stop EU.0047941
    END;

    PROCEDURE FindArea@1000000000() : Integer;
    VAR
      MessageListL@1109400001 : Record 5047002;
      MessageMgtL@1109400000 : Codeunit 5047001;
    BEGIN
      // @ This function returns the Area of the Sales Document
      // @ RetVal  : Integer

      // Start EU.0032067
      CASE "Order Type" OF
      // Start EU.0046364
        "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases":
          EXIT(MessageListL.Area::"Vehicle Sales");
        "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases":
          EXIT(MessageListL.Area::"Parts Sales");
      // Stop EU.0046364
      // Start EU.0188841
        "Order Type"::Service:
          EXIT(MessageListL.Area::Service);
      // Stop EU.0188841
      END;
      // Stop EU.0032067
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE GetSelectedMsgNotif@21();
    VAR
      CustomerL@1000 : Record 18;
      SelectedMultipleChannelL@1001 : Record 5207890;
      ContactL@1002 : Record 5050;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0122714.123625
      CustomerL.GET("Sell-to Customer No.");
      ContactL.SETRANGE("Address No.", CustomerL."Address No.");
      ContactL.SETRANGE("Customer No.", CustomerL."No.");
      ContactL.SETRANGE(Type, ContactL.Type::Company);
      ContactL.FINDFIRST;
      CASE "Order Type" OF
        "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases":
          SelectedMultipleChannelL.CopySelectedChannels('', SelectedMultipleChannelL."Source Type"::Master, SelectedMultipleChannelL.Area::CRM, ContactL."No.", "No.", "Document Type", SelectedMultipleChannelL.Area::"Vehicle Sales", ContactL."No.");
        "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases":
          SelectedMultipleChannelL.CopySelectedChannels('', SelectedMultipleChannelL."Source Type"::Master, SelectedMultipleChannelL.Area::CRM, ContactL."No.", "No.", "Document Type", SelectedMultipleChannelL.Area::"Parts Sales", ContactL."No.");
      // Start EU.0200720.202594
        "Order Type"::Service:
          SelectedMultipleChannelL.CopySelectedChannels('', SelectedMultipleChannelL."Source Type"::Master, SelectedMultipleChannelL.Area::CRM, ContactL."No.", "No.", "Document Type", SelectedMultipleChannelL.Area::Service, ContactL."No.");
      // Start EU.0200720.202594
      END;
      // Stop EU.0122714.123625
    END;

    PROCEDURE GetHideValidationDialog@14166501() : Boolean;
    VAR
      IdentityManagementL@14166500 : Codeunit 9801;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0141665.142411
      EXIT(HideValidationDialog OR IdentityManagementL.IsInvAppId);
      // Stop EU.0141665.142411
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __START_EVENTS__@1000000001();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE OnBeforeRecreateSalesLinesEvent@12866400(VAR SalesHeader@12866400 : Record 36);

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __STOP_EVENTS__@12866405();

    PROCEDURE ShowServiceInvoices@16606200(OrderNoP@16606200 : Code[20]);
    VAR
      SalesHeaderL@16606201 : Record 36;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0166062.167048
      // Start EU.0174523
      FilterServiceInvoices(SalesHeaderL, OrderNoP);
      SalesHeaderL.SETRANGE(Prepayment, FALSE);
      IF NOT SalesHeaderL.FINDFIRST THEN
        SalesHeaderL.SETRANGE(Prepayment);
      // Stop EU.0174523
      IF NOT SalesHeaderL.FINDFIRST THEN
        SalesHeaderL.INIT;

      // Start EU.0174523
      SalesHeaderL.SETRANGE(Prepayment);
      PAGE.RUN(SalesHeaderL.GetListPageID("Document Type"::Invoice, "Order Type"::Service, FALSE), SalesHeaderL);
      // Stop EU.0174523
      // Stop EU.0166062.167048}
    END;

    [Internal]
    PROCEDURE GetConsignmentBranchShipmentLines@39();
    VAR
      GetBranchShipmentLinesL@1000 : Page 50091;
    BEGIN
      // Start AP001651
      GetBranchShipmentLinesL.SetToSalesHeader(Rec);
      GetBranchShipmentLinesL.LOOKUPMODE := TRUE;
      IF GetBranchShipmentLinesL.RUNMODAL = ACTION::LookupOK THEN
        GetBranchShipmentLinesL.CopyLineToDoc;
      CLEAR(GetBranchShipmentLinesL);
      // Stop AP001651
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      // @ Area PartsSales, VehicleSales, Service
      // @ TRANSFERFIELDS 36|110|112|114|6660|5028930|5046905

      ** ATTENTION! TRANSFERFIELDS ******************************
      * Fields are exchanged with following tables:             *
      *        110   Sales Shipment Header                      *
      *        112   Sales Invoice Header                       *
      *        114   Sales Credit Memo Header                   *
      *       6660   Return Receipt Header                      *
      *    5028930   Sales Inquiry Header                       *
      *    5046905   Archived Sales Header                      *
      ***********************************************************

      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------

                 05.01.11 GL 2340778: New field "All Items Shipped"

                             and "Bill-to Contact No." fields

                             MakeExitPoint replaced

      EU.0135165 19.04.22 PS 136993 When refreshing the Sales Lines with VALIDATE("VAT Base Discount %") then take special care of Line Discounts generated by the VAT Rounding.
                             All VALIDATE("Posting Date") should not trigger a document line amount recalculation.
      EU.0139128 06.06.22 EG 140026 Include the CurrFieldNo triggered validations when Supply VIN performs Sell-to Customer No. validation.
      EU.0139128 07.06.22 EG 140026 Prevent Bill-to-Customer validation to be triggered from "Ship-to Code" validation.
      EU.0138596 13.05.22 DR In case of a Currency factor change the confirmation message must include the information that the lines are rebuild.
                             - Skip UpdateVATAmountRounding when deleting a document fully.
                             - For correct "Line Discount %" processing use the new "Autom. Rounding Disc. %" and "Autom. Rounding Disc. Amount" fields to subtract
                             all correctional discounts resulting from automatic VAT adjustment rounding.
      EU.0142312 25.07.22 DR Don't exclude Vehicle Sales lines from the usual Currency Exchange calculation by validating the "Unit Price".
                             - Do Service Line "Quantity Shipped" check in the beginning of the Sales Line Update.
                             - Don't ask for any line refresh permission when no sales lines exist.
                             - Make sure that all ROUND commands for prices will use the correct rounding precision.

                             - Created new GetHideValidationDialog() function to validate confirm message.

      EU.0156444 19.04.23 GD 157741 RecreateSalesLines() modification so that Line Discount is updated with the new price calculation.
      EU.0159757 22.05.23 EG 159868 In RecreateSalesLines() modify Sales Line Record after sales price re-calculations to save them.

      EU.0169755 29.11.23 EF 170127 In Sell-to Customer No. - OnValidate() removed an assignment of "VAT Registration No." since it is calculated in Bill-to Customer No. - OnValidate().
      EU.0169755 06.12.23 BS 170300 Added code in function RecreateSalesLines() to create sales Line when No. is empty.
      EU.0172844 12.02.24 BK 172842 Posting Date has been considered in creation of Parts/Vehicle sales quote.
      EU.0174523 29.02.24 DR Proforma Print: Fields "No of Proforma Prints", FIELD ID 5025387 BLOCKED, FIELD ID 5025389 BLOCKED and "Service Invoice No. (Short)" added.
                             - "Bill-to Customer No." added to Key "Document Type","Service Order No."

                             all other lines have been recreated.
